title: Wir haben uns in der herrlichen Umgebung und der Wohlfühlatmosphäre im Hotel super entspannen und e.
positive_comment:
Das Hotel liegt inmitten der Natur. Man hat einen tollen Ausblick, viel Ruhe und einen großen Außenbereich sowohl für Kinder als auch für Erwachsene mit vielen Sitzgelegenheiten zum Entspannen und Wohlfühlen. 
Das Hotel ist überaus sauber und gepflegt, das Personal sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend.
negative_comment: Es hat uns an nichts gefehlt.

positive_comment: Das Personal war sehr freundlich und ich habe die Zeit wirklich genossen.
Sehr gut! Sehr freundliches Personal, alles sauber und sehr bequem. Tolle Umgebung und der Wellness Bereich war echt toll zum relaxen 👌

title: Wohlfühlen bei guter Luft und sehr gutem Essen; ein tolles Haus - gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Die Lage ist einfach super! Das Essen ist von hervorragender Qualität, die Portionen sind halt manchmal so groß, dass man nicht immer alles schafft, doch ich habe dann auf kleine Portionen problemlos umgeswitchet. Das Zimmer war angenehm ruhig (lag auch daran, dass keine unmittelbaren Nachbarn), die Luft sowieso einfach nur super - komme gerne wieder für ein Wochenende zum Abspannen!!
negative_comment: Nicht so kuschelig war die Temperatur im Ruheraum, da viel gelüftet wird - da ging es im Jänner halt nur mit Socken und Sweater. Dh der Raum könnte wärmer sein, wurde aber mit einer Kollegin vor Ort besprochen. Weiters ist in der Dampfsauna wenig Dampf und der Saunabereich für alle zugänglich, dh nicht separiert oder nur für adults. Es gibt auch nur Mini-Becher im Badezimmer, doch man findet damit durchaus das Auslangen. Empfehlenswert wären eventuell Gläser direkt am Zimmer.

title: Sehr schönes Hotel
positive_comment: Sehr schönes komfortables Hotel. Gutes Frühstück. Personal freundlich und sehr zuvorkommend,  obwohl Hotel ab nächsten Tag in Betriebsurlaub gegangen ist.
Das Personal ist außerordentlich freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Zimmer waren sehr sauber. Das Frühstücksbuffet war vielfältig und das Abend- bzw Mittagmenü wirklich sehr gut.

title: Angenehmer Aufenthalt in einem gepflegten Haus
positive_comment: Sehr schöne Lage im "Grünen" - ruhige Umgebung. Alles sehr sauber. Teilweise sind die Zimmer noch nicht erneuert aber das stört nicht wirklich weil alles in sehr gutem Zustand ist. Das Frühstück ist sehr gut mit großer Auswahl. Das Abendessen (aus der Karte) ebenfalls sehr gut - große Portionen.
negative_comment: Beim Frühstück ist durch große Gruppen im Hotel eine ziemliche Unruhe am Buffet und es ist schwer immer alles verfügbar zu haben - aber es wird trotzdem versucht fehlendes Angebot rasch nachzuliefern.

title: TOP - tolles Service & Verpflegung, ruhige schöne Lage - erholsamer Kurzurlaub zum Wiederholen
positive_comment:
Gutes Frühstück und ganz tolles Abendmenü - Pool ist klein aber passt sehr gut um Längen zu schwimmen, Saunabereich angenehm - Lage etwas abseits vom Ort sehr ruhig - Zimmertemperatur gut steuerbar bei Minusgraden draussen
Personal an Rezeption und Restaurant sehr freundlich, vielen Dank ganz besonders an Flavio vom Restaurantservice !
negative_comment: nichts

title: angenehmer Aufenthalt in ruhiger Lage
positive_comment:
Schöne Lage, genügend Parkplätze, Restaurant im Haus, gutes Frühstück.
Zimmer geräumig und modern eingerichtet.

Für den Preis darf man sich kein Zimmer im 4* Bereich erwarten. Mein Einbettzimmer war klein, dunkel und spärlich eingerichtet (hat mich ans Internat erinnert), aber mit neuem Bad und sehr sauber. Das meiner Freundin war größer und heller, aber sehr veraltet. 
Essen war fabelhaft, Personal freundlich, alles sauber 👍
Die Lage sehr ruhig, was für uns perfekt war.
Fazit: Preis / Leistung passt
negative_comment: Einige Zimmer sollten wohl noch erneuert werden 😉

title: Struttura pulita e accogliente.
positive_comment:
Della struttura ho apprezzato soprattutto la pulizia, sia della camera che delle aree comuni. Molto comodo anche il parcheggio nel garage sotterraneo. Il personale è sempre stato disponibile ed educato: qualunque richiesta è stata accolta senza problemi. Abbiamo trovato molto buono anche il cibo del ristorante. La struttura è assolutamente adatta alle famiglie con bambini. La stanza dedicata ai più piccoli è davvero bella, con una parete di arrampicata che mia figlia ha adorato.
La struttura dispone di tutto l’occorrente per rilassarsi e tenersi in forma: palestra, piscina e una bella area spa.
negative_comment: Per quanto riguarda gli aspetti meno positivi, la piscina è risultata piuttosto piccola e le sdraio disponibili non erano sufficienti rispetto al numero di ospiti. Durante il nostro soggiorno, l’acqua delle piscine era fredda, rendendo difficile il bagno, soprattutto per i bambini più piccoli. Inoltre, il personale della reception non parlava italiano, il che in alcune situazioni ha reso la comunicazione più complicata. Infine, la struttura non offre animazione né per i bambini né per gli adulti.

positive_comment: Molto bello per i bambini, dal personale, alla cena alla piscina

title: Rilassante

title: Posto dove rilassarsi e rigenerarsi!
positive_comment:
Albergo situato nel centro di St. Lambrecht.
Struttura con molti servizi per le famiglie, stanza giochi, parete arrampicata, tavolo da ping pong e servizio baby sitter. Piscina bellissima e zona Spa curata e molto pulita.
Colazione continentale abbondante a buffet e cena con ampia scelta.
Stanza familiare ampia con letto matrimoniale e divano letto per i ragazzi.
Molto apprezzato e comodo il book disponibile in reception con le escursioni e posti da visitare nelle vicinanze o nel raggio di 30 km dalla struttura.

title: Brilliant Thankyou!
positive_comment: Brilliant location right off the motorway, lovely size room & bathroom. Beautiful views in the morning and for us we found self check in/out very efficient.
negative_comment: No lock on the inside of the bedroom door, which can be a problem if traveling with small children as was worried my toddler would let himself out!

title: Easy acces, clean and modern
positive_comment: The eMotel is really easily accesible from the main road and the motorway and there is a lot of free parking spaces in front of the building. Check in is very practical as well - self check in via an ekiosk in the lobby right next to the entrance door. The room was spacious, very clean and modern. The quality of service and price ratio is okay.

Convenient location, modern and clean lobby and room, not noisy despite the close proximity of the highway, and I also found the self-check in convenient (even though it did not accept our documents so a lot of data had to be entered manually).
negative_comment: The only thing I did not like was that while we had a good wifi connection when we arrived in the middle of the night, the wifi did not work at all in the morning.

positive_comment: We stayed for a night while crossing through Germany. The location was extra convenient for us as the motorway was a minute away. The check-in, room, and environment were extremely great and easy. We will most likely visit again the next time we drive through Germany.

title: Perfection
positive_comment: It is perfection in every detail. Next to the high way, spacious parking, fast self check in, very nice lobby, very very nice rooms and beds, super nice bathroom...
negative_comment: No complaint at all

positive_comment:

Die Zimmer waren sehr sauer und einladend. 

Im Eingangsbereich gab es Automaten mit Sandwiches, Getränken und Snacks.

 Gerne wieder. Sehr zu empfehlen!

negative_comment:

We loved the special attention that the family owners of this boutique stay paid to all details. The sauna area is spacious and beautiful, and has a fantastic view to the mountains! The room is spotless, and the bed is super comfortable and also includes an ergonomic pillow! Breakfast doesn't only present a great variety, but also is of the highest-quality and the cleanest ingredients. The hotel is located in the town, but in a very calm area that is essentially an open mountain field, so we enjoyed evening walks in the area. Loved it, and will make sure to be back!

title: Alpengasthof Tanzstatt is fantastic place to stay.
positive_comment:
Very responsive staff, helping in any situation. We were kindly provided with a transfer from the nearby train station. The hotel has excellent location near the ski lift and one step away from the slopes. On the ground floor a storage room for ski equipment and sleds. 
The hotel rooms are warm, clean and modern in style with comfortable beds. 
Delicious breakfasts and excellent dinners, homemade delicious such as pork ribs, mashed potatoes, goulash, roasts, soups, fresh vegetables and much more. You can also order dishes according to your taste/diet. 
We are very grateful for such a warm welcome.

Real piste accommodation, beautiful surroundings and attentive staff.
Proper storage and drying of ski equipment.

title: Wie immer sehr zufrieden mit JUFA-Hotels
positive_comment: Wir fahren immer wieder in JUFA Hotels und wurden noch nie enttäuscht. Auch diesmal war wieder alles bestens. Sehr familienfreundlich und unkompliziert. title: very good value for money, especially compared to other nearby central hotels
positive_comment: typical city hotel, despite the proximity to railway it was quiet for one night (that railway is used only by one regional tram line), everything was to the high standards of Austria. Recommendation, very good value for money.
negative_comment: Missing hangers in the closet, upon request to the reception, we got hangers.

title: Spacious, comfortable rooms, in a very accessible spot in the city
positive_comment: The location of the hotel is excellent, it only takes around 3 minutes to get to the nearest tram stop. The room is large as is the shower and the toilet. The bed was also comfortable and the room as a whole was very clean.
negative_comment: Had to wait some time before anyone would come to the reception to check me in.

positive_comment: Da cama confortável.  Funcionarios simpáticos e amáveis

title: Great Hotel with a very high standard
positive_comment: Location was perfect, parking is quite easy in the closest parking house.

title: Pure mountain getaway with special attention to all details
positive_comment: We absolutely adored this stay, on the side of the mountain in Rohrmoos, a walk or a quick drive to all nearby ski/hiking stations, the city and restaurants. We loved the special attention that the family owners of this boutique stay paid to all details. The sauna area is spacious and beautiful, and has a fantastic view to the mountains! The room is spotless, and the bed is super comfortable and also includes an ergonomic pillow! Breakfast doesn't only present a great variety, but also is of the highest-quality and the cleanest ingredients. The hotel is located in the town, but in a very calm area that is essentially an open mountain field, so we enjoyed evening walks in the area. Loved it, and will make sure to be back!
negative_comment: N/A

title: The best experience in Austria ever
positive_comment: I loved everything - the views, the location (a charming little village, very near the ski lifts), the sauna, the food, the little souvenir shop with homemade products, and the lovely personnel! I haven’t tried the yoga class, but I will definitely be back!

title: Amazing design details chill you up & in the same time relax you. You need to experience it! :-)
positive_comment: Owners of the Resort are exceptionally nice people. Wooden design of the whole resort, all little details are so amazing. Breakfast so nice with everything you expect in the healthy manner. Parking in front of the resort and also cca 5 min to the skiing slopes.

We enjoyed it so much with two small kids and a dog! In the morning you start with a very good breakfast (homemade Granola was fantastic) and in the evening you can finish with sauna (included). There is also a garden with a rest area and small playground for kids! Everything is thought out down to the last detail in this hotel!
Kind staff, interior style, great view through the window

Beautiful hotel in a nice, calm location. Probably recently renovated with attention to detail. Awesome view on both sides, and from sauna, too. 
Room was smaller, but comfortable and had everything we needed. Bathroom was clean. Kitchenette was equipped enough to cook simple meals.
Breakfast was organic, they served various selection: from overnight oatmeal to ham, cheese and eggs. Coffee or delicious tea available. Even our 1-year-old always found something to eat. During the day there were some drinks and snacks available, paid extra.
Parking available in from of the hotel or in a parking garage. 
There is a nice garden where you can relax and a small playground.
The terrace where you can do yoga or exercise has a beautiful view, too, we just enjoyed the view though.
negative_comment: The garage is only 2 m high, might be a problem to park a car with a roof box.

positive_comment:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Absolutely loved this place! A brand-new gem with amazing design — every detail so beautiful that my soul just melted. Even without joining yoga classes, I felt completely rested every day.

Highlights:

✨ Calm, cozy, and beautifully designed atmosphere

🛏️ Stylish, comfortable rooms

🧖‍♀️ Lovely sauna + relaxing sauna lounge

☀️ Gorgeous garden area, perfect for chilling

🍳 Amazing breakfast & great dining space (self-service café in the evening = super nice!)

🚡 Perfect location near 2 main lifts — Planai & Schladming +


A truly well-thought-out, welcoming place. Totally thrilled — thank you so much! 🙌

title: Great place to relax
positive_comment: Sauna, good breakfast, friendly and helpful staff, amazing view from the room.
negative_comment: Breakfast could start earlier to allow leave earlier to hike. For this price I think they should not charge for tea outside of the breakfast. The bed supposed to be double but it was actually 2 beds put together so not so comfy.

positive_comment:
- very tasty and healthy breakfast options
- nice and friendly staff
- great view from the hotel room
- comfortable bed and quiet room
Everything was fantastic, checkin process, area, design and overall experience
Me gusto todo! El personal muy agradable! La comida muy bien! La habitación grande cómoda, calentita! Todo excelente!
negative_comment: Que no hay ascensor!

title: A place where you would like to come back.
positive_comment: All clean, new, comgortable, location “in the middle of the ski slopes” Amazing staff, everybody super nice. We stayed over Christmas and they created a wonderful atmosphere. Pets warmly welcomed.

title: I highly recommend
positive_comment: It was very welcoming and nice. Wonderful area and views. A lot of space for a good price

title: Good, satisfied
positive_comment: Overall good hotel, friendly staff, double room were good
negative_comment:
We were there for F1, and for that it is very remote, and close to nothing.

But I suppose it’s a ski hotel, and for that it is probably very good

title: Alpengasthof Tanzstatt is fantastic place to stay.
positive_comment:
Very responsive staff, helping in any situation. We were kindly provided with a transfer from the nearby train station. The hotel has excellent location near the ski lift and one step away from the slopes. On the ground floor a storage room for ski equipment and sleds. 
The hotel rooms are warm, clean and modern in style with comfortable beds. 
Delicious breakfasts and excellent dinners, homemade delicious such as pork ribs, mashed potatoes, goulash, roasts, soups, fresh vegetables and much more. You can also order dishes according to your taste/diet. 
We are very grateful for such a warm welcome.

Real piste accommodation, beautiful surroundings and attentive staff.
Proper storage and drying of ski equipment.
negative_comment: Drying wet ski clothing was a bit difficult

positive_comment: Close to the ski track. The staff is friendly and helpful. The rooms are clean, spacious. Half board service perfect for ski trips.
Kiváló szálloda, jó konyhával, finom sörrel. Az ott dolgozók nagyon kedvesek. Pályaszállás, síelés szempontjából nagyon kényelmes.

title: Nagyon jó szállás közvetlenül a sípálya és a lift mellett.
positive_comment: Másodszor voltunk, az előző évben is minden rendben volt, kifejezetten ajánlott pályaszállás, kiváló elhelyezkedéssel és felszereltséggel. A félpanziós ellátás tökéletes, de ha valakinek nem jön be, a'la carte is rendelhet.

negative_comment:
Meckern auf hohen Niveau:

positive_comment: Concert hall parallel to the hotel, comfy beds, easy check in and check out (online possible), staff was very friendly
negative_comment: my room faced the train station so it is sometimes loud when a train goes by

positive_comment: Wir hatten ein neues Zimmer (ein 4er Zimmerzu zweit) -sehr komfortabel . Konnten sogar schon um 11.00 das Zimmer beziehen. Personal ist sehr freundlich nur versteht man kaum deutsch.
negative_comment: In einem österr. Hotel wünsche ich mir eigentlich deutsch sprechen zu können- nicht dass wir mit englisch Probleme hätten - ist nur ein wenig eigenartig. Und österreichische TV Sender wären auch nett.

title: Meine Frau und ich waren bereits 2025 in diesem Hotel und werden es auch 2027 buchen.
positive_comment:
Das Frühstückbuffet ist nicht groß, jedoch ausreichend.
Die Zimmer sind sehr schön, wir hatten das Zimmer 101, genügend Platz und sehr sauber. Es schläft sich sehr gut in den Betten. Das ganze Hotel macht eine sehr guten Eindruck und das Personal ist aufmerksam und bemüht. Der Chef Andreas sorgt sich um jeden Gast auch persönlich.
negative_comment:
Das Abendessen...wir befinden uns in einem von Ungarn betriebenen Hotel in Osterreich. Es sind auch viele Gäste aus Ungarn anwesend. Serviert wird die ungarische Küche und dies in Österreich. Nicht schlecht, jedoch denke ich, auch die Ungarn hätten gerne mehr Österreichisches Essen. Was angeboten wird, haben sie sowieso zu Hause!
Bitte Andreas....lass Dir was einfallen...
Sonst Alles OK

positive_comment: Tolles Hotel mit netten Inhabern und sehr nettes Personal. Zimmer waren neu renoviert und einfach großartig. Wir hatten sogar ein Familien Zimmer mit 2 getrennten Schlafzimmern. Somit hatte unser Sohn  ein extra Zimmer für sich. Essen war gut, Frühstück und Abendessen in Buffet Form.  Beim Abendessen gab es 2 Fleischgerichte zur Auswahl und Beilagen.  Kleine Auswahl an Salaten, eine Suppe und ein kleiner Nachtisch.
negative_comment: Die Lage ist nicht so toll. Im Winter mag es super sein, direkt im Skigebiet. Allerdings im Sommer nichts los, etwas schade. Wer die Ruhe mag und einfach vor Ort etwas wandern möchte ok. Ansonsten muss man weit mit dem Auto fahren um etwas zu sehen oder zu erleben.

title: Sehr freundlich und sauberes
positive_comment: Super freundliches und stets hilfreiches Personal.

Die Zimmer sind großzügig: begehbare große Dusche, Kühlschrank/Wasserkocher/Tassen und Löffel, sowie ein Save im Zimmer vorhanden. Das Zimmer verfügt ebenfalls über einen Balkon. 
Das Servicepersonal ist überaus zuvorkommend und freundlich.
Das Essen ausgezeichnet, ebenso der dazugehörige Service.
negative_comment:
Das Hotel hat keinen Aufzug.
Der Kaffee zum Frühstück war lauwarm. 
Der Balkon verfügte über kleine Stühle.

positive_comment: Unser Zimmer war neu und schön möbliert. Balkon mit herrlichem Blick auf die schöne Berglandschaft. Das Hotel liegt direkt an der Skipiste was natürlich sehr angenehm ist.  Frühstück und Abendessen jeweils Buffet waren gut und man konnte für jeden Geschmack etwas finden. Gerne wieder.
Das Frühstück war gut und dem Standard entsprechend. Die Lage des Hotels ist top! Das Zimmer war neu, sehr geräumig und sehr schön eingerichtet :)
negative_comment: Das Salatbüffet am Abend hat noch "Luft nach oben"

title: Wir verbrachten 3 Nächte in einem sehr schönen Hotel mit sehr guter Ausstattung und freundlichen Per

ok es geht.

positive_comment: Sehr ruhiges Haus, sehr schöne Zimmer, das Frühstück außergewöhnlich - sehr stimmiges Konzept - selten so perfekt umsorgt worden.

title: Einfach toll
positive_comment: Alles. Der Check-in war ein sehr herzliches Willkommen. Das Zimmer war sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtet (was auf die gesamte Unterkunft zutrifft, egal ob innen oder außen). Man konnte nur den Parkplatz hinter dem Haus nutzen, weil die Straße vorn Haus saniert wurde. Jemand ist extra beim Frühstück durchgegangen, um die alternativen Parkplatzmöglichkeiten vorzustellen. Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet und sehr reichhaltig.
negative_comment: Nix

title: Totale Entspannung in traumhafter Kulisse.
positive_comment: Traumhafte Lage, gemütlicher Bungalow, leckeres Frühstück und ganz liebe Gastgeber.
negative_comment: Leider gab es während unseres Aufenthaltes keine Yoga-Kurse.

title: Wir kommen wieder
positive_comment: Leckeres Frühstück, sehr nettes Personal, saubere Zimmmer mit allem Zubehör was man benötigt.
Der tolle Garten und das gute Frühstück und das Yoga Angebot

title: A place where you would like to come back.
positive_comment: All clean, new, comgortable, location “in the middle of the ski slopes” Amazing staff, everybody super nice. We stayed over Christmas and they created a wonderful atmosphere. Pets warmly welcomed.

title: Freundliches Hotel mit spannendem Angebot und super Erholungsfaktor
positive_comment: Ruhiges, familiäres Hotel mit erholsamen Sitzgelegenheiten outdoor. Vielseitiges und spannendes Frühstücksangebot. Schönes, großzügig geschnittenes Zimmer. Die Seidenhühner waren ein besonderes Highlight für mich.
negative_comment: W-LAN zeitlich begrenzt, Zimmer sehr hellhörig, Bio-Ansatz nicht gänzlich nachvollziehbar, keine Bewirtung abends (ausschließlich Self-Service mit Kaffeemaschine und Kühlschrank). Dusche für große Menschen suboptimal (Armatur an Längsseite der Dusche angebracht, dadurch öfters an Duschwände angekommen - Jammern auf hohem Niveau, dennoch ein Thema des Komforts).

title: A place where you would like to come back.
positive_comment: All clean, new, comgortable, location “in the middle of the ski slopes” Amazing staff, everybody super nice. We stayed over Christmas and they created a wonderful atmosphere. Pets warmly welcomed.

title: I highly recommend
positive_comment: It was very welcoming and nice. Wonderful area and views. A lot of space for a good price

title: Good, satisfied
positive_comment: Overall good hotel, friendly staff, double room were good
negative_comment:
We were there for F1, and for that it is very remote, and close to nothing.

But I suppose it’s a ski hotel, and for that it is probably very good

title: Alpengasthof Tanzstatt is fantastic place to stay.
positive_comment:
Very responsive staff, helping in any situation. We were kindly provided with a transfer from the nearby train station. The hotel has excellent location near the ski lift and one step away from the slopes. On the ground floor a storage room for ski equipment and sleds. 
The hotel rooms are warm, clean and modern in style with comfortable beds. 
Delicious breakfasts and excellent dinners, homemade delicious such as pork ribs, mashed potatoes, goulash, roasts, soups, fresh vegetables and much more. You can also order dishes according to your taste/diet. 
We are very grateful for such a warm welcome.

Real piste accommodation, beautiful surroundings and attentive staff.
Proper storage and drying of ski equipment.
negative_comment: Drying wet ski clothing was a bit difficult

positive_comment: Close to the ski track. The staff is friendly and helpful. The rooms are clean, spacious. Half board service perfect for ski trips.
Kiváló szálloda, jó konyhával, finom sörrel. Az ott dolgozók nagyon kedvesek. Pályaszállás, síelés szempontjából nagyon kényelmes.

title: Nagyon jó szállás közvetlenül a sípálya és a lift mellett.
positive_comment: Másodszor voltunk, az előző évben is minden rendben volt, kifejezetten ajánlott pályaszállás, kiváló elhelyezkedéssel és felszereltséggel. A félpanziós ellátás tökéletes, de ha valakinek nem jön be, a'la carte is rendelhet.
negative_comment: A szauna jelenlegi formájában nem méltó az amúgy kiváló szálláshoz, ezt jeleztem is, és kiderült, hogy a management már tervezi az év folyamán a szauna fejlesztését.

title: Családdal eltöltött síelős hétvége pályaszálláson
positive_comment: Nagyon jó lokáció, jó ár/érték arány, profi, kedves és segítőkész személyzet. Nagyon jó konyha.
negative_comment: Minden rendben volt.

title: Nagyon jol megfelel sieleshez, boradozashoz. Jo ar-ertek arany.
positive_comment: Fekvese csodas, elhelyezkedese tokeletes. Szemelyzet kedves, udvarias, segitokesz.
negative_comment: Szobai tv, tv csatornak nagyon elmaradottak voltak. Szauna hatareset.

title: Pure mountain getaway with special attention to all details
positive_comment: We absolutely adored this stay, on the side of the mountain in Rohrmoos, a walk or a quick drive to all nearby ski/hiking stations, the city and restaurants. We loved the special attention that the family owners of this boutique stay paid to all details. The sauna area is spacious and beautiful, and has a fantastic view to the mountains! The room is spotless, and the bed is super comfortable and also includes an ergonomic pillow! Breakfast doesn't only present a great variety, but also is of the highest-quality and the cleanest ingredients. The hotel is located in the town, but in a very calm area that is essentially an open mountain field, so we enjoyed evening walks in the area. Loved it, and will make sure to be back!
negative_comment: N/A

title: The best experience in Austria ever
positive_comment: I loved everything - the views, the location (a charming little village, very near the ski lifts), the sauna, the food, the little souvenir shop with homemade products, and the lovely personnel! I haven’t tried the yoga class, but I will definitely be back!

title: Amazing design details chill you up & in the same time relax you. You need to experience it! :-)
positive_comment: Owners of the Resort are exceptionally nice people. Wooden design of the whole resort, all little details are so amazing. Breakfast so nice with everything you expect in the healthy manner. Parking in front of the resort and also cca 5 min to the skiing slopes.

We enjoyed it so much with two small kids and a dog! In the morning you start with a very good breakfast (homemade Granola was fantastic) and in the evening you can finish with sauna (included). There is also a garden with a rest area and small playground for kids! Everything is thought out down to the last detail in this hotel!
Kind staff, interior style, great view through the window

Beautiful hotel in a nice, calm location. Probably recently renovated with attention to detail. Awesome view on both sides, and from sauna, too. 
Room was smaller, but comfortable and had everything we needed. Bathroom was clean. Kitchenette was equipped enough to cook simple meals.
Breakfast was organic, they served various selection: from overnight oatmeal to ham, cheese and eggs. Coffee or delicious tea available. Even our 1-year-old always found something to eat. During the day there were some drinks and snacks available, paid extra.
Parking available in from of the hotel or in a parking garage. 
There is a nice garden where you can relax and a small playground.
The terrace where you can do yoga or exercise has a beautiful view, too, we just enjoyed the view though.
negative_comment: The garage is only 2 m high, might be a problem to park a car with a roof box.

positive_comment:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Absolutely loved this place! A brand-new gem with amazing design — every detail so beautiful that my soul just melted. Even without joining yoga classes, I felt completely rested every day.

Highlights:

✨ Calm, cozy, and beautifully designed atmosphere

🛏️ Stylish, comfortable rooms

🧖‍♀️ Lovely sauna + relaxing sauna lounge

☀️ Gorgeous garden area, perfect for chilling

🍳 Amazing breakfast & great dining space (self-service café in the evening = super nice!)

🚡 Perfect location near 2 main lifts — Planai & Schladming +


A truly well-thought-out, welcoming place. Totally thrilled — thank you so much! 🙌

title: Great place to relax
positive_comment: Sauna, good breakfast, friendly and helpful staff, amazing view from the room.
negative_comment: Breakfast could start earlier to allow leave earlier to hike. For this price I think they should not charge for tea outside of the breakfast. The bed supposed to be double but it was actually 2 beds put together so not so comfy.

positive_comment:
- very tasty and healthy breakfast options
- nice and friendly staff
- great view from the hotel room
- comfortable bed and quiet room
Everything was fantastic, checkin process, area, design and overall experience

title: Definitely coming again!
positive_comment: A true hidden gem! I loved the hospitality and the facilities. The rooms are spacious, and the bed is super comfy. The hotel restaurant has limited options, but the coffee is great! It's a wonderful place to connect with nature and find your inner peace. Highly recommended!
negative_comment: Nothing!!!!

title: I will definitely come again.  Perfect location!
positive_comment:
Breakfast was perfect. Hadn't had it for a long time. What a quality! 

Location was breathtaking and peaceful. The room was very very comfortable and also i loved the sauna seat. The sauna was  definitely bonus point for some extra cherry on top.

Thank you for the wonderful staff and the service. I will definitely come again.

I loved the handwritten  welcome message and the Austrian cookie. so so cute!
negative_comment:
Maybe add a small toothpaste on the amenities. Other than that we weren't missing on anything. 

It was all in all perfect.

title: Soggiorno molto piacevole
positive_comment: Edificio molto bello e con un bellissimo panorama.

Ho soggiornato in questo hotel castello una notte con lo scopo di visitare la biblioteca monastica di Admont che si trova a circa 3 km. Il luogo è davvero incantevole, immerso nel verde e con vista sui monti circostanti. Lo staff gentile e disponibile. Possibilità di cenare in hotel con servizio a buffet.
negative_comment: Niente da segnalare.

title: Place that makes you feel like a royalty!!!
positive_comment: The hotel has a great view over Admont, and it has specific vibe. like transporting you back in time. We enjoyed the silence too, you really can hear you thoughts, and have a stroll in the woods nearby. The restaurant is great: we had dinner and breakfast, and there were quite a wide range of options, made out of local produce.
negative_comment: Nothing to mention.

title: Basic but nice
positive_comment: Located in an old castle above the little town of Admont, this place is quiet and very basic. The best part is the spacious garden and the small but comfortable sauna.
negative_comment: The breakfast is rather basic, as are the rooms.

positive_comment:
They where so accommodating to everything, specially since we got there a little late because of traffic through Germany, they made even made us a few pizzas we could eat. 

And I know it has nothing to do with the Hotel, but the Abbey down town made a very pleasant surprise for the stay. One of the most beautiful places to visit ever.
negative_comment: Nothing really.

title: Magical!
positive_comment:
Amazing location! Historic place, great views of the surrounding mountains and fields.
Comfortable beds.
Staff is very kind.

title: Alles sehr angenehm und durchaus eine Empfehlung.
positive_comment: Es war ein später Ckeckin möglich (mit einer Schlüsselbox), das Zimmer war sauber und schön warm, die Betten bequem. Obwohl wir am nächten Morgen die letzten Gäste am Frühstückbuffet waren, und die Zeit eigentlich schon fast vorbei war, war alles da und wir wurden gefragt ob wir noch eine frische Eierspeise wünschen und ob sie uns noch etwas bringen könnten :) die Auswahl war reichlich, frisch und schmackhaft.
Freundliches Personal, individuell auf späten Check in angepasst
negative_comment: Terrasse nicht gepflegt (nur ganz kleiner Punkt)

title: alles in Ordnung
positive_comment: alles zur besten Zufriedenheit, sehr nettes Personal, günstige Lage

Die Lage war super, das Frühstück frisch und reichhaltig. Personal super freundlich und aufmerksam. Es gibt sehr viel was man mit Kindern unternehmen kann und auch einen Indoor und Outdoor-Spielplatz, sowie tägliche Aktivitäten und Tiere zum Streicheln.
negative_comment: Die Zimmer waren nicht klimatisiert und nicht sehr gut ausgestattet, es gab zu wenige Steckdosen und zum Beispiel gibts im zweiten Stock des Zimmers auch kein Nachtlicht - da könnte man einfach so eine kleine Nachttischlampe hinstellen, damit man nicht immer nur das große nutzen kann und es gab auch nur Mini-Ventilator für 5 Personen was im Sommer nicht ausreicht wenn das Zimmer nicht klimatisiert ist.

title: Sehr schön, mit Kinder empfehlenswert und gerne wieder.

positive_comment: Located in an old castle above the little town of Admont, this place is quiet and very basic. The best part is the spacious garden and the small but comfortable sauna.
negative_comment: The breakfast is rather basic, as are the rooms.

positive_comment:
They where so accommodating to everything, specially since we got there a little late because of traffic through Germany, they made even made us a few pizzas we could eat. 

And I know it has nothing to do with the Hotel, but the Abbey down town made a very pleasant surprise for the stay. One of the most beautiful places to visit ever.
negative_comment: Nothing really.

title: Magical!
positive_comment:
Amazing location! Historic place, great views of the surrounding mountains and fields.
Comfortable beds.
Staff is very kind.
We would love to come back and enjoy again!

title: Lovely hotel on the hill with amazing views
positive_comment: Really pretty on top of a hill, amazing views, great for the dog, quiet and calm. The crew was also lovely, very nice, caring and it’s a GREAT hotel if you travel with your dog
negative_comment:
We have stayed in other JUFA’s where the food offer was bigger so we were expecting a bit more on that side, it was still delicious and lovely to wake up on Easter with some chocolate and snacks for our dog on our table 
The shower-head could be replaced for a new one

title: Great value for money
positive_comment:
Breakfast was okay.
We were visitng in the winter months, but the room and the dining room were nice and warm. Loved the view of Admont from our room. The room was clean.
negative_comment: Bathroom upstairs! The layout of the room was a bit strange. But that is what you get, when staying in a castle, I guess.

title: Really enjoyed the beautiful schloss
positive_comment: Beautiful surroundings, also the accommodation itself was exceptional with beautiful views, good breakfast and helpful staff. We were also with a dog who was more than welcome there. We enjoyed our stay very much and recommend it to everyone who wants to feel like in a castle.
negative_comment: The only thing we missed was the possibility of dinner directly at the accommodation

title: Unique experience
positive_comment: The location is beautiful. The palace is beautiful. The restaurant has good food. There is a playground for the kids.
negative_comment: Rooms are small

title: Stay in a Castle
positive_comment: The hotel staff were very friendly and helpful. Breakfast was excellent and extensive and staff were very friendly and helpful. Our room, in one of the round towers, was large with many windows to spectacular views of the countryside below and mountains beyond. The bathroom and room were very clean. The hot water took some time to come through. Would definitely recommend just on the scenic location and being able to stay in a castle!
negative_comment: Nothing

positive_comment: Amazing spa area and location. Great rooms with balcony and Mountain View. Good breakfast
negative_comment: The half board menu was a bit disappointing of a 5 star hotel

title: Siamo stati benissimo, ci siamo completamente rilassati
positive_comment:
Lo staff è molto cordiale, ci siamo sentiti accolti
La zona spa è il top
negative_comment: Nulla

positive_comment: Great spot for long weekend, will definitely come back.
negative_comment: Make booking of a La carte restaurants in hotel in advance. Better guidance on reception from day 1 would be appreciated.

positive_comment: There are big and nice spa area, very very good restaurants, lobby area was equiped by big monitor to watch olimpic games, price of the hotel included travel card for all busses in ares and also ski lift.
negative_comment: pillow  in the bad and chairs in room were not comfortable

title: Fantastic
positive_comment: We enjoyed so much our stay at Travel Charme Ifen Hotel Kleinwalsertal, in such an enchanting and peaceful place. The rooms, the marvellous infinity pool, the organization, we can say, perfect! But a special thanks goes to Mr George Castel-Branco, with a rare kindness, ready to help with an uncommon professionalism, that let us go away smiling and less sad leaving that wonderful place.

Everything was excellent but especially the stuff at the door/car service/baggage carrier, they were exceptional, they went extra mile with everything we asked for and even did things we didn’t expect.

Unbelievable experience really.
Will definitely come back.

title: Spa Gem
positive_comment: Amazing experience - can recommend for everyone looking for a weekend (spa) escape

title: Exceptional - would recommend to anyone who wants to experience luxury in a beautiful  place.
positive_comment: The Food was superb! The setting was awesome. Easy walking distance to nearby shopping. Electric car charging stations. Great check in process.
negative_comment:
No poolside drinks or food service. High tables in the restaurant - these are okay for a drinks setting, but having a 5 course meal was not comfortable esp. if you have short legs.

*** NO SPA BOOKING SLOTS *** - why not get extra staff in or make an alternate plan to accommodate your guests? One of the main reasons we booked there was to experience your SPA but the attitude of the SPA staff was very poor and did not fit with the rest of the experience at this hotel. This needs improvement !

title: We’ll be back!
positive_comment: Everything! Super friendly staff, top service at the front office

title: Good location for skiing. Lot of sport activities in the evening.
positive_comment: Good location, walking distance to ski lift. We had half board, good food. It is sport hotel, so a lot of possibilities: table tenis, tenis, direct connection to aqua centrum with full size swimming pool.
negative_comment: There is less space for 4 persons in one room.

positive_comment: Gastronomic offer, professionalism, but also the warmth of the staff. The hotel is very well positioned. You can feel the right dose of tradition. Real value for money.

title: Excellent
positive_comment:
Overall an excellent hotel.
The staff that looked after me during the evening meal were very good and deserve a special mention.

title: Good hotel, facilities could be better
positive_comment: Very nice staff, particularly in the restaurant. NYE gala dinner was excellent
negative_comment: Gym wasn’t very good, broken machinery, spa v small and not a great layout

positive_comment: The facilities were amazing, breakfast versatile and superb, staff very friendly, a stone thrown away from slopes (Pitztal)
negative_comment: The air in the room was hot and dry even when the heating was on minimum.

title: Cozy Alpine hotel :)
positive_comment:
The hotel was very cozy, with vibes of Austrian mountains. Location is perfect for Planai, facilities are great and staff is very friendly.
Hotel offered us a pick up from the train station and dropped us back there which was perfect!
Room was great, it was huge, warm, super comfortable, had everything we needed and the balcony with an amazing view over Planai and ski opening stage! Pictures don’t do this place justice, definitely recommend it!

An old hotel with winding hallways that has a lot of charm and character.
A large, fairly heated pool with one slide that was great for the kids. There were also a few playrooms downstairs for children, though not many, and some required payment.
The breakfast was truly wonderful — one of the best we had on our entire trip.
The staff, dressed in traditional attire, was very friendly.
The town was full of excellent restaurants and activities nearby.
The summer card provided includes many free attractions, which is a great bonus.

title: We loved the sports hotel, would definitely stay again
positive_comment:
The food was really very good, with a wonderful selection and freshly cooked eggs etc at the morning buffet. We normally don’t eat evening meals at hotels but we decided to try and really enjoyed it too. 
The pool was the highlight for sure. It was just heaven for the kids and we’d great fun too on the slides etc. The water was toasty warm inside 
The location was great, with free parking and a five min walk to the cable car and town
So much to do in this area- we were sad not to have longer !
negative_comment: If I was to nit pick I’d say that the staff were not particularly friendly but maybe that’s just a cultural difference. The hotel and the rooms are quite old fashioned but it’s part of its charm

title: Excellent location, very friendly staff.
positive_comment: Very friendly staff, really good service and excellent food and drinks. The hotel is in an old-fashioned style which I loved. Very clean as well. Try their cocktails and eat at their stuberl. Breakfast had a great selection of fresh bread, live cooking and lots of other fresh products.
negative_comment: WiFi is unreliable, especially in the rooms. Single room bed is small and there is no airconditioning. No A/C two things was known upfront and no issue as it was not hot that week but with Austrian summers it can be a demerit. I'd come back, but book a double room even as I travel solo.

title: Great staff, really helpful, superb dinner and breakfast
positive_comment: The staff at Sporthotel Royer is amazing. Really helpful by chat, they arranged for a pick-up from Schladming HBF and they allowed for a small bag to be kept at the reception, while I was Joling the Schladminger Tauern Trail. Breakfast and Dinner options are superb! Nice and big pool, both inside and outside, which are very welcome when the temperatures reach the 30’s.

title: Sencillamente perfecto!!
positive_comment: Ha sido el lugar más bonito que he visto, nos recibieron con una copa de champán y una rosa 😍La vista a los Alpes es majestuosa y poder disfrutarla desdd la piscina infinita, es inigualable. El hotel es sin duda, un lugar perfecto para descansar y desconectar. Todo perfectamente limpio y moderno, y el SPA, sin palabras.. Todo absolutamente todo fue perfecto
negative_comment: Todo me encantó

positive_comment: Amazing spa area and location. Great rooms with balcony and Mountain View. Good breakfast

title: Sehr schöner Kurzurlaub und auf jeden Fall weiter zu empfehlen.
positive_comment: Der Infinitypool war mega toll. Die Zimmer auch sehr sauber und das Personal war sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Vielleicht komme ich mal wieder und die Kleinigkeiten sind behoben.
negative_comment: In einem 5 Sterne Hotel sollte es süßen Sprudel oder Sprite geben und auch nicht ausgehen. Haarspülung gab es auch keine.  Im Indoor Pool lagen zwei Metallschienen, damit man mit dem Kinderwagen die Treppe runterfahren konnte. Die waren aber nicht festgeschraubt und sind davon gerutscht, wenn man mit dem Kinderwagen drauf gefahren ist.

title: Mega Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis!!  Wir kommen gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Das Personal ist super freundlich. Das Angebot beim Frühstück ist hervorragend. Die Jause zur Mittagszeit hat unsere Erwartungen übertroffen. Frische Salate, leckerer Kuchen und sogar 1-2 warme Gerichte. Das war schon ein richtiges Mittagessen. Top!!! Der SPA Bereich mit Indoor und Outdoor Pool ist Spitze. Das haben wir sehr genossen.

title: Super Anlage und super Essen
positive_comment:
Die ganze Wellness Anlage
Der grosse Aussenpool war ein Traum 
Das Essen war super
negative_comment:
Der TV im Zimmer war sehr kompliziert zu bedienen 
Und die Lautstärke war blockiert und sehr leise

title: Von Genial bis leider unmöglich alles dabei. Es überwiegt aber das Gute!
positive_comment: Das Frühstücksbuffet, die Nachmittagsjause und das Abendessen waren vielseitig, frisch und schön präsentiert. Der Aussenpool und die Aussicht sind wundervoll. Ein Teil des Personals ist super freundlich und hilfsbereit. Gratis Äpfel und Wasser sind toll für Ausflüge und eine nette Geste. Die Deko über Ostern war sehr stilvoll. Über den Gruss zu meinem Geburtstag habe ich mich sehr gefreut.
negative_comment: Ein Teil des Personals stellt Getränke wortlos einfach hin. Egal wer am Tisch sitzt dem wird beim Service keine Beachtung geschenkt. Schade. Das Mobiliar etc. ist sehr abgewohnt. Unsere eine Wand im Bad war sehr verschmutzt. Die Livemusik war echt spannend. Der Sänger hat eine gute Stimme kennt aber die Texte nicht wirklich und singt dann einfach freestyle. Leider 3 Tage hintereinander praktisch das selbe Repertoir.

positive_comment: Personal,Sauberkeit,Wellness,Frühstück,schnelles Checkin

title: Tolle Lage, Essenqualität mit Luft nach oben
positive_comment: Tolles Frühstück, Eierspeisen frisch zubereitet, traumhafte Lage, Reinigungskräfte machen tollen Job.
negative_comment: Möblierung des Zimmers entspricht nicht der Zimmerkategorie,, Qualität des Abendessens (Hauptgang)  war enttäuschend schlicht. Servicekräfte desorientiert im Speisesaal, müssen Gäste fragen welches Gericht zu welchem Gast gehört!!

title: Alles tiptop, feines Sternelokal im Hotel Kilianstube besucht
positive_comment: Frühstück sehr gute Auswahl, grosses Buffet das keine Wünsche offen liess.Frisch vom Koch fein zubereitete Omletts .

positive_comment: Moderne Ausstattung, freundliches Personal, ausgezeichnetes Essen, toller Wellnessbereich

negative_comment: Viele Businessgäste

Auf den Zimmern- im Bad könnten die Silikonfugen erneuert werden. 

Smart TV - fehlt leider immer noch ;-)

title: Court séjour en couple
positive_comment: L’accueil du personnel, les repas, l’espace wellness et Spa étaient simplement parfait ! La chambre était un vrai cocon ☺️
negative_comment: Rien

title: Très bon séjour en plein air dans un très bel hôtel
positive_comment: L'établissement était exceptionnel, la chambre, la superbe piscine extérieure ainsi que le SPA. Au top ! En Autriche tous les transports en commun sont gratuits. La situation de l'hôtel était vraiment très bien. De très très belles randonnées à faire alentour.
negative_comment: L'accueil était des plus détestables, pas de bonjour, pas de question concernant notre voyage. Nous devions questionner le personnel à l'accueil pour avoir des renseignements concernant les randonnées, l'accessibilité aux transports en commun. Aucune information ne nous a été donnée concernant le fonctionnement de l'hôtel. Aucun accompagnement aux chambres, ni transport des bagages dans les chambres, il fallait se débrouiller. A notre départ, les frais de garage nous ont été comptés 2x (à nos amis et à nous mêmes) alors que nous n'avions qu'un seul véhicule. Nous ne trouvons pas normal de faire payer 13 euros par nuit pour un véhicule, ainsi que 4.50 euros pour une carafe d'eau au restaurant, vu le coût d'une nuit d'hôtel. A notre départ, pas d'au-revoir et pas de question concernant notre séjour.

title: Séjour agréable
positive_comment: Diversité des équipements proximité, qualité des repas

Die Lage des Hotels ist ideal, sowohl für Erholung als auch für Aktivitäten. Es gibt viele Möglichkeiten zur Freizeitgestaltung, sodass es nie langweilig wird. Insgesamt war mein Aufenthalt rundum gelungen.

Ich komme auf jeden Fall wieder!

title: Cool and rainy outside..Very nice and comfortable inside
positive_comment: Cleanliness of all locations. Everyone spoke English and they were courteous and professional. The food was much better than the previous time I stayed there and the waitresses were very helpful with making my selection by explaining how the food was prepared.
negative_comment:
The lounge chairs by the pool are far too low and both difficult and unsafe to get in and out. I am 81 years old but I observed many 65+ senior citizens who had difficulty also. One had assistance getting down and up/out. There were a few higher chairs but were all fully occupied. 
The room was very nice but the water from the shower flowed into the other floor and did not drain and a towel had to be used to absorb the water and allow me to stand and brush my teeth etc. 
Two pillows were almost flat and unusable as pillows. When checking out, I told the receptionist and she made a note in the computer for future reference and hopefully this will resolve the problem. Thanks

positive_comment:
Coming back every year! Spa area, the hotel rooms and breakfast are just WOW
Location - cannot get better!
negative_comment:
A little more efforts could be put on cleanliness
The sauna area could be also more controlled in terms of noisy people and opening emergency doors for airing the area

title: An almost perfect weekend
positive_comment: An ideal location for a weekend getaway or vacation. Incredible mountain views, a spacious and comfortable room, and a truly excellent spa. The panoramic windows in the saunas are an additional significant advantage for me.
negative_comment: However, the prices in the restaurant do not match the quality of the dishes and service. But perhaps I was just disappointed with my dessert.

positive_comment: The wellness area is the highlight as well as location.
Very pleasant staff and amenities. Since. We were driving this was perfect as they have plenty of parking.
negative_comment: The food was wonderful

title: Best place around to stay, incredible spa
positive_comment: Beautiful views, friendly staff, spa & finnish sauna, outdoor spa areas, fine dining ♥️
negative_comment: Bit more expensive, but still good value for money

title: Perfekt für einen Konzertbesuch
positive_comment: Besonders gefallen hat uns die Nähe zur Stadthalle, da wir ein Konzert besuchten. Auch war das Zimmer trotz der Nähe zu einer vielbefahrenen Straße ruhig. Im Zimmer selbst fehlte es an nichts und man hatte genügend Platz als Ablage. Ebenfalls ist man nach 15-20 Minuten Fußweg in der Innenstadt.
negative_comment: Für eine Nacht oder ein Wochenende perfekt. Allerdings gab es keine Tür ins Badezimmer.

title: Sehr gutes Hotel
positive_comment: Die Lage direkt an der Messe und in Laufweite zum Stadion war für mich optimal. Das Personal war durchweg freundlich und hilfsbereit. Trotz Lage an einer Hauptverkehrstrasse und Bahnlinie war es angenehm ruhig.

title: Centrally located with friendly people
positive_comment: Centrally located, small but clean rooms, friendly staff
negative_comment: Location, friendly staff

title: Bella esperienza
positive_comment:
Hotel molto carino, pulito e ottima posizione per noi che dovevamo andare al planai per il concerto dei backstreet boys

Ottima colazione!!!
negative_comment: La stanza un po' retro per il prezzo pagato (molto alto) ma comunque pulita

title: Good location for skiing. Lot of sport activities in the evening.
positive_comment: Good location, walking distance to ski lift. We had half board, good food. It is sport hotel, so a lot of possibilities: table tenis, tenis, direct connection to aqua centrum with full size swimming pool.
negative_comment: There is less space for 4 persons in one room.

positive_comment: Gastronomic offer, professionalism, but also the warmth of the staff. The hotel is very well positioned. You can feel the right dose of tradition. Real value for money.

title: Excellent
positive_comment:
Overall an excellent hotel.
The staff that looked after me during the evening meal were very good and deserve a special mention.

title: Good hotel, facilities could be better
positive_comment: Very nice staff, particularly in the restaurant. NYE gala dinner was excellent
negative_comment: Gym wasn’t very good, broken machinery, spa v small and not a great layout

positive_comment: The facilities were amazing, breakfast versatile and superb, staff very friendly, a stone thrown away from slopes (Pitztal)
negative_comment: The air in the room was hot and dry even when the heating was on minimum.

title: Cozy Alpine hotel :)
positive_comment:
The hotel was very cozy, with vibes of Austrian mountains. Location is perfect for Planai, facilities are great and staff is very friendly.
Hotel offered us a pick up from the train station and dropped us back there which was perfect!
Room was great, it was huge, warm, super comfortable, had everything we needed and the balcony with an amazing view over Planai and ski opening stage! Pictures don’t do this place justice, definitely recommend it!

An old hotel with winding hallways that has a lot of charm and character.
A large, fairly heated pool with one slide that was great for the kids. There were also a few playrooms downstairs for children, though not many, and some required payment.
The breakfast was truly wonderful — one of the best we had on our entire trip.
The staff, dressed in traditional attire, was very friendly.
The town was full of excellent restaurants and activities nearby.
The summer card provided includes many free attractions, which is a great bonus.

title: We loved the sports hotel, would definitely stay again
positive_comment:
The food was really very good, with a wonderful selection and freshly cooked eggs etc at the morning buffet. We normally don’t eat evening meals at hotels but we decided to try and really enjoyed it too. 
The pool was the highlight for sure. It was just heaven for the kids and we’d great fun too on the slides etc. The water was toasty warm inside 
The location was great, with free parking and a five min walk to the cable car and town
So much to do in this area- we were sad not to have longer !
negative_comment: If I was to nit pick I’d say that the staff were not particularly friendly but maybe that’s just a cultural difference. The hotel and the rooms are quite old fashioned but it’s part of its charm

title: Excellent location, very friendly staff.
positive_comment: Very friendly staff, really good service and excellent food and drinks. The hotel is in an old-fashioned style which I loved. Very clean as well. Try their cocktails and eat at their stuberl. Breakfast had a great selection of fresh bread, live cooking and lots of other fresh products.
negative_comment: WiFi is unreliable, especially in the rooms. Single room bed is small and there is no airconditioning. No A/C two things was known upfront and no issue as it was not hot that week but with Austrian summers it can be a demerit. I'd come back, but book a double room even as I travel solo.

positive_comment: They know what tastes good and it shows on their amazing breakfast! I don't mean they have anything fancy or unseen, but the stuff that matters, things like eggs, bacon, ham, cheese, pastries, bread, juices, coffee, all the sweet stuff and everything else is amazing here and 100% the real deal. The rooms were great too and location is top, so well worth it!

title: Super
positive_comment: The location of this hotel is perfect. We enjoyed their breakfast - a broad range of food and very tasty. The staff members were very kind.

title: A wonderful weekend enjoying a beautiful city.
positive_comment: Comfortable quiet room, wonderful location near city centre but in a quiet square.
negative_comment: There were nno problems.  We were very satifisfied.

positive_comment: Great location near the city centre and it's own private parking. The room was ok and the staff were friendly and helpful.

title: Very good hotel with lovely staff in a brilliant area.
positive_comment:
It was great to have a double room and a twin room next to each other. Everything was clean and comfortable and all the staff were friendly and helpful. There was lots of choice for breakfast and it was great to have the water dispenser near 
reception. We looked at the gym and sauna but didn't have time to use them. The location was perfect - close to the train station and also the town centre with all the interesting attractions, yet in a local area with a buzzing market, bars and restaurants.
negative_comment: Although the breakfast was good with plenty of variety, it seemed too expensive for what it was.

title: Would like to recommend it to friends.
positive_comment: Location is excellent. The room is spacious and clean.

title: Road trip 2025
positive_comment: 2nd stay in a mercure,  first time in Graz. Check in easy and parking too. Staff were very helpful, the barmaid/kellnerin was amazing. Room was clean, a/c working and easy to use.
negative_comment: Nothing..alles gut

positive_comment: It was ok. Good location bed was ok showers bathroom is clean. We got slippers.
negative_comment: No fridge

positive_comment: Great location, close to the center and tourist attractions. Comfortable room, nice service, and delicious breakfasts. We will gladly stay here during our next visit to Graz :)

title: Beau séjour... mais restons sur notre fin en termes d'accueil et de gestion de la clientèle !
positive_comment: Piscine extérieure incroyable pour la natation avec une vue magnifique. Un bel espace Spa. Un hôtel très cosy très moderne avec une très belle déco. Un petit déjeuner et un déjeuner top.
negative_comment: Le personnel de la réception peu avenant. Aucune explication quant aux prestations générales de l'hôtel. Nous avons du monter nos bagages nous mêmes... pour un 5 étoiles c'est honteux sans compter le peu d'amabilité. A la fin du séjour aucune question sur notre séjour aucune note de sympathie... très décevant pour un hôtel qui se veut de ce standing... j'oubliais la facturation des carafes d'eau plate lors du déjeuner et diner et la chèreté du parking à la journée. Vu le prix à la journée ces prestations pourraient être intégrées...

positive_comment: Séjour génial! Les repas étaient délicieux et variés. L'espace Spa et les piscines sont vraiment magnifiques et notre chambre était très confortable.
negative_comment: Des gamelles pour chiens dans les chambres seraient appréciables au vu du prix de la nuit pour nos amis à 4 pattes, de même qu'un plaid ou un panier spécialement pour eux. S'agissant d'un 5*, j'étais étonnée de ne pas trouver de bouilloire ou de machine à café en chambre.

positive_comment:
Les prestations sont incroyables, le personnel au petit soin.
Le spa est top
negative_comment:
Les rideaux de la chambre sont trop courts et ne couvrent pas la fenetre!
Le jour passe.
C'est fou qu'un hotel de ce standing n'ait pas des rideaux à la bonne taille

title: Séjour vraiment super dans cette magnifique région
positive_comment:
Petit déjeuner : très bien, collation de l’après midi très bien, et le repas du soir super, surtout la soirée grillades .
Coté salle de bain : coton tige et coton démaquillant approvisionner 
Tous les jours, l’eau tous les jours dans le frigo très appréciable 
Le pass pour le transport en commun et les cabines top
negative_comment:
Pas de nappes sur les tables, mais bon je comprends avec le réchauffement climatique il faut penser à la planète.
Dommage pas de quoi faire du thé ou café dans la chambre

positive_comment: Hôtel très luxueux, un cadre très jolis, les petits déjeuner sont succulents !
negative_comment:
Certaines personnes du personnel ne font aucun efforts pour être compris dans une autre langue. C’est dommage. 
Les piscines pourraient être un peu plus chaudes

title: Fantastique séjour dans le Voralberg
positive_comment:
Accueil très sympathique et explications en anglais. Chambre gigantesque et très propre avec vue sur les montagnes. Bar et restaurant très agréable, cuisine typique et particulièrement savoureuse. Le spa est également super accueillant et très calme sans parler de la splendide piscine avec vue sur les sommets environnant. 
Nous réellement enchanté par le séjour que nous avons passé et n'hésiterons pas à revenir pourquoi pas à une autre saison.

title: Hôtel très agréable et moderne
positive_comment: Hôtel magnifique, en plein milieu des montagnes dans un environnement naturel, les piscines intérieures et extérieures sont magnifiques ainsi que la zone spa. Gentillesse du personnel. Également. La cuisine du restaurant reste simple tout en étant complexe et propose des repas de grandes qualité sans exubérance.
negative_comment: Le seul point négatif de cet hôtel sont les extras à savoir le prix prix du parking, le coût des chiens, le coût des enfants ce qui fait monter la note assez rapidement. Dommage.

title: Très bien … Mais !!
positive_comment: Le confort. Les services proposés. L’amabilité du personnel. L’emplacement. La qualité des repas gastronomiques.
negative_comment: Une grosse erreur au niveau de la facturation. Le peu de compréhension de l’hôtesse d’accueil qui été chargé du dossier. Sans mon contrôle il me demandait 250€ en plus . C’est pas normal pour un établissement de cette classe

title: Muy recomendado
positive_comment:
Todo estupendo. 
Ubicacion muy centrica y personal muy amable
negative_comment: Todo estaba genial

positive_comment: Habitación muy limpia y amplia para 4 personas. Ubicado muy cerca del centro, en una zona con muchos restaurantes alrededor. Parking en el mismo edificio.

positive_comment: Top Lage nahe der Messe - Zimmer sind dennoch erstaunlich ruhig und die Betten gut. Nettes Personal und gutes Frühstück. Sehr gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis für ein Hotel in der Grazer Innenstadt.

title: Perfekt für Messebesucher, tolle Auswahl am Frühstücks Buffet. 24/7 Rezeption
positive_comment:
Sehr unkomplizierter check in via app - such das öffnen der Zimmer Türe übers Handy had einwandfrei funktioniert
tolles Frühstück
super Lage direkt gegenüber der Messe
negative_comment:
Fenster Richtung Bahnhof waren nachts etwas laut wenn man sie offen lassen wollte
Schuhlöffel am Zimmer wäre toll gewesen

title: Top
positive_comment: Schöne moderne Zimmer, sehr sauber, Check-in sehr sympathisch, Nähe zu Messe, öffentliche Verkehrsanbindung

title: Wir waren sehr zufrieden
positive_comment:
Sehr modern, sauber und sehr freundliche Angestellte.
Für einen Konzertbesuch in der Stadthalle die optimale
Lage
Die Nähe zur Stadthalle, schnelle Abwicklung und Freundliche Mitarbeiter an der Rezeption

title: Tip top
positive_comment: Sauber, geräumig, grosse Dusche, schöne Bar im Erdgeschoss, sehr freundliches Personal
Vicino al centro e a due passi dal Stanthalle Messeplatz Graz. Ottimo ambiente
negative_comment: Il parcheggio per l’auto. Un costo eccessivo per essere all’esterno ( custodito con le sbarre).

title: Ottima posizione ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo
positive_comment:
Posizione ideale per raggiungere facilmente il centro città e a sua volta anche l'accesso rapido alle autostrade.
Struttura curata, camere silenziose, ottima colazione di qualità.

title: Ottima struttura!
positive_comment: Albergo comodissimo a 20 minuti a piedi dal centro, camere molto silenziose anche se affacciate su una strada trafficata, materassi perfetti. In generale davvero una bella struttura. Prezzo molto vantaggioso per i servizi offerti.
negative_comment: Forse metterei una porta che separi la camera dalla doccia e migliorerei la parte dolce della colazione.

title: Eccellente  da ripetere
positive_comment: Personale simpatico ,cordiale e molto disponibile, tutti ed in particolare Manuel, la struttura abbastanza vicina al centro - anche a piedi - e servita bene dal trasporto pubblico , per chi arriva in auto c'è a disposizione anche il parcheggio.
negative_comment: Forse la vicinanza della ferrovia anche se il passaggio dei treni è rado e non rumoroso

title: Ottimo hotel completo di tutti i servizi e confort
positive_comment: Hotel ben posizionato per spostamenti con mezzi e auto. Hotel moderno, ben pulito e ben tenuto. Ottima colazione. Prodotti da bagno presenti: shampo, sapone, conditioner
negative_comment: Aggiungerei kit da bagno completo

positive_comment: Ein großartiges Buffet, sowohl in der früh als auch am Abend

positive_comment: Sehr, sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit sind die Mitarbeiter des Hotels; das Zimmer hat eine angenehme Größe, also perfekt für einen Städtetrip; das Hotel befindet sich in bester Lage am Lendplatz mit Zugang zur Garage, somit liegt einem das Zentrum zu Füßen. Top!

Personal war besonders nett und hat sich wirklich sehr um unsere veganen Wünsche gekümmert. 
Auch sonst war alles ok
negative_comment:

Unter den Betten der Kinder hat es auch nicht so toll ausgesehen.
Sonst aber alles gut

title: Gutes Hotel. Empfehlenswert!

negative_comment: Die Handtücher hätten besser sein können.

positive_comment: Überaus nettes Personal, sehr gute Lage, schöne Zimmer.
negative_comment: Nichts

Zimmer top !
Nice hotel with beautiful nature around. Super dog-friendly, very clean. Both breakfast and dinner were tasty, the selection of food was wide. I truly recommend.

title: Erholung für Geist und Seele
positive_comment: Sehr schönes Hotel in toller Lage. Gerade für Familien mit Kindern super geeignet.
negative_comment: Es ist sehr bedauerlich, dass das Hotel schließt. Vielleicht sollte dieser Gedanke noch einmal gründlich überdacht werden.

title: Alles sehr angenehm und durchaus eine Empfehlung.
positive_comment: Es war ein später Ckeckin möglich (mit einer Schlüsselbox), das Zimmer war sauber und schön warm, die Betten bequem. Obwohl wir am nächten Morgen die letzten Gäste am Frühstückbuffet waren, und die Zeit eigentlich schon fast vorbei war, war alles da und wir wurden gefragt ob wir noch eine frische Eierspeise wünschen und ob sie uns noch etwas bringen könnten :) die Auswahl war reichlich, frisch und schmackhaft.

title: Convenient hotel near old town with parking attached
positive_comment:
Excellent location to explore the city centre
Quiet location with many eateries nearby
Big room
Newly renovated bathroom 
Carpark has direct access to the hotel
negative_comment: The hotel should have told us that the entrance to the car park would be blocked by the Grazathon event on the day of our check-in. We couldn't access the car park when we arrived. Luckily, we found street parking not too far away.

positive_comment: Great hotel! Clean, delicious breakfast, great spa, very friendly and professional staff who make you feel at home.
Everything was on site for a hugely relaxing stay, the rooms were spacious, it was quiet and the reception and breakfast staff were lovely. The pools were fab.
People from the reception were really helpful and gave me tips to find good places for hiking.

title: Spa destination in wonderful mountain scenery
positive_comment:
Ease of parking 
Large rooms with balconies 
Fabulous spa swim complex 
Excellent gym
negative_comment:
Dinner options a la carte were poor 
We had booked two rooms and ended up in separate buildings

Coming back every year! Spa area, the hotel rooms and breakfast are just WOW

Wi-Fi was not working on my old phone, but it was working on the new mobile. I wanted to heat the bathroom and though the heating did not work, the personnel did not know what to do, then my boyfriend realised that the heater was working but only if the thermometer was on. I would recommend the manager to explain these things to the personnel, so that they can help the guests

La très grande taille du studio réservé
Le petit-déjeuner varié
Les nombreux équipements présents dans le studio 
Le parking extérieur gratuit
La présence d'un spa
negative_comment: Le fait que le parking intérieur soit payant

positive_comment:

La petite terrasse était fort appréciable.
negative_comment: Le lit d'appoint n'était pas adapté.  Il était très raide et sans matelas.

title: Bon choix pour Graz si vous êtes en voiture

negative_comment: Pas de porte pour la salle de bains - parking gratuit mais trop petit ( pas toujours de la place)

title: Un séjour parfait

negative_comment: Peut être la disposition de shampooing voir même après-shampoing en plus d’un gel douche qui fait corp et cheveu c’est toujours plus appréciable pour les filles. Notre douche s’écoulait aussi mal le premier soir peut être un début de bouchage …

positive_comment:
L emplacement n est pas exceptionnel, cependant l hôtel est proche de sentiers de randonnées et surtout d une piscine extérieure formidable...peut être un peu chère mais très agréable avec un bassin de 120m. Sinon dans l hôtel même il y a une petite piscine.
Le personnel est très agréable. En 15 mn vous êtes au centre de Graz avec le bus juste devant l hôtel.
negative_comment:
Pas de chaînes satellites comme indiquées... 
Tapis roulant salle de sport ne fonctionne pas..
Pas de climatisation.
Pas d eau fraîche.

positive_comment:

Très bon restaurant avec magnifique terrasse à proximité (Südhaus).
negative_comment: Rien

positive_comment:
Magnifique aménagement intérieur et extérieur
Personnel très charmant et attentionné

Sauna/piscine/infrarouge au top 👌
Tout était parfait

negative_comment: Tout était parfait  rien a changé

title: Außergewöhnlich nette Gastgeber und super Essen
positive_comment: Außergewöhnlich nette und hilfsbereite Gastgeber. Geniales Buffet am Abend - das beste, was ich je gegessen habe.

Zimmer war gut ,
Ohne Frühstück.
Abends kann man leckeres Asia büffet essen (60€ für 2 pers)

negative_comment: Se nos asignó por error una habitación doble pero preparada para un único huésped. Tuvimos que solicitar toallas y edredón para el segundo. Pero nos atendieron de inmediato

positive_comment: Ubicacion excelente, en el mismo centro de Graz y con acceso a paradas de metro y autobus. Camas comodas, mucho silencio en la habitacion
negative_comment: Desayuno con poca variedad

positive_comment: Excelente hotel. Muy buena ubicacion. Personal miy agradable

title: Me encanta
positive_comment: Me encanta este hotel, relación precio calidad excelente. Muy buen desayuno a pago y bar. La cama increible
negative_comment: Nada

positive_comment: La ubicación es muy buena, la habitación limpia y el personal amable. La experiencia ha sido muy buena. La cama ha sido muy cómoda y el mobiliario es muy moderno. La habitación es céntrica pero está bien insonorizada.
negative_comment: La habitación es bastante cara, podría incluir el desayuno por ese precio. Por mejorar aún más el servicio (ya que pagué bastante), podría tener accesorios de baño (pasta de dientes, cepillo de dientes y peine), ya que viajando por negocios y en avión con maleta de mano, esos utensilios no los traemos.

title: Repetiría sin problema.
positive_comment: Diseño, ubicación y limpieza. La calefacción de la habitación es insonora.
negative_comment: El edredón. Cama doble pero como sólo dormía una persona pusieron 1 solo nórdico (de los estrechos y cortos). No me gustan nada, pero eso es cosa mía. Se oye el tranvía pero no molesta y creo que a una cierta hora (alrededor de las 12), deja de funcionar.

title: Recomendable 100%
positive_comment: Limpio y comodo. Muy bien ubicado, cerca del centro caminando y con todos los transportes en la puerta.

title: Más que apanado
positive_comment: Lo mejor de todo, la limpieza de las habitaciones, el servicio de bar 24 horas y la amabilidad de todo el personal con el que pude tratar.
negative_comment: El desayuno escaso, y si bien el expresso de la cafetería estaba rico, la máquina de café del desayuno era bastante mediocre.

title: Great Hotel with a very high standard
positive_comment: Location was perfect, parking is quite easy in the closest parking house.

positive_comment:
La posizione in pieno centro.
Camere piccole ma accoglienti.
negative_comment: Niente

negative_comment: nulla

positive_comment: posizione ottima in centro, personale giovane. letti comodi , buona pulizia
negative_comment: il personale non mi ha consigliato bene sul posto dove andare a mangiare  werzl heinstube non andateci

title: Piacevole e accogliente!

title: Atmosfere natalizie a Graz
positive_comment:
La posizione centralissima e comoda per muoversi agevolmente anche a piedi. 
L’ordine e la estrema pulizia degli ambienti molto colorati e confortevoli. Ottima ed abbondante la colazione con prodotti vari e di qualità. Camera un po’ piccole ma comunque dotata di tutto il necessario per soggiorni brevi. Molto apprezzato  il servizio di custodia gratuito dei bagagli sia in entrata che in uscita.
negative_comment:
La vicina fermata del tram cittadino può dare un po’ di fastidio a chi ha il sonno leggero soprattutto nelle prime ore del mattino. Comunque è un piccolo dettaglio. 
Il vicinissimo parcheggio (Opera) per quanto  convenzionato con l’hotel e pagabile comodamente e direttamente alla reception  con un cospicuo risparmio, rimane  comunque abbastanza caro. (26 euro a notte).

positive_comment: Struttura in posizione centrale, pulita e molto ben curata. Personale cortese e disponibile.

title: Andate in questo hotel!
positive_comment: Fantastico hotel, perfetto per visitare Graz a piedi. Posizione centrale e strategica, con parcheggio convenzionato a soli due minuti di distanza. La nostra camera, con doppio affaccio sulla piazza, era davvero bellissima e molto confortevole. Colazione ottima, varia e di qualità. Un soggiorno che consiglio assolutamente.

title: Abbiamo trascorso una notte sola e come appoggio MO è sempre una garanzia per il rapporto qualità prezzo. Zone comuni se
positive_comment: Posizione strategica. Zone comuni arredate alla perfezione, camere con tutto ciò che serve.
negative_comment: Bagno piccolino

positive_comment: Hotel ben posizionato in zona centrale, staff cortese e disponibile. Camera non molto grande ma pulita. Colazione a buffet molto varia e con prodotti buoni.

title: amazing and comfy
positive_comment: great location, well equipped cottage, amazing water pressure, comfortable bed, parking, sauna
negative_comment: no complaints, I personally only missed my tea kettle that allows me to select temperature and a kitchen scale, but the kitchen does have all you could need for your stay!

title: Great value with superior service

positive_comment: Das extrem große vegane Angebot beim Frühstücksbuffet war außergewöhnlich, sogar eine extra Kaffeemaschine mit Hafermilch war vorhanden. Lage super um alle Sehenswürdigkeiten gut zu Fuß zu erreichen und abends auch noch eins trinken gehen zu können.
Die Bar, das bequeme Bett, freundliches Personal, gute Lage
negative_comment: Das Frühstück war

We stayed in room 205 and the neighbors next door woke us up everyday at 5am (you can hear everything, from flushing toilet, showering, slamming doors, walking, talking) which is not something you would want when on vacation. The rooms were recently renovated, sadly they didnt think about putting some extra sound isolation for more comfort.

title: Fantastic location, great view, just as in a picture book!

The daily surcharge for a dog is hillarous, we have never paid 25€/day in Austria.

title: We enjoyed our stay, good value for money.
positive_comment: Spa area with great views, two saunas, infrared sauna and steam bath, great selection at breakfast, very good dinner menus. Staff was very helpful. Great location just next to ski slope. Stayed in the jagd house hotel room.
negative_comment: Mattresses were for us too hard. Village could be hardly accessible if there is a lot of snow, but was not our case.

positive_comment: Stunning surroundings and location. You wake up in the clouds every day and open the door to a National Geographic image.

title: Highly recommended hotel!
positive_comment: Nice room with amazing view, helpful and kind staff, excellent kitchen

title: Amazing place
positive_comment: Amazing place with lovely staff. Food was great in the restaurant. Lots of things to do in the area, hiking and walking routes are great.

title: Great spot for alpine family holiday.
positive_comment: Fantastic views, very nice and convenient houses / chalets, great restaurant on site with views, plenty of hiking available around, convenient parking / getting around, swimming lake in Pichls like 10 min drive away, tons of activities to explore with the regional „sommercard” included for all guests - fantastic place for wider family holiday. View of Dachstein is one of a kind.
negative_comment: We’d expect a bit more of regular servicing, cleaning and waste removal through out our multiweek stay but staff was attentive and responsive when we beeded something.

positive_comment:
Grösse des Zimmers.
Reichhaltiges Frühstücks Buffet.

Gute Desserts.
negative_comment: Hauptgang Nachtessen war vom Menü her etwas speziell.

Er geen koffie/ thee en shampoo beschikbaar is en de minibar niet koelt.

positive_comment:
Een dikke 8 voor dit echte oostenrijkse hotel! Eten van topkwaliteit. Aardige bediening. 
Terras op het zuiden en zeer grote comfortabele  kamers. 
Eigenaar verstaat zijn vak. Niet te erg op de voorgrond, maar gewoon goed en behulpzaam. 
Piste naast de deur met sleeplift is een goede opstapplek om naar de andere gebieden te komen. Busverbinding om de deelgebieden te verbinden werkt prima.
Einde middag de welness ook dik in orde. 
Heerlijke dagen gehad!
negative_comment: Geen bruisende entertainment in de avond. Maar dat wisten we!

positive_comment:
Prima Frühstücksbuffet, sehr netter servive, sehr geräumige Zimmer mit großem Balkon.
Gerne Wieder

negative_comment: Niks

positive_comment: Door eerdere recensies voorbereid op een wat verouderd hotel maar viel erg mee! De familiekamers waren groot, alles was zeer schoon en goed onderhouden! Heerlijk eten en top locatie aan de piste.
negative_comment: Slechte wifi

De vriendelijkheid van het personeel, de grote kamers, het ontbijt en diner zijn prima!

negative_comment:

title: Nice stay, good place, but no AC!
positive_comment: Its nice villa / hotel, made in good, mountain style with lots of wooden elements. For sure some architect helped them with this job. The stuff is nice. There is a room for skies/bikes, pity that’s outside. Great sauna, I really liked it, but it’s mostly open when no one is in the hotel, I guess it’s possible to make it a bit more digitally connected and then switch it off online or when the restaurant is closed - instead of 19:30, 22 or at least 21:30. The room is spacious and well equipped. Delicious breakfasts. Location is perfect, the room is quiet, but with open windows you will listen to church’s bell every morning.
negative_comment: There is no AC and it was just very hot in the room. The is a machine for a coffee but not the kettle for a tea. The room is spacious, but bathrooms are extremely small. I would like to have more hot options of food for the breakfast.

Es gibt auch frische Vollmilch und nicht nur Haltbarmilch (wie so oft). Herrliche Kojen im Wellnessbereich. Werde definitiv wiederkommen.
negative_comment:
Mini-Wermutstropfen: Die Sauna heizt nur auf ca 75°. Aber dann muss man eben länger drin bleiben.

Das Frühstück war supersupergut, mehrere Brotsorten, Entsafter (siehe oben). Wenn man auf allerhöchsten Niveau jammern will, könnte man sich noch Bio-Wurst wünschen, aber dann reden wir über mind. den 3-fachen Preis von dem, was ich bezahlt habe.

positive_comment: Ein kleines aber feines Hotel; Frühstück super lecker mit sehr großer Auswahl;; Lage zentrumsnah; Personal wirklich sehr freundlich!

title: Stadtvilla Schladming, jederzeit wieder!
