negative_comment: Not much to mention here, maybe just difficulty to dry wet clothes/towels/bathrobes in the room, but it is minor issue.

title: Beautiful and welcoming hotel in green surroundings.
positive_comment:
This was our second stay here. The first time, we booked because it was reasonably priced and had a pool and sauna. This time we went back because we love it. It's beautifully decorated and the room was pristine. The pool is great, as is the sauna. 
The location is a little out of town but just one bus to the centre. It's beside a huge outdoor swimming pond and also you can walk up into the hills right from the hotel and see amazing views. 
Everyone at the front desk was incredibly helpful and the breakfast staff are very kind too. The breakfast has been so good too. They have nice herbal tea which is the thing that some hotels don't really bother about. You can try local dishes and local pumpkin seed oil.
Both times I've stayed I've had something disastrous happen (like the airline losing my luggage) and both times the hotel front desk staff have been incredibly helpful and reassuring.
negative_comment: I love everything. I would say double check the location and plan a route to your workplace if need be, such as the bus. But even the flixbus station is pretty close.

title: An excellent choice for living in Graz if you don't need to live in the center.
positive_comment: Nice medium-sized - rather smaller hotel - has a family feel. It is located on the outskirts of Graz, close to the motorway exits, but in a quiet area. Ideal for motorists, parking right in front of the hotel or in the garage. Nice receptionist, excellent breakfast and comfortable room. The hotel also offers a swimming pool. The hotel has a pleasant seating area - bar.
negative_comment: It's a shame that the hotel doesn't have a restaurant for lunch or dinner. But I expected that. And a small thing: the shower was a bit simple and small.

positive_comment: The stuff was very kind and helpful. Clean rooms and spa area. Good breakfast.
Great facilities, cleanliness, staff and value for the money.
negative_comment: Nothing that I can think of at this time.

The rooms were recently renovated, sadly they didnt think about putting some extra sound isolation for more comfort.

title: A truly wonderful stay at the castle <3
positive_comment:
The stunning castle, picturesque surroundings, excellent accommodations, and incredible historical ambience provide a truly remarkable experience. I extend my highest recommendation <3 

IMPORTANT CLARIFICATION – THIS IS NOT A DEFECT

I wish to inform anyone that air conditioning is not a standard feature in every room in the castle. 
In the main castle structure, air conditioning is exclusively available in the LOFT room (the other rooms in the castle are without air conditioning). 
Nevertheless, a separate building located immediately adjacent to the castle offers air conditioning in all its rooms.

positive_comment: Lokalita přímo na sjezdovce, výborné jídlo, čisté pokoje, možnost koupě skipasu na recepci za levnější cenu.
negative_comment: Hodilo by se mít v koupelně sprchový gel, bylo k dispozici jen tuhé mýdlo. A sauna byla mimo provoz, jinak vše v pořádku.

title: Horský hotel přímo u sjezdovek Tauplitz
positive_comment: Skvělá lokalita přímo u stanice lanovky. Přímo u sjezdovek z lyžárny, před kterou obujete lyže přímo jedete lyžovat. Perfektní kuchyně snídaně i bohaté večeře a vstřícný milý, ochotný personál. Dobře organizovaná doprava z parkoviště sněžnými skůtry.
negative_comment: Prozvučnost pokojů - vše je mezi pokoji slyšet... Pokojíky skromné vč.vybavení, malinké, ale když člověk jede lyžovat a není neskromný, tak dostačujicí. Škoda, že nefungovala sauna, ale to se může stát.

title: Perfekte Übernachtungsmöglichkeit für Wanderer auf der Tauplitz
positive_comment: wir waren wegen der 6 Seenwanderung auf der Tauplitz - es hat alles sehr gut gepasst, wir waren zufrieden.

title: A bútorok lecserélésével a szállás szinvonala jelentősen emelhető lenne.
positive_comment: Rendkívül udvarias kiszolgálás, minden igényt kielégítő félpanziós ellátás.
negative_comment: A szobában a bútorok állapota.

positive_comment: Personal war sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Lage war super zimmer waren für 2 Personen mit Hund ausreichend groß. Frühstücksbuffet war auch sehr vielfältig wobei ich mir gewünscht hätte das der kakao heiß ist und es weich gekochte Eier gegeben hätte .
negative_comment:
Leider waren die Zimmer sehr hellhörig und man hatte jedes Wort vom Nachbarn verstanden. Bis 0.00 Uhr war es teilweise sehr laut. 
Das Schnitzel war leider nicht sehr gut da es fertig Produkte waren, selbst der Hund bekam Durchfall davon. Das Rührei war auch ein Fertigprodukt und nicht sehr gut.

positive_comment: Sehr nettes Personal, sehr gutes Frühstück (bis auf den Kaffee), super Lage
negative_comment: Leider war die Installation der Brausetasse nicht durchdacht (Überschwemmung des Bades)

title: 10 out of 10
positive_comment: The whole apartment to every single detail is fantastic. It's located in the beautiful compound, with a restaurant, an apres ski bar, a garage, etc. Every apartment is ski-in and ski-out, right next to the slope. Everything just perfect.

title: amazing and comfy
positive_comment: great location, well equipped cottage, amazing water pressure, comfortable bed, parking, sauna
negative_comment: no complaints, I personally only missed my tea kettle that allows me to select temperature and a kitchen scale, but the kitchen does have all you could need for your stay!

title: Very pleasant stay with the Dachstein as backdrop
positive_comment:
We were renting a whole house. Nice surroundings, great view towards the Dachstein group. 
Good amount of parking lots, possibility to charge e-cars (only AC).
negative_comment: We had a nice time, nothing to put here.

title: Nice weekend gateaway in a nice location, good food
positive_comment: Nice location, clean hotel, great food, good firm beds.
negative_comment: Soundproofing in the rooms at the hotel does not exist. We stayed in room 205 and the neighbors next door woke us up everyday at 5am (you can hear everything, from flushing toilet, showering, slamming doors, walking, talking) which is not something you would want when on vacation. The rooms were recently renovated, sadly they didnt think about putting some extra sound isolation for more comfort.

title: Fantastic location, great view, just as in a picture book!
positive_comment: Everything was beautiful and well kept, just as one expects it. The lobby and the restaurant are great looking, the houses are located on the slopes. The house was furnished with everything one needs, up to the last, smallest details.
negative_comment:
For such price the bedsheet and towels should be arranged and in the price included.
The daily surcharge for a dog is hillarous, we have never paid 25€/day in Austria.

title: We enjoyed our stay, good value for money.
positive_comment: Spa area with great views, two saunas, infrared sauna and steam bath, great selection at breakfast, very good dinner menus. Staff was very helpful. Great location just next to ski slope. Stayed in the jagd house hotel room.
negative_comment: Mattresses were for us too hard. Village could be hardly accessible if there is a lot of snow, but was not our case.

positive_comment: Stunning surroundings and location. You wake up in the clouds every day and open the door to a National Geographic image.

title: Highly recommended hotel!
positive_comment: Nice room with amazing view, helpful and kind staff, excellent kitchen

title: Amazing place
positive_comment: Amazing place with lovely staff. Food was great in the restaurant. Lots of things to do in the area, hiking and walking routes are great.
Nice and clean place with friendly staff. Highly recommended.
Excellent location and food. Sauna has been renovated and looks very good

title: An amazing hotel that we didn’t want to leave
positive_comment: Loved the location, view from the room and the pool. Excellent front desk staff.
negative_comment: We stayed on a very hot August day and our room did not properly cool down with the air conditioner. Everything else at the hotel is perfect.

positive_comment: The location is great and the views from the hotel absolutely gorgeous. The pool and breakfast set up are amazing as well.
negative_comment: Upon arrival, we were handed the key to our room, were not even taken to the room, asked whether we needed help with luggage or given any information about breakfast, wifi etc. We also found out upon arrival that the restaurant and spa were closed for the days we were there. Overall we felt like we were bothering when asking questions to the receptionist. Also a few extra sunbeds by the pool would've been nice to avoid having to lie on the floor. Finally the cleaning could have been done a bit more thoroughly. I did find the place gorgeous and the setting incredible, however the service did not live up to a 4* hotel in my opinion.

title: Bester Thermenurlaub in Bad Blumau!
positive_comment: Perfekter Ort zum Wohlfühlen, Entspannung pur, beste Therme  und Hotel Österreichs.
negative_comment: Alles perfekt!

positive_comment: Alles war außergewöhnlich ansprechend,  sauber und super erholsam. Wunderbares essen,  tolles Ambiente und Service

title: Es war ein wirklich sehr gelungener Mutter-Tochter-Trip! Wir kommen wieder. :-)
positive_comment:
Zur Verpflegung:
Wir hatten unseren Aufenthalt mit Halbpension gebucht. Das Frühstück bietet eine große Auswahl an frischen Speisen – Eier, Aufschnitt, Joghurt, Müsli etc. – und entspricht einem typisch erweiterten kontinentalen Frühstücksbuffet. Das Abendbuffet hat uns ebenfalls positiv überrascht, sowohl durch die vielfältigen Optionen als auch durch die hohe Qualität der Speisen.

Außerhalb der Halbpension haben wir täglich am Nachmittag in einem der À-la-carte-Restaurants der Therme einen kleinen Snack zu uns genommen. Sowohl qualitativ als auch preislich absolut top.

Zum Zimmer:
Wir hatten ein Doppelzimmer im Ziegelhaus. Es war sehr schön eingerichtet, bot ausreichend Platz – auch für längere Aufenthalte von mehr als vier Nächten – und war durchweg sehr sauber. Das Bett war angenehm fest, also weder übermäßig weich, wie man es manchmal in anderen Hotels erlebt, noch zu hart.
negative_comment:
Der Aufenthalt war insgesamt wirklich sehr gelungen – wir hätten lediglich zwei kleine Anmerkungen:

1. Das Rührei am Frühstücksbuffet wirkte eher wie aus Vollei zubereitet und war recht stark gegart. Dadurch hatte es eine sehr feste, fast polentaartige Konsistenz und wirkte optisch ungewöhnlich hell, zudem blieb es geschmacklich etwas hinter den Erwartungen zurück.

2. Die Dusche im Zimmer: Der Wasserdruck war in unserem Fall leider recht gering. Möglicherweise war das nur in unserem Zimmer so – wir haben es vor Ort nicht angesprochen, da es für uns kein großes Problem darstellte. In einem Thermenhotel wäre ein etwas stärkerer Wasserdruck dennoch wünschenswert, um das Duscherlebnis noch angenehmer zu machen.

positive_comment:
Wenigstens noch eine Hotel-/Therme wo das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis noch sehr gut passt.
Es war unser erster Wellness-Urlaub mit Baby (7 Monate alt). Das Personal war sehr zuvorkommend und nett, die Zimmer schön (und nicht eckig) und sauber, das Essen sehr gut (auch das vegane Menü). Es ist kein Wunsch offen geblieben.
negative_comment: Das einzige ist, dass man das Elektroauto laden könnte (was ja super ideal wäre), aber die Preise sind so horrend, dass man sich's anders überlegt.

positive_comment: Die Robert Rogner Bad Blumau ist einfach einzigartig,  für uns Höchstpunktezahl mal 3.
Die Therme ist Top...das Essen ist sensationell !!

Sehr reichhaltiges Frühstücksbuffet und Abendbuffet, es gab immer etwas ohne Gluten, tolle Anlage, alles bestens, man kann sich an der außergewöhnlichen und schönen Architektur in den Innenräumen wie auch von außen gar nicht satt sehen, abwechslungsreiche Angebote.

title: Schön und erholsam
positive_comment:
Personal im gesamten Bereich außergewöhnlich freundlich und zuvorkommend.
Frühstück dem Hotel angepasst gut, Abendessen war in Ordnung, Zimmer groß genug. Kaffee und Tee zum selber machen.
negative_comment: Keine Beanstandungen

title: Wir fühlten uns bei Ihnen sehr wohl, willkommen und konnten uns gut erholen!
positive_comment: -____Die konsequente ästhetische Gestaltung der Anlage, Frühstück super, tolle Geburtstagsüberraschung!
negative_comment: Nachtessen: Salatbuffet gut, Hauptgang eher zu deftig.

positive_comment: Liebevolle Gestaltung des Hotelbereichs, schöne Thermenlandschaft, interessante Führung durch das Areal.
negative_comment: Der Innenbereich der Therme ist sehr voll belegt. Die Betten stehen teilweise sehr knapp nebeneinander.

positive_comment: Un emplacement exceptionnel au milieu des vignes, belle piscine, restaurant très agréable avec un bon choix de vins, superbe petit déjeuner. Petite frayeur lorsque nous avons eu l'information d'une soirée de mariage, mais les chambres étant à l'écart, aucune gêne au final! Merci à toute l'équipe

This year we also had the dinner in the hotel's restaurant. It was a buffet with many delicious options.

title: Great stopover in Schladming
positive_comment:
Great town centre location in Schladming where there is many activities.
Helpful staff and very knowledgeable.
Good overnight stop and ample parking.
Lots of meal options and some are within walking distance into the centre.
This is a regular overnight stop for us as it's good value and convenient location for activities.

title: Gorgeous castle, beautiful rooms, amazing service
positive_comment: Amazingly beautiful castle build late 19th century. Each room is different. I stayed in the tower room where you have to climb steep stairs. My friend's room had a private chapel inside the room!! The service was so fantastic.

title: A special unique place to stay, highly recommend a stay in this lovely castle.
positive_comment: This was a special place to stay, the staff were friendly and helpful, we really enjoyed being shown around the castle by the lovely Slovenian lady at reception.  The courtyard for relaxing and dining was lovely, our room was excellent.
negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great experience in a castle! Beautiful view and kind staff! Had all rooms equipped with air conditioners, it would be perfect for a summer vacation!

title: Sembra di vivere dentro un'opera d'arte
positive_comment:
Posto meraviglioso
Architettura stupenda sembra di vivere dentro un'opera d'arte
Buffet molto vario e ottimo
Personalw molti cortrse
La cura di ogni piu' piccolo particolare, la grande pulizia e la qualita' del cibo assolutamente eccellente. Un eccellenza veramente rara da trovare, complimenti!!!
negative_comment: Ci e' piaciuto tutto

title: Unicità sotto ogni aspetto.
positive_comment: È la quarta volta che torno. Mi sembra di vivere nelle favole architettonicamente parlando. L'acqua delle piscine è calda, l'ambiente è caldo e accogliente. Magari potrebbero incrementare le sedute aromatiche in sauna. Mancano brochure e menù in italiano (apparsi questi ultimi l'ultima cena) per cui abbiamo usato spesso lens. Ma è tutto talmente bello ed il cibo talmente buono che va bene anche così.

title: Un luogo rigenerante!!!!
positive_comment: La struttura è unica. In un ambiente lussureggiate. Una architettura armoniosa. Ci si sente come a casa propria.
negative_comment: In verità l unico miglioramento possibile sarebbe il bidet nelle stanze. Ma, All estero è piuttosto raro.

positive_comment: Hanno prestato ommediata attenzione quando ho detto çhe era il compleanmo
negative_comment: Un po' affollato anche in bassa stagione e giorni lavorativi

positive_comment: La locazione e l’architettura della struttura sono favolose! Il posto è accogliente, pulito, rilassante. Si dorme magnificamente.  Buona la colazione e la cena con prodotti e piatti tipici
negative_comment: Ho sempre parlato molto bene della struttura ma quest’anno devo fare un paio di critiche: 1) durante la cena le bevande arrivano con troppo ritardo 2) non ho apprezzato il fatto che la tv non sia in grado di trasmettere un solo canale italiano

title: Bello, rilassante, ottime anche le attività‘ offerte
positive_comment: Bella struttura ben organizzata, cucina distinta, personale molto gentile e disponibile.
negative_comment: La tv non trasmette canali italiani.

positive_comment: L'architettura, l'area Vulkania, la colazione, la pulizia generale, la gentilezza del personale.
negative_comment: Niente

title: il TOP delle terme, originalissimo, pulitissimo ... i posti del cuore
positive_comment: Sempre il TOP delle terme. E' un posto fantastico, rilassante, rigenerante, pulitissimo, originalissimo ... insomma quando penso ad un posto alla terme non può essere che questo. E' la terza volta che ci vengo a distanza di 15 anni ed è sempre tenuto alla perfezione. Sicuramente non sarà l'ultima. Questa volta è stata una tappa in bici del Weinland Steiermark Radtour.
Apprezzabile la libera fruizione di tutti i servizi con un unico badge fornito al momento del check in. Ottima la vasca esterna per il.nuoto libero.

Die nähe zum lift, personal unvorstellbar freundlich, freundlicher Empfang beim Ankommen, freundliche Bedienung u zuvorkommend. Alles wurde genauestens erklärt. Sehr sehr gutes Frühstück und perfektes Abendbuffet. Kommen auf jeden Fall wieder

title: War ein paar schöne Schitage, in perfekter Lage.
positive_comment:
Das Frühstück und das Abendessen war ausreichend und gut.
Die Lage zu Lift ist perfekt. Das Zimmer war sauber und die Größe optimal.
negative_comment: war alles gut

positive_comment: sehr gepflegtes 3 Sterne Hotel. direkt an der Piste.

Ungarisch kein Problem.
ist halt doch Urlaub in Österreich.

title: Ausgezeichnete Lage beim Lift, für eine 3-Sterne Unterkunft o.k. aber etwas zu teuer!
positive_comment: Die Lage des Kellerschlössels ist direkt an der Talstation, Parkplätze für die Gäste sind vorhanden, ebenso ein Raum für die Schi und die Schischuhe (beheizt), 2 Saunen kostenlos zu benützen. Ausstattung für ein 3-Stern-Hotel ist in Ordnung. Frühstück und Abendessen in reicher Auswahl vorhanden
negative_comment: Müsli beim Frühstück fehlt, Fernsehkanäle größtenteils nur in ungarischer Sprache (wohl wegen der vielen ungarischen Gäste am Kreischberg ...) - kein ORF Programm und auch kein Servus-Kanal.

title: Beste Lage zur Talstation, Unterkunft empfehlenswert
positive_comment: HP: Frühstück war sehr gut und vielfältig. Abendessen mit 2 versch. Suppen, 3 Hauptspeisen inkl. salat und als Nachspeise versch. Desserts

Die Lage ist einzigartig.

Frühstück ist vielfältig und ausreichend.

title: Absolutely fabulous, a real ski hotel next to the valley station (and the apres ski) of Kreischberg
positive_comment: The Gasthof is clean, the room was also very neat. Both the breakfast and the dinner was very delicious and the menu selection was divers. On of us has gluten intolerancy, it was handled in minutes and we got gluten free bread freshly baked!

The location is excellent, next to the lift and bars.
Good breakfast and dinner, kind staff.

We really liked the food, both breakfasts and dinners offered wide variety of food selection of really good quality. Dinners were truly delicious. Rooms are spacious enough with sufficient storage space even in the bathroom.

title: eccellente sotto tutti i profili

Sorprendente l'automazione del check-in notturno e soprattutto l'assistenza telefonica per il completamento delle operazioni. Gentilissimo l'operatore, molto disponibile. Pulizia curatissima. mobili essenziali e pratici. Di ottima qualità i dettagli nella stanza. Accoglienti e caldi i colori. Interessante e molto fornito il negozio Spar, accessibile dal locale ristorante.

title: Zwei Erwachsene eine Hündin und ein wunderschönes Wochenende im Jaglhof!
positive_comment:
Wunderschöne Lage
Großzügiges Zimmer mit Balkon und wundervoller Aussicht
Riesiges Badezimmer mit Badewanne
Und auch die Terrasse im Restaurant war umwerfend

title: Fahren bestimmt wieder hin!!
positive_comment: Alles wunderbar!! Neue sehr stilsichere Unterkunft, sehr schöner Frühstücksraum, wunderbares Frühstück! Sauna, Pool, alles da! Zimmer mit Balkon und toller Aussicht.

title: Lieu idéal pour se détendre (mais onéreux).
positive_comment:
Nous sommes enchantés de notre séjour à Bad Blumau. Ce lieu permet de se détendre totalement.
Le service est soigné tout au long du séjour : tout le personnel est très aimable; boisson offerte à l'arrivée et au départ; nourriture diversifiée et bien cuisinée au buffet; matériels prévus pour profiter des bassins (casiers, peignoirs, transats, parasols, etc).
Le cadre de verdure et les 11 bassins sont très apaisants. Les lieux sont suffisamment grands pour que nous ne soyons pas les uns sur les autres.
negative_comment: Dommage qu'en dehors du service de base (c'est à dire: baignade et transat classique): tout soit payant.

title: Une immersion cajolant corps et esprit dans une fantaisie de Hundertwasser
positive_comment: Un ensemble architectural exceptionnel jusqu’au moindre détail, un éventail de services impressionnant et une philosophie inédite de l’hôtellerie de bien-être, ciblant les cinq cens et l’esprit
negative_comment: Prix relativement élevés… mais bien compréhensibles en vue de la qualité

title: Volcanic thermal spa in magical place
positive_comment: The volcanic thermal springs are heaven! I arrived in Feb when the hotel area was covered with snow and it was a bliss to enjoy the thermal water and water jets surrounded by nature and with fire place adding the magical atmosphere. I really enjoyed organic food, huge variety and excellent service. The room was spacious and clean and the atmosphere in the spa area very relaxed. I recharged my batteries and planning the next trip soon!
negative_comment: Nothing - it was amazing.

positive_comment: The hotel is on a frequented place, well inside the town. Parking spots are nerby, as well as some restaurants and shops. Very nice, kind staff. Comfy, cosy rooms. The included breakfast is a huge plus, a lot of options to chose from. Recommended hotel.
Room nice and big, cleanliness on one star :-), breakfast totally awesome + terrace with mountain view as a bonus.

positive_comment: It was perfect. I like this place and the breakfast was amazing. Thank you 😊

title: Excellent place of a short stopover
positive_comment: Located right in the city center on the 4th (and uppermost) floor of a commercial building (with some shops and offices on other floors) this a rather small hotel with very friendly and helpfull staff and offering a decent morning breakfast buffet. Excellent place for one night stopover. Street parking in front of the hotel is paid from 8:30 am till cca 5 pm (not sure now), but the parking rate is low (20 cents for 30 minutes and first 15 minutes is free of charge).
negative_comment: Wooden furniture and interior in general is a bit outdated and require a renovation. If this is done, our rating would be 9 instead of 8. Ich war auf der Durchreise übers Wochenende da. Das Zimmer war großzügig, sauber und optisch sehr schön. Das Bett war sehr bequem. Am Sonntag wollte ich nachmittags in die Sauna, Personal ist dann keines da, aber ich konnte mich per SMS melden und bescheid sagen, dann wurde die Sauna eingeschaltet. War perfekt, außer mir hatte anscheinend keiner das Verlangen und deswegen war ich alleine drin. Das Frühstück am Sonntag war toll mit einer großen Auswahl, am Montag war es deutlich weniger aber dennoch von guter Qualität und reichlich. Das Personal im Restaurant war sehr nett.

positive_comment: HI-5 Hotel e un posto facile da trovare, in poca distanza dal autostrada per chi si ferma durante il viaggio. Appartamento pulito, letti comodi, bagnio grande. la colazione abbondante con tanta scelta di prodotti, staff gentilissimo. La comunicazione immediata e molto cordiale. Ritornerò sicuramente!!!

negative_comment: Purtroppo ci hanno dato fastidio le coperte (troppo pesanti) e la secchezza dell'aria in camera

title: Bell'albergo
positive_comment: Abbiamo prenotato una camera matrimoniale con accesso ai disabili (unica disponibile per ospitare 3 persone), spaziosa, pulita e letti comodi. Colazione eccellente, ben fornita e parcheggio comodo vicino all'autostrada.
negative_comment: Il bagno dopo la doccia si è allagato facendo arrivare l'acqua fino alla porta in quanto la doccia è sprovvista di tenda o vetro doccia a scorrimento. Mancava anche il sapone.

title: Hotel consigliato
positive_comment: Hotel perfetto, ottima posizione, camere comode e confortevoli, personale disponibile, pratico il parcheggio privato, colazione ottima.

La pulizia, la cortesia,  la colazione e la comodità di avere un distributore di carburante e piccolo minimarket adiacenti. 
Accettano cani.

Premesso che eravamo solo di passaggio, hotel nuovissimo, pulito, spazioso e ben arredato, se arrivate oltre l'orario di chiusura dopo le 18,30 hanno le cassettine fuori dove lasciano le tesserine per accedere, buona la colazione unica pecca è che il ristorante non funzionava, comunque hanno una lista di ristoranti nelle vicinanze che consigliano, c'è un bar, un piccolo supermercato con stazione di servizio, a 500 mt c'è un buon ristorante "Kupferdachl"

title: Ci ritornerò!! Bravi
positive_comment: Pulizia, accoglienza e attenzione ai dettagli sono le cose che ci sono piaciute di più
negative_comment: Nulla da rilevare

title: Mi sono trovato così bene, che dopo 2 settimane ( passando di li)  mi sono fermato nuovamente AAA+++
positive_comment: Soprattutto il personale educato e molto disponibile,  la colazione è davvero stupefacente.
negative_comment: L'orario serale di ricevimento degli ospiti. Dopo le 19 non c'è più nessuno.

title: A truly wonderful stay at the castle <3
positive_comment:
The stunning castle, picturesque surroundings, excellent accommodations, and incredible historical ambience provide a truly remarkable experience. I extend my highest recommendation <3 

IMPORTANT CLARIFICATION – THIS IS NOT A DEFECT

I wish to inform anyone that air conditioning is not a standard feature in every room in the castle. 
In the main castle structure, air conditioning is exclusively available in the LOFT room (the other rooms in the castle are without air conditioning). 
Nevertheless, a separate building located immediately adjacent to the castle offers air conditioning in all its rooms.

title: Gorgeous castle, beautiful rooms, amazing service
positive_comment: Amazingly beautiful castle build late 19th century. Each room is different. I stayed in the tower room where you have to climb steep stairs. My friend's room had a private chapel inside the room!! The service was so fantastic.

title: A special unique place to stay, highly recommend a stay in this lovely castle.
positive_comment: This was a special place to stay, the staff were friendly and helpful, we really enjoyed being shown around the castle by the lovely Slovenian lady at reception.  The courtyard for relaxing and dining was lovely, our room was excellent.
negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great experience in a castle! Beautiful view and kind staff! Had all rooms equipped with air conditioners, it would be perfect for a summer vacation!
This s place has amazing atmosphere that makes me come back. It’s an unexplainable magic

Great view

positive_comment: Located right in the city center on the 4th (and uppermost) floor of a commercial building (with some shops and offices on other floors) this a rather small hotel with very friendly and helpfull staff and offering a decent morning breakfast buffet. Excellent place for one night stopover. Street parking in front of the hotel is paid from 8:30 am till cca 5 pm (not sure now), but the parking rate is low (20 cents for 30 minutes and first 15 minutes is free of charge).
negative_comment: Wooden furniture and interior in general is a bit outdated and require a renovation. If this is done, our rating would be 9 instead of 8. Aussicht auf die Dächer Judenburgs. Wir können das Hotel sehr empfehlen und werden beim nächsten Stopp wieder hier übernachten.

Würstelbude vorm Haus, Geruch von der im Öl gebratenen Panier vorm Eingang

title: Sehr gelungen, jederzeit wieder.

Ausgiebiges Frühstück, große Auswahl, nette Saunalandschaft
negative_comment: Zimmer ziemlich klein

positive_comment: Lage zum Lift, Frühstück und Abendesse reichlich und gut

negative_comment: Hellhörig und Zimmer etwas in die Jahre gekommen

negative_comment: Preis-/Leistung: Dreibett-Zimmer mit spartanischer Ausstattung zu einem relativ hohen Preis.

positive_comment: colazione ricchissima e di alta qualità. adatta soprattutto a chi ama il salato. Con tantissime proposte tra affettati, formaggi, pane di molti tipi, frutta e verdura. mancano le bevande italiane come cappuccino ed esprresso che sono da pagare extra.

Good breakfast
Standard JUFA
Good position in winter

positive_comment:

I will definitely choose this hotel for my next archery trip there too.

title: Quartier war mir bekannt, deshalb auch wieder gekommen.
positive_comment: Gesamt gesehen vor Ort sehr zufrieden, Zimmer eher sehr klein und wenig zum Trocknen, das war mir aber schon bekannt.
negative_comment: Es ist nahezu unmöglich telefonisch Kontakt aufzunehmen, mit Menschen sprechen war nicht möglich, nur Anhörung von langen Informationen, die aber bei konkreten Fragen eher lästig sind.

title: Für Kinder super!
positive_comment:
Lage top!! Spielbereich, Turnsaal für Kinder super!
Grosszügig bemessene und tolle Allgemeinflächen im und rund um das Hotel.
Wenn man will, kann man zB im oberen Aufenthaltsbereich auch sehr leicht neue Kontakte knüfen.
Für Eltern mit Kindern geht's kaum besser, da es den Kindern viel Autonomie ermöglicht.
negative_comment:
Die Zimmergrösse für 4 Personen mit Winterkleidung ist tatsächlich eng bemessen, dafür ist der Preis zu hoch.
Man hat kaum Platz etwas abzulegen, kann sich dann im Zimmer kaum rühren.
Das Abendessen hat nicht ganz überzeugt.

title: Ein sehr gutgeführtes Haus mit sehr freundlichen Personal.
positive_comment: Das Personal war sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Trotz der Hauptsaison fühlten wir uns als willkommene Gäste.
negative_comment: Kein Kasten im Zimmer, dafür offene Ablageflächen.

positive_comment: Das große Zimmer, sehr ruhige Lage, Buffet war gut.
negative_comment: Unproffesionelles Verhalten an der Rezeption gegenüber Gäste, obwohl diese nichts dafür konnten, dass sich Rezeption nicht auskennt.

positive_comment: La posizione é centrale, arredamento tipico della zona con la moquette. Mi è piaciuta molto la sala colazione e la vista dalla stessa, self check in tutto ok ma mi piace di più l’accoglienza diretta
negative_comment: Il Self check- in non mi entusiasma molto, la camera con il pavimento ricoperto da moquette e la vasca in bagno con colonnina doccia non mi sono piaciuti molto.

positive_comment: Ottima posizione in centro, camera spaziosa e con ampio terrazzo con vista sulla cittadina. Colazione molto buona.

Situato nel cuore del centro storico ho avuto modo di apprezzare, oltre alla centralità, anche la comodità della stanza, una matrimoniale uso singola molto spaziosa, silenziosa e ben riscaldata. Buona prima colazione e simpatico il personale dello staff. Buono anche il rapporto qualità-prezzo.
Stanze molto grandi,  arredamento datato ma struttura molto pulita.  Posizione in centro alla cittadina. Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo.

title: Hotel for skiiing trip
positive_comment: The hotel is on a frequented place, well inside the town. Parking spots are nerby, as well as some restaurants and shops. Very nice, kind staff. Comfy, cosy rooms. The included breakfast is a huge plus, a lot of options to chose from. Recommended hotel.
Room nice and big, cleanliness on one star :-), breakfast totally awesome + terrace with mountain view as a bonus.
negative_comment: Poorly marked entrance to the hotel. Helpful and friendly staff, but with reduced ability to solve problems.

positive_comment: It was perfect. I like this place and the breakfast was amazing. Thank you 😊

title: Excellent place of a short stopover
positive_comment: Located right in the city center on the 4th (and uppermost) floor of a commercial building (with some shops and offices on other floors) this a rather small hotel with very friendly and helpfull staff and offering a decent morning breakfast buffet. Excellent place for one night stopover. Street parking in front of the hotel is paid from 8:30 am till cca 5 pm (not sure now), but the parking rate is low (20 cents for 30 minutes and first 15 minutes is free of charge).
negative_comment: Wooden furniture and interior in general is a bit outdated and require a renovation. If this is done, our rating would be 9 instead of 8. A sign in the corridor on the ground floor pointing to the hotel reception on the 4th ground flooor could be more visible and should highlight two key words: hotel + reception.

title: Great hotel in a beautiful town.
positive_comment: The breakfast was great, the room clean and spacious, and the owner very accommodating. And getting roses for the mothers was so kind, and it made my mom very happy. Thank you!
negative_comment: It is very quiet, and hard to find a restaurant in the town after a certain hour, but that has nothing to do with the hotel.

title: Great bargain, location, and room amenities. Clean and functional.

Quiet and comfortable. Everything was functional and met or exceeded my expectations. I would stay here again.
negative_comment: The bathroom was interesting. The shower had more to be desired in terms of pressure and time to warm up and needed the wand replaced. It literally is an extended stay hospital room, so the artifacts of that environment are present. If you want an art deco or elegant stay this probably isn't the place for you.  There are still some clinics operating at a lower level during the day, perhaps for office visits but none of this was disturbing.

title: Habitación sencilla, con una buena relación calidad precio en GRAZ

title: Hotel tranquilo, sencillo y con buena atención

positive_comment: Buen tamaño de habitación. Muy limpio todo. Personal habla bien inglés.

title: Absolut tolles & empfehlenswertes Hotel!!!
positive_comment: Sehr gutes Preis/ Leistungsverhältnis! Im Ganzen Haus fühlt man sich wohl und es ist alles sehr sauber! Hervorragendes Frühstücksbuffet und schmackhafte Auswahl zum Abendessen! Gemütliche- große Zimmer und das Beste sind die freundlichen Mitarbeiter! Gute und ausreichende Parkmöglichkeiten. Schibus bleibt vor dem Hotel stehen.

title: Unkompliziert und professionell
positive_comment: Modern mit Auge fürs Detail (und Weglassen unnötiger Details) ausgestattetes Zimmer mit Bergsicht, reichhaltiges Frühstück, hervorragende Küche am Abend, unkomplizierter Umgang mit Unverträglichkeiten, freundliches und zuvorkommendes Personal, besonders beim Zimmerservice, kleiner aber feiner Sauna-Bereich.
negative_comment: Ein bisschen gefehlt hat uns ein ruhiger Aufenthaltsraum zum Lesen am Vor- und Nachmittag. Der Ess-Saal mit Bergpanorama kann grundsätzlich dafür genutzt werden und eignet sich eigentlich hervorragend, wird aber sofort für die nächste Mahlzeit eingedeckt, sodass man sich etwas im Weg fühlt und die Tischfläche dann weitgehend ausgefüllt ist. (Vorschlag an Hotel-Betreiber: erst direkt vor Abendessen eindecken; 1h nach Frühstück + 1h vor Abendessen zum Abräumen/Vorbereiten reservieren, sonst explizit zum Aufenthalt freigeben.)

title: Großartiges Hotel mit traumhaften Essen und top Personal

title:
Buona posi
zione
positive_comment: Stanza pulita, abbastanza grande con balconcino, bagno senza bidet, posizione buona con centro raggiungibile a piedi, c'è un piccolo cucinino, colazione buona, parcheggio privato buono ma costa 20 euro

positive_comment: Ottima la posizione. Stanza semplice e pulita, veramente comodo l'angolo cottura con bollitore e microonde. È il mio secondo soggiorno e non sarà l'ultimo.

Posizione ottimale, molto vicina al centro e ai mezzi pubblici. Il fatto di avere una piccola cucina in camera regala grande autonomia. La stanza era semplice ma spaziosa e non mancava nulla. Ampio bagno.
Hotel vicino al centro, la camera è spaziosa, vi è anche un piccolo angolo cottura.

title: Haus Mobene. Buona struttura non lontana dal centro.
positive_comment: La tranquillita' della struttura, il personale simpatico ed accogliente, le dimensioni e la pulizia della camera, la possibilita' di scaldare del cibo col microonde a disposizione e la presenza di un minibar per tenere le bibite al fresco.
negative_comment: La mancanza dell'aria condizionata anche se fortunatamente c'era un ventilatore e purificatore d'aria di ottima qualita' e marca che nonostante il caldo ci ha consentito di dormire bene.

positive_comment: Stanza pulita ed accogliente con opportunità di scaldare e consumare pasti nell'ampia stanza. Letti comodi e zona silenziosa nel centro di Graz. Personale gentile e disponibile. Piccolo spazio esterno molto gradevole. Siamo stati molto, molto bene.
negative_comment: Non poter differenziare i rifiuti.

title: Très agréable mais cher!
positive_comment:

Le sauna, très appréciable après une journée de ski!
negative_comment: Le prix excessif de la nuitée.

title: Nous avons passé un Super séjour

title: Détente au milieu des montagnes
positive_comment: Une chambre très agréable, excellente literie, salle de bain fonctionnelle. Excellent petit déjeuner. Plats très variés pour le dîner et d’une grande qualité. De plus, un personnel super gentil et sympathique.

title: Ein Ort zum Wohlfühlen!
positive_comment:
Das familiäre Ambiente und der perönliche und herzliche Service sorgt dafür, dass man sich sofort wohl fühlt.
Das Frühstücksbuffet ist abwechsungsreich und immer frisch - ein idealer Start in den Skitag.
Das Abendessen der Halbpension ist ein Traum - schon beim Salatbuffet kann man bleiben - die Küche zaubert aber jeden Tag eine super leckere neue Kreation der regionalen Küche.
Eine kleine aber sehr schön gestaltete Sauna sorgt für die Entspannung nach dem Skitag.
Es bleiben keine Wünsche offen - und man wird auch noch herzlich und persönlich verabschiedet.

title: Absolute Empfehlung!
positive_comment: Das Personal war sehr freundlich und hat uns bei allem geholfen. Das Essen – Frühstück, Abendessen und Drinks – war sehr gut. Alles war sauber und gepflegt, die Lage top. Wir kommen gerne wieder!

positive_comment: The girl at the reception was so nice, location was great and the bed was very comortable.
negative_comment: The breakfast options are very limited and not good value for money.

title: expect friendly staff

title: Very simple but comfortable and clean. Highly recommended
positive_comment: Great location in the city center, very convenient for reaching my workplace. The room and bathroom were spacious, tidy, and clean. The kitchenette was very practical, fully equipped with everything needed, allowing for heating food and preparing breakfast. The lady at the reception was very kind and efficient. I will definitely consider staying here again.

title: Staying in a beautiful and vivid city like Graz - House Mobene is exact the right place to gain new
positive_comment:
The breakfast service was full satisfying.
Was personally asked about my wishes.
I felt very much at ease during the whole breakfast.
I loved the classical style of the house....
and especially the calm environment.
So you really relax over night.
Great location, good price and allowed us early check in. The room was really big.
negative_comment: Not so much a dislike but for some it may be a cool querk with the hotel being a refurbished hospital.

positive_comment:
Excellent, stuff is amazing 
Everything is clean and well kept
The location is excellent. A few minutes walk from all sights. The staff is very friendly. Safe Parking is nearby.

title: Great bargain, location, and room amenities. Clean and functional.
positive_comment: Very spacious room. It was a great bargain with kitchenette, some appliances, dishes and balcony. Great for extended stay. Facility was very clean and staff was wonderful. It was in a very convenient location to walk around the city. It was nice that the room looks out to a soccer field on one side so it does not seem busy or densely populated around. Quiet and comfortable. Everything was functional and met or exceeded my expectations. I would stay here again.
negative_comment: The bathroom was interesting. The shower had more to be desired in terms of pressure and time to warm up and needed the wand replaced. It literally is an extended stay hospital room, so the artifacts of that environment are present. If you want an art deco or elegant stay this probably isn't the place for you.  There are still some clinics operating at a lower level during the day, perhaps for office visits but none of this was disturbing.

positive_comment: My room was spacious with small kitchen. Very easy late check in with very clear instructions. Very quiet street but close to city center. Staff was extremely helpful
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Lovely hotel. Fantastic staff 7⁹³
positive_comment: Lovely hotel, spotlessly clean and fantastic friendly staff.
negative_comment: Location a bit too far from the town but great ski bus service.

title: We stayed at the hotel for a week just to ski in the area and it was perfect. Great
positive_comment: Great ambiance, vast variety of food and helpful staff.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Good vacation
positive_comment: Hotel was clean , rooms are big  and food was very good.
negative_comment: Hotel is 3 stars not 4 at advertised . Bed is little bit uncomfortable and some waitresses are little annoying with offering drinks every 5 minutes at dinner .

title: Enjoyable stay
positive_comment: The breakfast was excellent and the personal service of a family hotel was nice. The room was large, had nice views, with an alcove granting privacy for our daughter. The stay included a pass to lifts which was nice. We checked in later than planned or allowed, which wasn't a problem for them. Good customer service.

title: Relaxing
positive_comment: Friendly staff, good noise insulation, quiet surroundings, very nice breakfast buffet,….

title: We enjoyed a very nice winter week in hotel Sonneschupfer
positive_comment: Nice location, clean rooms, sauna, bus to Schmadling, delicious breakfast, friendly staff, dinner with local specialties
negative_comment: All was good !

title: Perfect place to stay

negative_comment: Maybe it be nice to have an indor pool.

title: Perfect choice if you want to ski in Schladming
positive_comment: The staff was extremely nice, friendly and helpful. The breakfast had perfectly adequate selection and the dinner was 3 courses optional with very delicious meals. The location of the hotel is perfect. The skibus stops just in front of the hotel. The sauna has a window looking on the mountains.
negative_comment: A hanger would be good for the small towel not above the hairdryer.

positive_comment: Super friendly staff and very good breakfast and dinner! Also the sauna after a skiing day made our day even better!
Room -good , Breakfast - good, Dinner good for Austrian conditions:)
negative_comment: For this price I expected some better food but according that we are in Austria it wasn't bad:)

title: Really nice!

negative_comment: The chat bot still has a few areas to be updated on (like for example the check-out procedure).

title: One of my Personal favourites.!!

negative_comment: Again, the only thing I did not like is that I left far too soon.

positive_comment: Pool with sauna, nice clean room, big bed, we asked for kettle and got it for free. Nice view from window. Good breakfast. Free bed towels and bathrobes.

title: Spiridom.. To me: Great Price to Value Ratio, Love it..!!
positive_comment: I liked the help I received when it wasn't possible for me to arrive by the stated check in time. I liked my room and ensuite. I liked the great view at breakfast. I stay whenever I'm passing. I haven't even mentioned the pool, spa room, steam room, I really like them. What's not to like at Hotel Spiridom, it's reasonably priced with great amenities in a very beautiful area.
negative_comment: I didn't like... that I couldn't stay longer.

positive_comment: If you want a place to relax, go to the surrounding nature and also enjoy wellness, you will like this place. The room was clean and comfy. The SPA area is nice - three saunas and a colder pool for swimming and cooling down and nice resting area.

The whole hotel was just beautiful, the staff very helpful and accommodating. Breakfast was a wonderful selection of food and it all tasted delicious. The spa facilities were clean and well serviced. It was one of the best stays my fiancee and I have had ever. Thank you.
negative_comment: That we had to leave

positive_comment: Friendly staff, well equipped room, very central location, great food - breakfast and dinner and the staff in the restaurant was really nice although I was travelling as single woman, nice Spa with Pool, Sauna and infra-red
negative_comment: The bathroom was very moldy, some lightning did not work, room did not have a nice view - parking, and the fitness is very small and not well equipped.

positive_comment:
The staff were friendly and helpful. The location was perfect for enjoying a relaxing time in Admont and to easily explore near by as well. The room was equipped with everything you would need and very comfortable. The mountain view was beautiful and lovely to enjoy. 
The breakfast was impressive and they accommodated gluten free diet due to allergies. 
Would recommend to stay and would consider to stay again!
negative_comment:
Everything was lovely but a couple things I would note would be: 
The patio room door was broken when we checked in, however, the staff was very helpful and timely with correcting the issue and providing us a new room. 
The spa are is a lot smaller than expected but still nice and enjoyable. 
Also unfortunate that for the price that parking and breakfast at least is not included but again still a lovely stay and would recommend!

positive_comment:
Everything was great!
Thank you so much for the lovely stay

title: Fab hotel for short stay.
positive_comment: Fab hotel for short stay, great setting surrounded by mountains, near monestary, beautifully set up and equipped inside. every room has a balcony. Comfortable beds, no noise from other rooms or corridor. May stay longer next time.
negative_comment: nothing.

title: A truly wonderful stay at the castle <3
positive_comment:
The stunning castle, picturesque surroundings, excellent accommodations, and incredible historical ambience provide a truly remarkable experience. I extend my highest recommendation <3 

IMPORTANT CLARIFICATION – THIS IS NOT A DEFECT

I wish to inform anyone that air conditioning is not a standard feature in every room in the castle. 
In the main castle structure, air conditioning is exclusively available in the LOFT room (the other rooms in the castle are without air conditioning). 
Nevertheless, a separate building located immediately adjacent to the castle offers air conditioning in all its rooms.

title: Gorgeous castle, beautiful rooms, amazing service
positive_comment: Amazingly beautiful castle build late 19th century. Each room is different. I stayed in the tower room where you have to climb steep stairs. My friend's room had a private chapel inside the room!! The service was so fantastic.

title: A special unique place to stay, highly recommend a stay in this lovely castle.
positive_comment: This was a special place to stay, the staff were friendly and helpful, we really enjoyed being shown around the castle by the lovely Slovenian lady at reception.  The courtyard for relaxing and dining was lovely, our room was excellent.
negative_comment: Nothing not to like.

positive_comment: Great experience in a castle! Beautiful view and kind staff! Had all rooms equipped with air conditioners, it would be perfect for a summer vacation!
This s place has amazing atmosphere that makes me come back. It’s an unexplainable magic

Everything was good, faboulous breakfast 
Great view 
Unusual place
negative_comment:

That was the main misunderstanding

title: A beautiful building in a tranquil setting. Excellent hosts. Super breakfast.
positive_comment: Very nice suite for a family. Beautiful old castle building with lots of historical fabric preserved.
negative_comment: No water in room. Restaurant closed. Perhaps this is a Monday night thing but we had no advance notice and therefore hadn’t eaten.

negative_comment: The rooms are small, but enough for a one or two nights. The breakfast was nothing special/ poor. Would rather go somewhere else to eat.

positive_comment: Die Lage ist pefekt - im Grünen und doch nahe am Zentrum. Das Personal ist äußerst freundlich und zuvorkommend. Die Ausstattung sehr ansprechend, der Wellnessbereich herrlich - wir kommen bald wieder!

negative_comment: Es ist nahezu unmöglich telefonisch Kontakt aufzunehmen, mit Menschen sprechen war nicht möglich, nur Anhörung von langen Informationen, die aber bei konkreten Fragen eher lästig sind.

positive_comment: Nice Hotel next to Central station and Center of the city

title: Gemütlicher Aufenthalt mit kleinen Mängeln
positive_comment: Zimmer sehr komfortabel und recht sauber. Frühstück war gut aber recht wenig Auswahl. Gratis Parkplatz nicht zu verwechseln mit der Kurtaxe. Lage auch super viele Supermärkte in der nähe und schöne Aussichten. Pool klein aber fein man kann sich recht gut entspannen. Trainingsraum auch obwohl klein, sehr praktisch. Personal freundlich und hilfsbereit.
negative_comment: Am WC gab es tatsächlich mehrere Silberfischchen, beim Frühstücken auch eins gesichtet am Tisch. Schimmel außerhalb vom Pool aber hat mich persönlich nicht so gestört. Wir haben im zweiten Stock auch morgens und abends die anderen Gäste oben beim Essen, die Sessel bewegen gehört und das hat uns in der früh teilweise aus dem Schlaf gerissen (Wir sind Langschläfer). Sonst ist diesem Hotel nichts auszusetzen und wir würden es weiterempfehlen

positive_comment:
Die traumhafte Lage 
Das gute Frühstück 
Das freundliche Personal

Die Lage mit Blick auf das Benediktinerstift war sehr schön.
Abends war die Menüauswahl im Restaurant überschaubar, aber das Wiener Schnitzel war mit Abstand das beste während unseres ganzen Österreichurlaubs.
negative_comment: Das Schwimmbecken war kleiner als erwartet.

title: Tolles Hotel zum Entschleunigen in ruhiger Umgebung
positive_comment: Wir wurden sehr nett empfangen und das Personal war stets freundlich. Sehr gutes Frühstücksbuffet, und köstliches Abendessen. Der Wellnessbereich war sehr ruhig  und wir durften ihn auch am Abreisetag nutzen. Wir kommen gerne wieder!
Das Personal an der Rezeption und beim Frühstück war sehr freundlich! Es war alles sehr sauber. Es ist ein schönes Hotel.

Ein schönes Hotel in super Lage, reichhaltiges Frühstück und das Menu am Abend war auch gut. 
Das Personal an der Rezeption war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, als wir um einen 2. Schreibtischsessel gebeten haben.
negative_comment: Es gibt keine Tür zum Bad und die Dusche ist offen. Für Paare mag das ok sein aber wenn man mit Freunden oder erwachsenen Kindern unterwegs ist, würde es stören.

title: Breve piacevole soggiorno
positive_comment: Hotel molto bello, ottima colazione, lo staff è stato molto disponibile nonostante siamo arrivati in ritardo a causa di un imprevisto.
negative_comment: La pozione dell'hotel è un pò difficile da raggiungere in caso di maltempo, ma d'altro canto siamo in montagna e in questo modo è più vicino alle piste da sci.

positive_comment: A great and quiet place off the main tourist routes. Amazing staff creates almost a family atmosphere. We really enjoyed our stay.
negative_comment: Nothing!

positive_comment:
Staff is super friendly and helpful.
Enough choice at the buffets (breakfast & dinner)
Even is there are many rooms, you never get the feeling that it is crowded.
I recommend it if you need calm, even with kids, there is enough space to play (foot, playgrounds, animals, small lake 5minutea away, climbing wall...)

Lokalizacja - bardzo blisko (2-3 min) do wyciągu talerzykowego, którym podciągamy się i zjazd do kanapy. Jesli jest śnieg można na nartach podjechać pod budynek.
Posiłki smaczne.
Przytulna jadalnia.
negative_comment:
Niby jest bilard i rzutki. Ale wszystkie strzałki były połamane. 
Brakowało jednej kuli do bilarda.
Ping-pong jest na zewnątrz.

title: Fajny hotel przy stoku dla dobrze jeżdżących narciarzy.
positive_comment: Czyściutki i cieplutki hotel. Obsługa miła i uśmiechnięta. Pokoje nie za duże /przynajmniej ten trzyosobowy, który zajmowaliśmy/, ale jest wszystko co potrzeba. Wystrój raczej surowy niż przytulny. Posiłki w formie bufetu. Na śniadanie zawsze ten sam zestaw, ale na tyle szeroki, że każdy dla siebie coś znajdzie. Obiadokolacja różnorodna i smaczna. Napoje do obiadokolacji dodatkowo płatne. Bardzo bliziutko wyciągu - talerzyk, którym goście JUFY za darmo mogą dotrzeć pod dolną stację kolejki krzesełkowej.

title: Luogo ideale per visitare l'abbazia di Admont, anche raggiungibile a piedi
positive_comment:
Camere confortevoli con ampia scelta di cuscini, mai visto un assortimento del genere.
Vista su abbazia e bosco con quercie secolari. Ampio parcheggio con ricarica per auto elettriche.
Piscina, sauna e bagno turco sono comprese.
Spettacolare la vista dalla sala pranzo/colazione all'ultimo piano.
negative_comment:
Sauna e bagno turco avevano una temperatura troppo elevata, bastava lasciare aperta la porta per un pò, solo è uno spreco di energia. Per la colazione migliorerei il caffè, non particolarmente buono. Consiglierei un cambio di fornitore.
Il ristorante ha un menu poco vario e non offre piatti particolamente pregiati, c'e' ampio spazio per un miglioramento e vista la location andrebbe fatto.

positive_comment: Struttura bellissima, comoda per visitare l’abbazia. Centro benessere piccolino ma bello e funzionale.

positive_comment: Tolles Hotel, sehr geräumiges und geschmackvoll eingerichtetes Zimmer. Super Lage um in einen wunderbaren Skitag zu starten. Abendessen (bei Halbpension) war immer hervorragend, teilw. mit Fleisch aus eigener Zucht sowie auch immer eine vegetarische Option.

title: Alles top
positive_comment: Freundliches Personal, gepflegtes neues Haus, gute Lage, Pool, Sauna, praktischer Skistall

title: Wir waren mit allem sehr zufrieden, gerne wieder.

Servicepersonal sehr zuvorkommend. 
Nette Gastgeber.
Tolle Lage, gutes Hotel mit feinem Wllnessbereich und sehr guten  Essen!

title: Ein wunderschöner Urlaub
positive_comment:
Personal sehr freundlich 
Lage direkt an der Piste 
Frühstück klasse Auswahl 
Abendessen super
negative_comment: Ein Kühlschrank auf dem Zimmer wäre noch ein kleiner Verbesserungsvorschlag

title: Das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis war ausgezeichnet. Wir kommen gerne wieder.
positive_comment:
Das Team war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. 
Die Lage ist perfekt für einen Skiurlaub durch den direkten Pistenzugang.  Auch am Abreisetag wurde es uns ermöglicht, noch die Duschen zu nutzen nach dem Skitag und unser Gepäck einfach zu verstauen.
Das Essen war sehr gut und die Portionen mehr als ausreichend. Der Service war flott und sehr freundlich.
Der Wellnessbereich ist klein aber fein.

title: toller Winterstart in freundl. Familien betrieb
positive_comment: Hotel Moser mit wunderschöner Lage direkt an der Skipiste.  Noch dazu ausgezeichnete Verpflegung

title: Wunderschönes und komfortables Hotel nah beim Dachstein
positive_comment: Sehr großes Zimmer! Entsprach eher einer Junior Suite statt einem reinem Doppelzimmer! Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet und mit Produkten aus der Region. Das Hotel ist sehr schön und leicht zu erreichen. Wir hatten Halbpension und waren vom Abendessen ebenso begeistert. Die Qualität ist sehr hoch! Was uns noch begeistert hat war die Tatsache dass die Schladming/Dachstein Sommercard ebenso inkludiert war. Damit gibt es sehr viele Vergünstigungen und kostenlose Eintritte bzw. konstenloses Benutzen der Gondel bzw. Lifte! Wir kommen definitiv wieder.

title: Wir kommen wieder
positive_comment:
Einfach ein tolles Hotel, Wellnessbereich super und extrem sauber
Essen überaus lecker

negative_comment: Nothing!

Standard JUFA
Good position in winter

positive_comment:

I will definitely choose this hotel for my next archery trip there too.

title: Quartier war mir bekannt, deshalb auch wieder gekommen.
positive_comment: Gesamt gesehen vor Ort sehr zufrieden, Zimmer eher sehr klein und wenig zum Trocknen, das war mir aber schon bekannt.
negative_comment: Es ist nahezu unmöglich telefonisch Kontakt aufzunehmen, mit Menschen sprechen war nicht möglich, nur Anhörung von langen Informationen, die aber bei konkreten Fragen eher lästig sind.

title: Für Kinder super!
positive_comment:
Lage top!! Spielbereich, Turnsaal für Kinder super!
Grosszügig bemessene und tolle Allgemeinflächen im und rund um das Hotel.
Wenn man will, kann man zB im oberen Aufenthaltsbereich auch sehr leicht neue Kontakte knüfen.
Für Eltern mit Kindern geht's kaum besser, da es den Kindern viel Autonomie ermöglicht.
negative_comment:
Die Zimmergrösse für 4 Personen mit Winterkleidung ist tatsächlich eng bemessen, dafür ist der Preis zu hoch.
Man hat kaum Platz etwas abzulegen, kann sich dann im Zimmer kaum rühren.
Das Abendessen hat nicht ganz überzeugt.

title: Ein sehr gutgeführtes Haus mit sehr freundlichen Personal.

title: Perfektes und familienfreundliches Hotel für den Schiurlaub auf der Planneralm!
positive_comment: Die Lage des Hotels ist perfekt, sehr nah zu den Schiliften. Parkplatz direkt vor dem Haus. Frühstücksbuffet sehr umfangreich und frisch, das Abendessen vorzüglich, es verleitet zu mehr. Der Schistall ist super geheizt, die Schischuhe jeden morgen wieder trocken und warm.
negative_comment: Von Seiten Hotel alles perfekt, nur manche Gäste können mit Selbstbedienungsbuffets nicht umgehen und lassen volle Teller am Tisch stehen.

positive_comment:
Tolles Frühstück Buffet, Abendessen auch für jeden was dabei.
Äußerst nettes Personal!
negative_comment: Zimmer vis a vis vom Sieleraum, Abends sehr laut.

positive_comment:

negative_comment: Das Zimmer war mit Teenagern relativ eng, für ein Wochenende aber kein Problem.

title: Calme et bien etre
positive_comment: Lieu exceptionnel,équipements au top(piscine,sauna,spa)calme et repos permanent.
negative_comment: Je n ai pas apprécié le peu de sourires du personnel et le fait que personne ne parle français...sans doute à cause du sort de Marie Antoinette.Sinon pour le reste c était parfait

title: Chambre avec vue
positive_comment: Très belle surprise! L'hotel est moderne et a tout ce dont nous avions besoin: calme, belle chambre avec balcon, équipements au top (piscine, sauna, hamam, salle de fitness, grande terrasse) et une belle vue sur la montagne et l'abbaye. Le petit déjeuner est copieux et varié.

Le petit-déjeuner, beaucoup de choix, très bon !
L'espace détente très agréable

title: Très bon séjour.
positive_comment:
Petit déjeuner somptueux.
Hôtel idéal pour venir visiter l’abbaye et sa magnifique bibliothèque.

- chambre moderne, propre
- Belle vue sur les montagnes
- Spa agréable
negative_comment:
- Oreillers repos durs. Très mal dormi et réveil avec nuque à demi bloquée
- odeur de fumier à l’extérieur. Certes c’est à la campagne mais pas très Agra ale quand on se pose au bord de la piscine ou qu’on aime dormir de être ouverte 
- Restaurant: serveur hautain, nourriture correct sans plus, et surtout attention à l’arnaque du menu: le prix du menu est plus cher que les plats pris séparément ! On a cru qu’il y avait peut être des boissons incluses dans le menu, mais que nenni. La serveuse a confirmé que sinon prenait la formule 3 plats, on paierait le pris du menu et non le prix des plats annoncé à l’unité. Du coup on a fait l’impasse sur l’entrée.

Even is there are many rooms, you never get the feeling that it is crowded.
I recommend it if you need calm, even with kids, there is enough space to play (foot, playgrounds, animals, small lake 5minutea away, climbing wall...)

Posiłki smaczne.
Przytulna jadalnia.

title: Fajny hotel przy stoku dla dobrze jeżdżących narciarzy.
positive_comment: Czyściutki i cieplutki hotel. Obsługa miła i uśmiechnięta. Pokoje nie za duże /przynajmniej ten trzyosobowy, który zajmowaliśmy/, ale jest wszystko co potrzeba. Wystrój raczej surowy niż przytulny. Posiłki w formie bufetu. Na śniadanie zawsze ten sam zestaw, ale na tyle szeroki, że każdy dla siebie coś znajdzie. Obiadokolacja różnorodna i smaczna. Napoje do obiadokolacji dodatkowo płatne. Bardzo bliziutko wyciągu - talerzyk, którym goście JUFY za darmo mogą dotrzeć pod dolną stację kolejki krzesełkowej.
negative_comment:

title: Volle Punktzahl
positive_comment:
Ein wahres Juwel in den Bergen Österreichs !

Das Hotel liegt zwar etwas abgelegen, aber die atemberaubende Aussicht, die Nähe zu dem umliegenden Skipisten und die umliegende Natur macht es mehr als zu einem unvergesslichen Urlaub.
Die Zimmer und das Hotel sind sehr sauber, das Essen ist hervorragend und das Frühstück ist ausreichend und vielseitig.

Das Personal ist sehr nett und zuvorkommend, man fühlt sich sofort wohl. 

Das Hotel ist ideal für Wanderer, Skifahrer und alle, die Ruhe und Erholung suchen.

Wir kommen gerne wieder!

Das Zimmer war sehr sauber, die Matratzen bequem, wir haben sehr gut geschlafen.
Das Frühstücksbuffet hat absolut keine Wünsche offengelassen. 
Die Umgebung war super um mit dem Hund spazieren zu gehen. Wir werden auf jeden Fall wiederkommen. Insgesamt ein super Hotel, sehr hundefreundlich und sehr nette Gastgeber!

title: A truly wonderful stay at the castle <3
positive_comment:
The stunning castle, picturesque surroundings, excellent accommodations, and incredible historical ambience provide a truly remarkable experience. I extend my highest recommendation <3 

IMPORTANT CLARIFICATION – THIS IS NOT A DEFECT

I wish to inform anyone that air conditioning is not a standard feature in every room in the castle. 
In the main castle structure, air conditioning is exclusively available in the LOFT room (the other rooms in the castle are without air conditioning). 
Nevertheless, a separate building located immediately adjacent to the castle offers air conditioning in all its rooms.

title: Gorgeous castle, beautiful rooms, amazing service
positive_comment: Amazingly beautiful castle build late 19th century. Each room is different. I stayed in the tower room where you have to climb steep stairs. My friend's room had a private chapel inside the room!! The service was so fantastic.

title: Fajny hotel przy stoku dla dobrze jeżdżących narciarzy.
positive_comment: Czyściutki i cieplutki hotel. Obsługa miła i uśmiechnięta. Pokoje nie za duże /przynajmniej ten trzyosobowy, który zajmowaliśmy/, ale jest wszystko co potrzeba. Wystrój raczej surowy niż przytulny. Posiłki w formie bufetu. Na śniadanie zawsze ten sam zestaw, ale na tyle szeroki, że każdy dla siebie coś znajdzie. Obiadokolacja różnorodna i smaczna. Napoje do obiadokolacji dodatkowo płatne. Bardzo bliziutko wyciągu - talerzyk, którym goście JUFY za darmo mogą dotrzeć pod dolną stację kolejki krzesełkowej.
negative_comment:
Nie doczytałam, że na hotel składa się z kilku budynków, w których usytuowane są pokoje, stołówka i sauna to kolejne, niepołączone ze sobą budynki. Tak, że trzeba przechodzić dworem.
Trasy narciarskie raczej dla zaawansowanych. Niebieskie trasy strome i bardzo wąskie. Dla początkujących i niezaawansowanych pozostaje szkółka dla dzieci w dolinie bez widoków :(

Thanks to Jonas we were able to have a really smooth check in process inspite it being crowded at the time of our arrival.

The same problem I had in the hotel in Budapest. What a stupid Raddisson rule to have door closers in the bathroom? Cancel that your stupid rule. I never had such problems in other hotelsnin Budapest or Graz.

Colazione: descriverei tutti i prodotti disponibili anche in inglese,  ma un po' cara per chi non mangia come a pranzo. 
La cosa davvero fastidiosa è l'impossibilità di spegnere la luce del bagno. Dormendo con animali ho dovuto lasciare la porta del bagno aperta ed è praticamente stata accesa la luce tutta la notte, perchè ad ogni ingresso restava accesa per più di 20 minuti, senza esagerare, e non c'era modo di spegnerla. Un asciugamano in più e delle lenzuola in più non guasterebbero, perchè se prendi il cuscino supplementare è senza biancheria, idem per il piumino. Una coperta più leggera del piumino sarebbe gradita come optional

A notre arrivée, le lit de notre fille n'était pas fait, le réceptionniste nous a informé qu'il il y avait tout pour le faire...
Je lui ai demandé  gentiment de le faire faire, nous voulions dîner au restaurant , il était fermé, nous avons demandé de commander au alentour de 20h00 des snacks, il n'avait rien impossible !
Nous sommes alors aller passer une commande, extérieur à l'hôtel que nous avons reçu à 23h00, la cerise sur le gâteau, il manquait une serviette de bain, le réceptionniste nous à demander de venir nous même la chercher car il n'avait pas le temps, je suis descendu à la réception pour récupérer ma commande, il discuter avec son collègue !

title: Exceeded all expectations!
positive_comment: For a small hotel, this was a very friendly and well run hotel. We only stayed for one night but the staff were efficient, friendly and helpful. I would highly recommend for people needing to stay in the area for access to the motorway or airport.  Even if people want to visit Graz, the 7 minute ride into Hbf  is not a chore.
negative_comment: Nothing, for the size of hotel, it was perfect.

positive_comment: Todo increíble en el kiwano ,tanto hotel como restaurante. El personal es muy amable.
negative_comment: Todo super bien

title: Perfecto
positive_comment:
La habitación, que prácticamente era un mini-departamento, muchos armarios, refrigerador, caja fuerte, un escritorio para trabajar con la laptop. Mi niño de 3 años durmió en una cama extra y seguíamos teniendo mucho espacio libre, el piso completamente alfombrado, con calefacción, en el piso inferior hay un restaurante grande y no hubo olor a comida en la habitación.

El hotel tiene un aparcamiento grande y gratis en el exterior, el aeropuerto de Graz está muy cerca y no escuché ruidos por la noche.

Hasta el centro de la ciudad hay aproximadamente 15-20 minutos porque la velocidad en todo Graz es de 50 kmh.

La recepción fue muy rápida, la habitación se abre con una tarjeta que también sirve para la puerta exterior.

Hay aire acondicionado.

title: A comfortable and hassle-free stay from arrival to departure.
positive_comment:
We arrived late in the evening, but the check-in process was smooth and very quick. The staff was friendly and helpful, which made our arrival stress-free despite the late hour.

The rooms were quiet, clean, and well maintained. Everything was tidy and comfortable, allowing us to rest properly after a long journey.

Parking was available and well organized, which was very convenient for us. Overall, we had a pleasant stay and would definitely recommend this hotel to others.

title: Good price, do not open window :)
positive_comment: Basically everything is fine. Great price. Good location for visiting Graz or a good choice for a night sleep if you're just passing through. Parking.
negative_comment: You can't sleep with the window open because of the smell from the restaurant next door.

positive_comment: Nice and clean place with friendly staff. Highly recommended.

title: Great stay!

Thanks to Jonas we were able to have a really smooth check in process inspite it being crowded at the time of our arrival.

Eigenaar verstaat zijn vak. Niet te erg op de voorgrond, maar gewoon goed en behulpzaam.

Einde middag de welness ook dik in orde. 
Heerlijke dagen gehad!

positive_comment: Hotel della catena B&B con servizi base. Colazione dolce da migliorare. Parcheggio convenzionato nella strada difronte. Passeggiata di circa 20 minuti per raggiungere il centro di Graz, quindi comodo senza spostare l'auto.

title: Consigliato, a 15 minuti a piedi dal Kunsthaus e a 20 minuti dal centro storico
positive_comment:
Camera comoda, finestra su grande parco, bagno non finestrato ma ampio e moderno.
Silenzioso, pulito, colazione a buffet variegata e abbondante con servizio di riassetto continuo dei tavoli e dei vassoi.
negative_comment: Mancava il kit di cortesia nel bagno, no amenities.

title: Vacanza rilassante.
positive_comment: La posizione dell'hotel vicinissima alla stazione dei treni, alla fermata dei tram e al centro, praticamente! Camera calda, unica con il balcone. Ottimo relax.
negative_comment: Il bidet, che in un bagno così grande è fondamentale. I cuscini, troppo morbidi e la mancanza di sorriso dei receptionist, che spesso mancava (o meglio, il tizio che serviva la colazione era simpatico e disponibile, ti dava informazioni ecc. L'altro, burbero e non adatto a svolgere quel ruolo!).

title: GRAZ UNA PIACEVOLE SCOPERTA
positive_comment: LE CAMERE SONO CONFORTEVOLI E PULITE. LA STRUTTURA E' NON MOLTO LONTANO DAL CENTRO E ABBIAMO APPREZZATO LA DISPONIBILITA' A FARCI LASCIARE I BAGAGLI SIA PRIMA DEL CHEK IN CHE DOPO IL CHECK OUT.
negative_comment: SI POTREBBERO DARE MAGGIORI INDICAZIONI PER TROVARE IL PARCHEGGIO CONVENZIONATO PERCHE' NON E' STATO FACILE TROVARLO. INOLTRE NON C'E' UNA TOILETTE A DISPOSIZIONE DEGLI OSPITI NELLA RECEPTION MA SOLO NELLA SALA BREAKFAST.

positive_comment: Posizione comodissima per il centro e per tutti i mezzi pubblici, camere spaziose, moderne e perfettamente insonorizzate. Colazione ricca
negative_comment: Io non amo la moquette sui pavimenti, ma in Austria l’ho trovata un po’ ovunque

title: BELLA SCOPERTA
positive_comment: OTTIMA POSIZIONE PER LA TRANQUILLITA' ......NONOSTANTE SIA PERCORSA DAI TRAM
negative_comment: ......FORSE SPECIFICHEREI MEGLIO IL LUOGO DEL PARCHEGGIO CONVENZIONATO GIA' NELLE INFORMAZIONI PRINCIPALI ......IO - DOPO UN VIAGGIO DI DIVERSE ORE - MI RITROVATPO A GIRARE INTORNO AL QUARTIERE PER BEN TRE VOLTE PER POI TROVARLO APPENA DOPO L'INSEGNA DEL SUPERMARKET BILLA  SULLA DESTRA....... .

positive_comment: Posizione perfetta e comodissima. Colazione discreta ma buona

title: Buona base per visitare la città
positive_comment: Ottima la posizione vicino al centro e alla stazione. Struttura pulita e staff cordiale. Camera luminosa. Discreto rapporto prezzo qualità
negative_comment: Camera un po' spoglia ed anonima. Letto singolo abbastanza piccolo

title: Hotel comodo ed essenziale ad un buon prezzo. In linea con la catena B&B Hotels
positive_comment:
La posizione
Il parcheggio convenzionato.
Il parco vicino dove fare una passeggiata con il cane.

title: Sehr netter und unkomplizierter Aufenthalt
positive_comment: Das B&B hatte eine schöne Lage, nahe zum Hauptbahnhof, was für uns sehr praktisch war. Das Frühstück war sehr gut und lecker und die Zimmer sehr sauber und gut ausgestattet. Das Personal sehr nett und unkompliziert. Wir hatten alles was wir für einen gemütlichen, entspannten, kurzen Aufenthalt hatten.

title: Voll zufrieden😃 Wir kommen sicher wieder!
positive_comment: Sehr gute Lage - ein paar Schritte zum Hauptbahnhof und in wenigen Minuten zu Fuß in der Innenstadt. Der Herr am Empfang war super freundlich. Das Frühstück war sehr gut. Das Preis/Leistungsverhältnis ist unschlagbar!!!
Die Lage war gut, da das Hotel direkt beim Bahnhof ist. Das Personal war sehr freundlich.
negative_comment: Die Regale im Bad waren staubig. Ich musste diese zuerst entstauben bevor ich meine persönlichen Dinge reinlegen konnte.

title: Sehr zufrieden
positive_comment: Sehr sauberes Zimmer, freundliches Personal, zentrale Lage, reichhaltiges Frühstück. Wir waren sehr zufrieden.

positive_comment: Excellent rapport qualité prix, chambre confortable. Très proche de la gare et le tram passe juste devant l’hotel. À pied on peut se rendre en centre ville en 15-20 minutes. Je recommande.

Propre et confortable 
Chambre grande

positive_comment: L'emplacement a proximite de la gare, environnement vert

title: Nous recommandons très fortement cet hôtel

Le tout pour un très bon prix.

title: J'ai noté cette très bonne adresse .

Proximité de la gare, des transports et du centre.

title: Wie immer ist Graz eine Reise wert

title: This is a real treat of a hotel!
positive_comment: This is a real treat of a hotel. Obviously the location on the Redbull ring is fantastic but it is also a beautiful hotel with great food and brilliant service from lovely staff. We had rooms that had balconies overlooking the track and when we were there there were cars and bikes on the track all day which was great to watch from a brilliant balcony. The soundproofing is exceptional, it completely blocked all the track noise which was significant from the formula 1 cars which were practising! Expensive, but well worth it!

title: Superb.
positive_comment: Excellent hospitality. Special thanks to Manuel for being very accommodating with all the requests that I had. Would definitely visit again and highly recommend it to anyone who’s coming to the events at the Red Bull ring or the Austrian GP.

title: Beautiful and welcoming hotel in green surroundings.
positive_comment:
This was our second stay here. The first time, we booked because it was reasonably priced and had a pool and sauna. This time we went back because we love it. It's beautifully decorated and the room was pristine. The pool is great, as is the sauna. 
The location is a little out of town but just one bus to the centre. It's beside a huge outdoor swimming pond and also you can walk up into the hills right from the hotel and see amazing views. 
Everyone at the front desk was incredibly helpful and the breakfast staff are very kind too. The breakfast has been so good too. They have nice herbal tea which is the thing that some hotels don't really bother about. You can try local dishes and local pumpkin seed oil.
Both times I've stayed I've had something disastrous happen (like the airline losing my luggage) and both times the hotel front desk staff have been incredibly helpful and reassuring.
negative_comment: I love everything. I would say double check the location and plan a route to your workplace if need be, such as the bus. But even the flixbus station is pretty close.

title: An excellent choice for living in Graz if you don't need to live in the center.
positive_comment: Nice medium-sized - rather smaller hotel - has a family feel. It is located on the outskirts of Graz, close to the motorway exits, but in a quiet area. Ideal for motorists, parking right in front of the hotel or in the garage. Nice receptionist, excellent breakfast and comfortable room. The hotel also offers a swimming pool. The hotel has a pleasant seating area - bar.
negative_comment: It's a shame that the hotel doesn't have a restaurant for lunch or dinner. But I expected that. And a small thing: the shower was a bit simple and small.

We would go back anytime for sure!
