positive_comment: Excellent location and food. Sauna has been renovated and looks very good

title: Una garanzia sul piano prezzo-qualita... spero di tornarci
positive_comment:
Non è a prima volta che ne sono ospite.
Mi piace la libertà di potersi muovere tutto il giorno tra saune, piscine, bagno turco e lettini indossando solo l'accappatoio.
Se ci fossero limitazioni (ad esempio di tempo come spesso accade in molte strutture in Italia) credo che non ci tornerei più: invece è una garanzia di puro relax, specialmente se si sceglie la zona riservata ai soli ospiti dell'albergo.
negative_comment:
Quest'anno il menu - inteso nelle portate principali del trattamento in mezza pensione non è stato all'altezza degli anni passati.
Ottimo invece sia il buffet dei "contorni" che quello delle colazioni: non manca proprio nulla e tutto di qualità elevata.
Adatto anche a bambini

title: DUE GIORNI DI RELAX IN UN ANNO IMPORTANTE 1965-2025
positive_comment: TUTTO QUANTO, UNA STRUTTURA ECCELLENTE. C'ERO GIA' STATO PRIMA DEL COVID 2/3 VOLTE E RITORNARE E' STATO BELLISSIMO. CI TORNERO' SICURAMENTE.
negative_comment: NULLA

title: Tutto bene!!
positive_comment: Belle camere, ottimo terrazzo, riscaldamento in stanza perfetto. Tutto perfetto come sempre. Poi la cena!!! Ma chi c’è in cucina? Un genio?? C’erano degli Spätzle agli spinaci che erano la fine del mondo , il pesce formidabile. Un gigantesco complimenti a tutta la cucina-pasticceria. Mangiare da voi é un esperienza, parola di Restaurantleiter.
negative_comment: La mattina , ordinare un cappuccino all haferl Milch diventa difficile. Magari il caffè si, quelle macchine così, non sono così buone.

positive_comment: Struttura molto pulita e organizzata , con grande attenzione all' ambiente e con arredamento molto gradevole. Piscine e strutture termali super !

title: Sempre un piacere ritornarci...
positive_comment:
Temperatura acque (siamo molto esigenti). Disponibilità di molteplici saune e bagni turchi, oltre alle svariate piscine per ogni gusto e genere.
Non ci sono limiti sul tempo in cui stare in relax e con orari molto ampi.
Asciugamani a continua rotazione, se necessario (senza sprecare, ma se hai fatto 3 saune è bello poterlo cambiare con uno asciutto e pulito).
Premesso che ormai abbiamo superato i 10 anni di visite... e meritabsempre ritornare: in Italia non ho ancora trovato qualcosa di simile a questi prezzi (mai "regalati").
negative_comment: Hanno rifatto una parte della zona riservata ai clienti hotel, in modo piacevole e molto comodo; purtroppo hanno eliminato una stanza che amavo (musica rilassante ed immagini-video random di natura). Hanno anche rifatto completamente il bagno turco in quest'area, ma sbagliando "di brutto": piccolo, senza profumi e senza quella fontanella al centro che era funzionale x rinfrescarsi alla bisogna...

title: Per staccare e lasciarsi coccolare il posto migliore
positive_comment:
Camera piccolina ma molto curata nei dettagli, pulizia perfetta. Le terme poi meravigliosa!! 
La cena il pezzo forte. Buonissimo e tutto di ottima qualità. 2 giorni da sogno.

negative_comment: The dinner was average, we tried once and next time we went do the city. City centre about 20 minutes walk.

positive_comment: great breakfest, big choice of food and drinks. 15 minutes to the center, big parking
- child playground is really great which is next to the restaurant
negative_comment: - had to wait a lot for the food at the dinner time. Everything was empty always and when they refilled it was immediately gone

title: Small and nice
positive_comment:
Lovely modern bedroom. Comfortable bed. Very clean. Plenty of sockets and a mini-fridge. The room was quiet even though we were almost next to the main road. 

The receptionist was friendly, informative and helpful. We were able to leave the car in the morning.

It is literally ski-in / ski-out, through the back garden. This was one of the high points.

Breakfast was great. Hotel bar opens until 8pm ( i think). The was a nice billard room with darts, and a lobby area.

Ski storage facilities were good and easily accessed.
negative_comment:
Not the fault of the hotel, but the bus did not arrive in the evening (approx 6.30pm)  to take us down into the town. We had to call a taxi which came quickly and was only around €15. It was a 30 minute walk back to the hotel as we were unable to get a return taxi (as early as 10pm).

The Wellness area was quite small for the size of the hotel. I was told there were 17 rooms, but only 4 beds in the wellness zone, which were all reserved (but not occupied) when we went down to relax for a bit after skiing. 

The bathroom although clean, warm and functioning was a little dated, and the shower cubicle very small.

Hotel lacked a bit of atmosphere in the evening but i guess everyone was down in the town.

title: Comfortable hotel with great sauna
positive_comment: Very comfortable hotel in a walking distance from ski slope with great & new sauna area downstairs. Parking in front of the hotel, short drive from downtown. Worth returning to.
negative_comment: Nothing.

positive_comment: Newly refurbished interior, excellent breakfast, easy late night check in, friendly receptionist
negative_comment: Compared how nice and new everything in this hotel is, maybe the bathroom in my room could be better

title: Alles top
positive_comment: Sehr nettes Personal. Wir hatten leider ein kleines Problem mit der Buchung, welches ohne großes Aufsehen gelöst wurde. Das Hotel hat einen nostalgischen Charme und ist sehr zu empfehlen.

Wir hatten ganz einfache einzelzimmer und diese auch als schlafmöglichkeit und nicht als luxusunterkunft verstanden darum darf ich hier sagen preis leistung top, zimmer völlig ok. Besonders gut war das frühstück, die auswahl ist riesig damit hatte ich nicht gerechnet.

title: Im großen und Ganzen ein sehr nettes Hotel! Personal super lieb, Frühstück sehr gut!
positive_comment: Wir hatten unser Zimmer in Nebengebäude, es war sehr nett eingerichtet, die Wände sind etwas dünn, man hört leider alles!
negative_comment: Das viele ausländische (Polen, Tschechen) Gäste da waren und diese sehr laut waren! Das Badezimmer war schon etwas Älter!

title: Viel Gastfreundschaft - gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Das Team des Hotels ist einfach unschlagbar nett, höflich und freudlich. Da fühlt man sich direkt gut aufgehoben. Für Geschäftsreisende fühlt sich das fast wie Urlaub an.
negative_comment: es ist alles schon ein wenig in die Jahre gekommen. Ich nenne es freundlich retro.

title: Der Aufenthalt war sehr angenehm und das Essen sehr lecker. Wir kommen definitiv wieder .
positive_comment: Die Unterkunft hat eine super Lage , das Essen schmeckt sehr gut und das Buffet war immer gut gefüllt . Halbpension ist sehr zu empfehlen . Die Zimmer sind nicht modern aber trotzdem voll in Ordnung. Der Skibus fährt vor der Tür weg. Das Pool hat eher Sportbecken Temperatur aber ist schön groß um Bahnen zu schwimmen.

title: Sehr zufrieden
positive_comment: Lage hat mir sehr gut gefallen. Preis Leistungsverhältnis top
negative_comment: Eine Steckdose hat leider nicht geladen. Gab zum Glück mehrere im Zimmer

positive_comment:
Wir waren als Familie 4 Nächte im Hotel Post und würden wieder kommen. Uns hat es sehr gut gefallen.
Ja, das Hotel hat in weiten Teilen keine zeitgemäße Inneneinrichtung. Wer darauf Wert legt, ist hier wohl nicht richtig. Dafür jedoch ist das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis praktisch unschlagbar und die Services drum herum stimmen auch!
Großer Parkplatz, auch bei hochwinterlichen Verhältnissen kein Problem (in der Ramsau nicht so selbstverständlich), Bushaltestelle fußläufig. Geräumiges, sauberes Zimmer, abwechslungsreiches, gepflegt angerichtetes Frühstücks- und Abendbuffet. Rezeption und Personal ist freundlich und gut organisiert. Gerne wieder!

title: Super Hotel in toller Lage
positive_comment: Schönes gemütliches Hotel mit Blick auf den Dachstein, schöne Gegend zum spazieren gehen, es befindet sich in einer Super Lage, der Skibus paar Minuten entfernt, Schladming mit dem Auto 10 Minuten entfernt, Essensbuffet hervorragend es ist für jeden etwas dabei. Schwimmbad, Spielzimmer, gemütlicher Gesellschaftsraum um am Abend gemeinsam beisammen zu sitzen.
negative_comment: Dieses Jahr waren weniger Parkplätze, aber haben immer einen gefunden und das Personal war auch sehr bemüht dass man einen Parkplatz hat.

positive_comment: Frühstück, Abendessen, Gutschein Kuchen und Kaffee, Schwimmbad, Sauna, Lage, Blick zum Dachstein, Nähe zur Loipe. Eigentlich der gesamte Urlaub!
negative_comment: Weicher Polster, keine Vorteile der Wintercard für Langlaufen 2 Tage und Gletscherbahn 1 Tag. Ist aber auch schon "Meckern" auf hohem Niveau!

title: Amazing stay for a weekend
positive_comment: We really enjoyed all the facilities in the hotel, as well delicious cuisine and extremely friendly and helpful staff. Selection at the bar was great with local wines and beers available. Spacious areas to relax near pools with both free and paid options
negative_comment: Everything was great, so there is nothing to point as "bad". The only inconvenient thing was bad Google Maps navigation, so it was difficult to find the right entrance to the hotel when we arrived in the evening. Maybe an electric sign would be good for the first time visitors arriving on their own.

title: Good spa holiday but I would have expected a little more
positive_comment: A hotel connected to the spa site and combined with many thermal pools and dry and wet sauna areas. There is no doubt that the spa and pool complexes are the hotel's standout feature. Sometimes it is difficult to find a place to sit around the pools. Breakfast is very good and rich. .
negative_comment: From 10 pm there is no service at the front desk. There is no coffee maker in the room. Very small and thin shower towels. Soap and shampoo are combined and there is no conditioner. At dinner the salads and side dishes are repetitive. Small main course.

title: Hotel with an amazing spa
positive_comment: Hotel with an amazing spa, excellent rooms, friendly and helpful staff, excellent breakfast and dinner.

title: Good relaxing long weekend in a well maintained wellness hotel
positive_comment: Wellness facilities, sauna rituals, comfy room, breakfast and dinner. Refurbished wellness area.
negative_comment: Towels in the room could have been softer. They looked like they had past their sell by date. Charging for parking in the parking deck.

title: Amazing place to relax
positive_comment: Truly exceptional experience! Food, property and staff were amazing!

title: amazing spa hotel
positive_comment: Let's start from the end, an amazing, amazing, amazing hotel. The reception staff, maids and kitchen staff are courteous, smiling and professional, the hotel is clean and decorated in an amazing way, the rooms are new and clean, the bed is very comfortable, and the shower is excellent, free parking, the breakfast is excellent and the dinner is amazing, the food is varied and delicious, the spa in the hotel is beyond expectations, spacious, clean and quiet, the hot pools and jacuzzi are great, if it were possible to give this hotel 6 stars, that's what it would get

title: A well balanced spa resort
positive_comment: What a pleasant surprise. Staff is super kind and helpful, the food (considering it’s a huge place) is superb and always presented with great pride, the hotel spa and the big open spa offer everything one could want, the rooms are furnished with lots of thought plus are spotless and the hotel must have done renovations recently as almost all common areas look stylish and cared for. All in all … 9+ out or 10 💚soft this resort .

Our only regret was that we couldn't stay longer! After checkout, the hotel allows you to visit the common thermal baths all day long. Breakfast and dinner are very varied and delicious! We will definitely come back again!

title: Very nice hotel
positive_comment: The hotel is quite big, lots of options of saunas and pools, indoor and outdoor. The "hotel spa" is quieter and prettier, the other side (where I guess people can also buy a day pass) is busier but still really nice. Everything is clean and organised. I would recommend!
negative_comment: As vegetarians, we just thought they could offer a bit more for those who don't eat meat. Specially at dinner.

title: Wonderful hospitality and perfect stopover
positive_comment:
We only stayed one night at Weinrefugium Brolli on our way down to Croatia, but that was more than enough to experience the charm and warmth of this lovely hotel. From the moment we arrived, the hospitality was outstanding – genuinely welcoming and attentive.

Our room was spacious, modern, and offered stunning views over the vineyards – a perfect place to unwind.

Dinner was a true highlight, with fantastic food and excellent wine pairing recommendations that really elevated the experience.

All in all, a memorable short stay – we would love to come back for a longer visit!

Super Frühstücksbuffet
Gute Lage im kleinen süßen Ort

I think we were not the target audience. I hadn't realised it was such a family hotel.  It was fine and comfortable but rather basic.
Excellent if you are travelling with little kids- needless to say we weren't
food was ok, great location close to 3 ski centers, big indoor heated pool + sauna, pets welcome
negative_comment: rooms too small, a bit dusty, could be cheaper

title: Good family hotel, a little too expensive for the value
positive_comment:
Friendly staff, really friendly. The staff is probably the best part of the hotel.
Comfortable stay. We liked the indoor pool and the sauna.
negative_comment:
Pricey hotel. Food is okay, but too expensive for what it is. 
Parking is like gambling, if you are lucky, your car stays unscratched. 
Wooden floors can ruin your nights if you have the wrong neighbors. It’s a design choice, not much the staff can do about it though.

positive_comment: The persnonel was very nice during whole time of our stay. Thank you very much. Just recommend JUFA Siegmundsberg for all families with kids.

Excellent facilities: the pool/sauna parts were really well done. And there are tons of things to keep the  children entertained. The room was large and the beds very comfy.

Besides, the food is good with a wide choice of dishes, and the location is both beautiful and conveniently located not far from the start of many trails.

A szállás remek helyen van. A szobák tiszták és felszereltek. Nagyon kisgyermek barát a szálloda. A wellness egy medence és egy kisebb szaunából áll. A reggeli bőséges és változatos viszont a vacsora választéka nekem kevés volt.

strava výborná, lokalita tiež.
turistika a návšteva pútneho miesta. Boli sme tu už opakovane.
Příjezd v dubnu na motorkách. Hotel poloprázdný, takže klid a pohoda 👍. Recepční vstřícný, pivo a káva žádný problém. Pokoje čisté a hlavně vytopené. K snídani vše co si můžete přát.

title: Sehr erholsam, tolle Skipiste - echt ein Geheimtipp für eventuell kurz mal Ski fahren oder so.
positive_comment:
Die Lage ist einfach top! Parkplatz direkt vor der Haustüre, Skilift und Apres Ski auch.(Jagatee bekommt Punkteabzug! ;-))
Das Personal war sehr höflich und bemüht, alle Wünsche zu erfüllen. Frühstück war sehr frisch zubereitet, auch frisches Obst stand zur Verfügung. Das Abendbuffet war ein Wahnsinn, also guten Hunger mitbringen. Der Hund war nirgends ein Problem, es wurde ein toller, großer Tisch zum Sitzen ausgewählt für uns. Besonders bequem waren die Sitzgelegenheiten
/ Couches im Empfangsbereich, welche wir gerne am Abend nützten.
negative_comment:
Das Zimmer war gut abgenützt, war aber für uns kein Problem. Wir freuten uns über den Balkon mit prachtvoller Aussicht auf die Skipiste. Personen, welche nicht Ski fahren oder wandern - den gesamten Tag über - würden vielleicht mit dieser
Zimmerausstattung ein Problem haben. Für uns war TV & Co. kein Thema im Zimmer, da wir viel unterwegs waren.
Nicht Funktionierendes wurde rasch behoben. Zuckerkranke und Diät haltende Menschen - Müsli und Brot selbst mitbringen oder im Kaufhaus gegenüber besorgen.

title: Valeur sûre
positive_comment:
Très bel hôtel, propre et accueillant .
Les chambres sont magnifiques et très confortables.

We arrived at 8 PM on Christmas Eve! The staff were kind and waited for us after our long journey, right on the holiday! We thank them from the heart! The room was very clean and spacious! The hotel is in a quiet area, and we welcomed Christmas with snow and the peace we needed! A great place to stay, and we will certainly return for a longer visit! I recommend it!

title: Touring stopover
positive_comment: We had a suite with every extra imaginable, even a washing machine; touring on a bike this was a bonus as weather was so hot. Host friendly and helpful. We had dinner and breakfast, dinner was basic but good value. Lots of parking.

title: molto buono

title: Alles gut!  ( Tutto bene!)
positive_comment: Gasthof molto carino e tipico, gestito da un' intera famiglia. Si trova in una zona collinare in mezzo al verde vicino a Graz ( che si può anche raggiungere in pullman). Camere pulitissime, spaziose e silenziose con letti davvero comodi. Buono il ristorante a fianco , abbiamo gustato un'ottima Wiener Schnitzel e un gustoso gulasch con knödel. Non fatevi mancare il Kaiserschmarrn ( per più persone) e le frittelle di mele, meravigliosi! Accoglienza calorosa ( parlano anche inglese) e buon rapporto qualità prezzo.

title: Gusto ed ospitalità carinziana
positive_comment: Avevamo già soggiornato a Lannach ma in altre strutture e devo dire che la Gasthof Kranerwirt-Niggas non ci ha delusi anzi abbiamo trovato una camera con bagno e balcone della giusta grandezza molto pulita con un ottimo rapporto prezzo-qualità, un personale cortese, disponibile e professionale in un ambiente familiare. Ma la perla del soggiorno è stata l'ottima cena a base di pesce (si proprio pesce fritto in carinthia!) accompagnato da un delizioso Sauvignon Gris locale e servito con cortesia e simpatia dal personale di sala. Speriamo sinceramente di poter avere ancora la possibilità di soggiornare presso la Gasthaus in futuro.
negative_comment: L'arredo del bagno un pò spartano (qualche ripiano in più per poter sistemare le cose) e un'occhiata all'aspiratore che arrancava un pò. Ma comunque piccolezze in un contesto assolutamente positivo.

positive_comment: Per noi era una tappa intermedia di un viaggio per cui la relativa vicinanza all'autostrada è starà ottima dal punto di vista della logistica. Molto apprezzato anche il fatto di aver potuto gustare un'ottima cena  all'interno senza dover uscire alla ricerca di altri ristoranti. Rapporto qualità prezzo buona: esperienza positiva.

title: Buona opportunità vicino a Graz
positive_comment: La camera rispetto a quella utilizzata la settimana precedente era molto carina e di recente ristrutturazione. Con possibilità di accesso al giardino. Buona colazione
negative_comment: Difficoltà di comunicazione con il personale.

title: Wonderful hospitality and perfect stopover

Our room was spacious, modern, and offered stunning views over the vineyards – a perfect place to unwind.

Dinner was a true highlight, with fantastic food and excellent wine pairing recommendations that really elevated the experience.

All in all, a memorable short stay – we would love to come back for a longer visit!

Everything was perfect! From the staff until the breakfast! We will come back for sure.

positive_comment: Fantastic location between the train station and the old city. You can walk everywhere. Great supermarket nearby. Very clean. Fast internet. Friendly staff who let me check in early. I slept very well.
negative_comment: My only issue was that there was no kettle in the room to make a cup of tea. I was very jetlagged and wanted to make a cup of tea at 3am when I was wide awake. The night before I had asked the staff how to use the coffee machine downstairs to make boiling water but it was a hassle having to walk downstairs to make it and carry it back up. The machine also wasn't working so I had to come back upstairs to get my phone and use Google translate to figure out what was wrong (the coffee grind drawer wasn't properly inserted or something). I finally got my boiling water, which was a relief but it would be much more comfortable just to have a kettle in the room. Otherwise, no complaints! I would happily stay here again.

title: Welcoming and comfortable hotel in good location.
positive_comment: Really enjoyed my stay here. Friendly, helpful and welcoming staff. Large room, spotlessly clean and in nice condition; the air-conditioning was very efficient and easy to operate too. Bathroom might be a touch small for some but was fine for me as a solo guest and again, spotless, and with a shower that worked properly. Good breakfast room with terrace and nice selection of breakfast items. Hotel is conveniently located reasonably close to the central rail station - my room was very quiet too. Nothing I didn't like, although it would have been useful to get English subtitles on the TV, but that's not very important. Good value for money: I would happily stay there again.

title: Très bon choix pour un séjour professionnel
positive_comment: Très accueillant, bon emplacement, chambre propre et petit déjeuné correct.

Très bien situé en ligne droite depuis la gare, à l'entrée du centre-ville. Personnel aimable et serviable. Locaux paisibles. C'est un peu moins confortable qu'un Ibis standard mais ça va parfaitement pour ce que nous étions venus faire : dormir.
negative_comment:
Aucun problème digne de ce nom à signaler. Je pourrais juste dire qu'au vu de la place disponible dans la chambre, il pourrait y avoir un peu plus de chaises notamment (en fait il n'y en a pas du tout, juste une sorte de tabouret), et aussi que je ne compris pas comment ménager une obscurité complète, c'est-à-dire comment fermer le store intégralement, il y avait quelques centimètres de fenêtre qui demeuraient forcément découverts. 
Je dois aussi signaler que le lit du dessus, pour l'éventuelle troisième personne, est réservé aux enfants de 6 à 12 ans, donc cette chambre ne convient pas à toutes les personnes voyageant à trois.

title: 15 min drive to Lachtal skiing resort
positive_comment:
The hotel is very tidy and clean. The swimming pool and sauna can be uaed till 9pm. 
Conny at reception was super helpful!
negative_comment: The dinner choices were very limited so 3 nights out of the 4 we couldn't have dinner there (even if it would have been very helpful) as there was no chicken/turkey or pork available in the menu and half my family unfortunately don't like fish or lamb.

title: Kurhotel, wir nutzten zum Übernachten für ein Ski-Wochenende.
positive_comment: Kurhotel, wir nutzten zum Übernachten für ein Ski-Wochenende.
Frühstück war gut und vielfältig. Das Hotel war sauber und die Angestellten freundlich.
negative_comment: Ein großes Minus beim Frühstück ist aber, dass es im Preis inbegriffen nur Filterkaffee gibt, der so dünn ist, dass man kaum was schmeckt. Das wäre heutzutage wirklich nicht nötig, da es sonst fast überall Cappucino oder richtigen Kaffe gibt. Einen halbwegs guten Kaffevollautomaten sollen die sich doch leicht leisten können. Außerdem war es nicht möglich, dass wir Handtücher für die Sauna bekommen haben, da diese nur an der Rezeption erhältlich sind und dort um 18.00 niemand mehr war, obwohl die Sauna bis 21.00 geöffnet ist. Wir mussten also mit unserem einzigen Badehandtuch vom Zimmer in die Sauna gehen und hatten dann nur mehr ein kleines Handtuch zum Duschen. Sowas sollte eigentlich nicht vorkommen. Es wäre so einfach, irgendwo Saunahandtücher bereitzustellen.

positive_comment: Die Zimmer sind überdurchschnittlich groß und mit relativ guten Betten ausgestattet. Auch Kleiderkästen gab es ausreichend. Schwimmbad und Sauna Benutzung zu den Öffnungszeiten möglich. Sehr nettes Personal, Zimmer gut Schall gedämmt. Obwohl wir ein straßenseitiges Zimmer hatten, war kein Verkehrslärm zu hören.
negative_comment: Der Ort bietet nicht viel Abwechslung oder Lokale. Als Wandergegend im Sommer sicher optimal.

title: jederzeit wieder
positive_comment: Frühstück war in Ordnung, das Abendessen war sehr gut, vor allem das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis, das Personal ausgenommen freundlich und hilfsbereit
negative_comment: das Wasser im Pool war mir persönlich zu kalt, die Ausstattung grundsätzlich aber völlig in Ordnung

title: Sieléshez abszolút megfelelő szállás pár napra.
positive_comment: Kultúrált, ár érték arányban abszolút korrekt szálloda. Teljesen megfelelő welness részleg. Kíváló reggeli, amely bőséges. Kedves személyzet. A szállodában alapvetően a legtöbben idős vendégek, de mindenki barátságos volt. Síelés miatt tartózkodtunk itt, Lachtal sífelvonója 15perc autóval.
negative_comment: Nincs a szobában hűtőszekrény. Köntöst sem adnak a welnesshez. A szauna nudista szauna.

positive_comment: Sehr gemütlich und eine gute Atmosphäre. Das Personal war freundlich, das Frühstück lecker und die Lage perfekt für einen kurzen Aufenthalt in Payerbach.
Ich habe einmal übernachtet, Zimmer war super sauber, das Personal sehr freundlich, und ich konnte Sauna, Schwimmbad alles benutzen obwohl ich kein Kurgäste war. Top! 👍

title: Für unseren Kurztrip Ideal- würden Wiederkommen
positive_comment:
Frühstück war super, ausreichend, vielfältig
Abendessen war lecker und mal was anderes
Die Gegend ist sehr schön. Das Essen ist sehr gut. Alle sind freundlich und zuvorkommend. Dadurch das es ein Kurhotel ist, ist es sehr groß und weitläufig. Man kann den Wellnessbereich nutzen.
negative_comment:
Das Bad im Einzelzimmer ist klein und eng.
In den Kästen riecht es ein bisschen

title: Ist gut aber ausbaufähig was das essen betrifft ansonsten alles bestens
positive_comment: Frühstück war sehr gut und ausreichend. Von allem etwas dabei.Da war ich sehr zufrieden.
negative_comment: Mittagessen und Abendessen war ich etwas enttäuscht da es am Buffet von den warmen Hauptspeisen nur eines mit Fleisch und eines vegetarisch war. Absolut keine Auswahl. Hätte gerne von jeden wenigstens 2 bis 3 verschiedene Speisenauswahl gehabt.

title: niedlicher kleiner Ort mit tollem Hotel
positive_comment: Eine Wahnsinns Auswahl beim Frühstück! Da findet sich jeder was ;) Vom Abendessen waren wir jedoch etwas enttäuscht. Das Fleisch war extrem trocken und es war insgesamt relativ fad. Am Speisesaal befindet sich eine tolle Terrasse mit Raucher und Nichtraucher Bereich! Ansonsten bietet das Heimmoorbad sehr viel zusätzlich zu Schwimmbad/Sauna. Der Ort ist total klein und verschlafen aber total nett für Spaziergänge und Wanderungen.
negative_comment: Das ganze Haus ist insgesamt total über wärmt aber ansonsten gab es für uns nichts auszusetzen ;)

Waren sehr zufrieden!!
Sehr schönes hotel, ruhig, viel Grün und alle sehr freundlich! Gutes Essen und Service!
negative_comment: Nichts

positive_comment: das laktosefreie Angebot hat mich positiv überrascht :-)
negative_comment: ein Kühlschrank im Zimmer hat uns gefehlt

title: Clean and excellent price.
positive_comment: It was everything clean, the receptionist was nice and helpful.
negative_comment: I was not so happy with breakfast, I missed sweets and fruits.

positive_comment: Simple accommodation with a parking option near the city centre. For the parking, park in one of the lower floors as the first is reserved for the Bila supermarket, take you ticket to reception and pay the reduced rate which will give you a full 24 hours of parking with a ticket you can use the enter and exit multiple times.
Regular breakfast for a budget hotel. Good coffee, fewer choices of fruits/veggies, but will perfectly keep you going throught the day.
negative_comment: Excellent price/quality ratio. The room feels more like a dorm, but it is very clean.

positive_comment: It was near the centet and clean...the staff was great...great value for the location

title: Value
positive_comment:
Breakfast is good
Value for money, room is great
Staff is lovely
Great spot if you are looking to book cheaper, okay hotel.
negative_comment: Pillows and bed are a bit uncomfortable

title: Value for money
positive_comment: We needed a place near city center, just to stay overnight. Warm, clean & good WiFi. Bathroom configuration is quite interesting but that didn’t bother us. Also receptionist who checked us in was very polite & friendly.

title: Good budget stay with easy parking, but Wi-Fi could be better.
positive_comment: Great value for a one-night transit stay. The price was fair, the room had everything I needed, and the parking was easy to access. The €15 parking fee also felt reasonable.
negative_comment: The only real downside was the slow Wi-Fi — it was difficult to use for anything more than basic browsing.

title: Custo benefício bom. Good cost-benefit.

Prático, funcional e simplificado.
It’s all practical, and easy.

The small room. That is the only bad part. All the rest are pretty good.

title: Hôtel confortable bien situé pour visiter Graz
positive_comment:
Hôtel confortable situé à 10 minutes à pied du centre historique. Chambre très spacieuse et propre. Très bon petit petit déjeuner sous forme de buffet varié dans une salle agréable. Il y a même une terrasse pour les beaux jours.
Quelques places de parking sur réservation.
negative_comment: Mauvaise insonorisation, on entendait la télé du voisin. Ascenseur HS, ça arrive. Parking payant 15€ par jour.

positive_comment: Très agréable, avec possibilité de prendre le petit déjeuner sur la terrasse à l'extérieur. Présence d'un garage à vélo fermé à clé, ce qui est appréciable en ville.
negative_comment: L'ascenseur en panne, mais ce sont des choses qui arrivent.

title: Très bon hôtel de transistor pour motard
positive_comment:
Chambre très correct. Excellent accueil. Possibilité de garer une moto en parking sous terrain en toute sécurité.
Proche du centre ville.
Petit déjeuner de grande qualité.

title: Bon séjour malgré une entrée en matière ratee
positive_comment:
La chambre et la sdb spacieuses et propres, le très bon petit déjeuner servi par une personne très attentionnée
La proximité immédiate de la vieille ville (30 mn à pied)
negative_comment: L'accueil très désagréable pour ne pas dire "foutage de gueule" du monsieur présent à notre arrivée , vendredi a 14 heures : nous avions réservé un parking qui a notre arrivée n'était pas disponible. A la question : ou peut on se garer, réponse : dans la rue, sachant qu'il est absolument IMPOSSIBLE de se garer dans le quartier, tout ceci avec un sourire que je traduis par débrouille toi, ce n'est pas mon problème. J'ai quelque peu élevé la voix, et la : surprise, ce monsieur comprenait et parlait suffisamment le français pour que l'on puisse se comprendre. Il nous a alors indiqué un parking public a quelques centaines de mètres. Le séjour avait très mal débuté mais heureusement, nous n'avons plus eu de contact avec ce personnage et le reste du personnel était parfaitement courtois et attentionne

title: Good value city centre hotel
positive_comment: We chose this hotel for its location half way between the train station and the old town.  Room was nice and quiet, on the courtyard side, with good WiFi and effective air conditioning, comfortable bed and recently refitted shower room. We didn’t try the breakfast. Helpful reception staff.
negative_comment: Be aware that the reception isn’t open 24/7. Tell them your arrival time and be very sure to take your key card with you when you go out from the hotel - you may need it to get back in through the front door.

title: Great facilities, staff and location.
positive_comment:
Everything was wonderful. Favourite place we stayed in Austria.
Staff were helpful, friendly and welcoming.
The facilities were great, the room was huge and it was really quiet at night for sleeping. The bed was huge and we had a little kitchen which was useful.
The shower was powerful with plenty of hot water. 
Just a 10 minute walk into the centre. Perfect!
negative_comment: Nothing!

title: Handy location near station for stop over
positive_comment: Needed a handy place near station for one night - 5 min walk - reasonable and comfortable - short tram ride to centre - all good
negative_comment: No

title: A good quality hotel in a great location.
positive_comment: A good quality hotel in a very handy location. Walking distance to the main train station and also to the centre of town for the restaurant area.
negative_comment: Can’t remember anything I didn’t like.

title: I really enjoyed my stay at Hotel Drei Raben. The location is very convenient, everything was spotlessly clean, and the
positive_comment: Convenient location, cleanliness, polite and attentive staff.

title: A very pleasant and relaxing stay
positive_comment: Location, cleanliness, friendly staff, parking possibilities, welcoming dogs
negative_comment: There are no such things. Just one suggestion - coffee, tea, and number of cups could match the number of guests in the room.

positive_comment: Fantastic location between the train station and the old city. You can walk everywhere. Great supermarket nearby. Very clean. Fast internet. Friendly staff who let me check in early. I slept very well.
negative_comment: My only issue was that there was no kettle in the room to make a cup of tea. I was very jetlagged and wanted to make a cup of tea at 3am when I was wide awake. The night before I had asked the staff how to use the coffee machine downstairs to make boiling water but it was a hassle having to walk downstairs to make it and carry it back up. The machine also wasn't working so I had to come back upstairs to get my phone and use Google translate to figure out what was wrong (the coffee grind drawer wasn't properly inserted or something). I finally got my boiling water, which was a relief but it would be much more comfortable just to have a kettle in the room. Otherwise, no complaints! I would happily stay here again.

title: Great hotel in Graz
positive_comment: Clean room and bathroom, good room size, GREAT air conditioning (one of the coldest i have ever been in), close to train station and city center, helpful staff with remote check in and check out, great price for F1 grand prix weekend
negative_comment: Bathroom was small, which wasn't a problem for me but could be for a lot of people

title: Welcoming and comfortable hotel in good location.
positive_comment: Really enjoyed my stay here. Friendly, helpful and welcoming staff. Large room, spotlessly clean and in nice condition; the air-conditioning was very efficient and easy to operate too. Bathroom might be a touch small for some but was fine for me as a solo guest and again, spotless, and with a shower that worked properly. Good breakfast room with terrace and nice selection of breakfast items. Hotel is conveniently located reasonably close to the central rail station - my room was very quiet too. Nothing I didn't like, although it would have been useful to get English subtitles on the TV, but that's not very important. Good value for money: I would happily stay there again.

negative_comment: Nix

positive_comment:
The staff were very cheerful and helpful. The room was cozy and convenient for one or two people. On top of it all it was conveniently located across from the Basilica, so I could have a quick walk to Mass in order to start the day well! 
Overall, I am very pleased with my stay and I definitely would consider coming back if given the opportunity!

title: Freundlich, familiär, tolle Lage.
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches Hotel im Zentrum von Mariazell, gleich bei der Talstation Bürgeralpe. Unglaublich familiäre Atmosphäre, toller neuer Wellnessbereich.

title: Ein durch und durch schönes Wochenende
positive_comment: Die freundlichen Mitarbeiter ( Fr.Monika an der Rezeption) die herzliche Begrüßung. Die Lage . Die ausgezeichnete Küche.
negative_comment: Es gibt nichts negatives zu berichten.

positive_comment: Sehr guter Standard für Mariazell. Zimmer war sehr geräumig und der gehobenen Klasse entsprechend. Frühstück und Abendessen waren ausgezeichnet und von bester, österreichischer Qualität.
negative_comment: Das Wetter, aber dafür kann das Hotel nix.

positive_comment: Schönes Hotel in toller Lage. Das Essen ist  auch sehr empfehlenswert.

title: Perfect family run hotel in the heart of Mariazell
positive_comment: The hosts cared for us like we were guests in their home, yet it is not a home it’s a lovely hotel in the heart of old town. Our room was lovely with custom furniture and an updated bathroom. The candlelight procession to the basilica walked right past the hotel and was so special. Due to train delays we arrived very late and the restaurant was already closed but the host called other restaurants to find one for us that was open and the hostess even walked outside to lead us there!  The location is just minutes walk from the Basilica and all the shops and restaurants.  Breakfast in the morning was very nice as well. The hotel has been in the family for 6 generations and it is clear they were raised to be good hosts!  Their daughters were there helping mom and dad a bit too and I can tell the hotel will continue to be in good hands when their time comes! I would absolutely recommend this hotel!
negative_comment: We had a slight error with billing, but the kind hosts corrected it very quickly!

positive_comment:
Es war alles wunderbar, das Service, das Frühstück, das Ambiente. Kann es nur weiterempfehlen.

negative_comment: Die Matratze war etwas weich, das Zimmer(211) für mich alleine gut, als Doppelzimmer mit voller Belegung sehr eng.

title: Acogedora
positive_comment: La familia Eder es extremadamente acogedora y me hicieron sentir como en casa y me ayudaron en toda mi logística del viaje. Ideal para quien viaja en tren o autobus por encontrase a pocos metros de la estación.
Colchones muy cómodos. Desayuno correcto. Estuvimos en un apartamento con 2 habitaciones que era muy amplio.

title: Encantadores anfitriones. Amables y serviciales.
positive_comment: Encantadores anfitriones. Uno de los viajeros tuvo un problema al romperse sus gafas y le regalaron unas gafas que le servían. Buen detalle que le resolvió el viaje. Muy agradecidos.

title: Traditional Bed and Breakfast accommodation, handy for rail travel.
positive_comment:
We liked this welcoming family run traditional Pension. At the time of our visit, it was being run on a bed and breakfast basis, but there’s a decent Italian pizzeria restaurant a short walk up the road.  There’s also a small supermarket but that was closed when we arrived on a Saturday afternoon, until Monday morning.  The WiFi in the room was good.
We chose Selzthal for a stopover as it’s very handy for rail travel.
good breakfast, nice people, great overnight stay on the way to Schladming
negative_comment: nothing

title: Comfy little gem
positive_comment: The couple running the place are super nice, the room was small but comfy. The true highlight was the great breakfast served.
Got everything we expected. They served breakfast early which was very nice of them as we needed to go earlier:)
The hosts were very kind and helpful even tough I arrived by bike very late, they even stored my bicycle.

title: Excellent value for money stay. Recommended
positive_comment: Location - very convenient for the station. Spotlessly clean. Nice breakfast. Friendly hosts.
negative_comment: Nothing really, it was all good.

positive_comment: Pleasant accommodation in a town in the middle of the Alps. A good starting point for skiing in Schladming and the surrounding area.

title: Kurhotel, wir nutzten zum Übernachten für ein Ski-Wochenende.
positive_comment: Kurhotel, wir nutzten zum Übernachten für ein Ski-Wochenende.
Frühstück war gut und vielfältig. Das Hotel war sauber und die Angestellten freundlich.
negative_comment: Ein großes Minus beim Frühstück ist aber, dass es im Preis inbegriffen nur Filterkaffee gibt, der so dünn ist, dass man kaum was schmeckt. Das wäre heutzutage wirklich nicht nötig, da es sonst fast überall Cappucino oder richtigen Kaffe gibt. Einen halbwegs guten Kaffevollautomaten sollen die sich doch leicht leisten können. Außerdem war es nicht möglich, dass wir Handtücher für die Sauna bekommen haben, da diese nur an der Rezeption erhältlich sind und dort um 18.00 niemand mehr war, obwohl die Sauna bis 21.00 geöffnet ist. Wir mussten also mit unserem einzigen Badehandtuch vom Zimmer in die Sauna gehen und hatten dann nur mehr ein kleines Handtuch zum Duschen. Sowas sollte eigentlich nicht vorkommen. Es wäre so einfach, irgendwo Saunahandtücher bereitzustellen.

positive_comment: Die Zimmer sind überdurchschnittlich groß und mit relativ guten Betten ausgestattet. Auch Kleiderkästen gab es ausreichend. Schwimmbad und Sauna Benutzung zu den Öffnungszeiten möglich. Sehr nettes Personal, Zimmer gut Schall gedämmt. Obwohl wir ein straßenseitiges Zimmer hatten, war kein Verkehrslärm zu hören.
negative_comment: Der Ort bietet nicht viel Abwechslung oder Lokale. Als Wandergegend im Sommer sicher optimal.

title: Small and nice
positive_comment:
Lovely modern bedroom. Comfortable bed. Very clean. Plenty of sockets and a mini-fridge. The room was quiet even though we were almost next to the main road. 

The receptionist was friendly, informative and helpful. We were able to leave the car in the morning.

It is literally ski-in / ski-out, through the back garden. This was one of the high points.

Breakfast was great. Hotel bar opens until 8pm ( i think). The was a nice billard room with darts, and a lobby area.

Ski storage facilities were good and easily accessed.
negative_comment:
Not the fault of the hotel, but the bus did not arrive in the evening (approx 6.30pm)  to take us down into the town. We had to call a taxi which came quickly and was only around €15. It was a 30 minute walk back to the hotel as we were unable to get a return taxi (as early as 10pm).

The Wellness area was quite small for the size of the hotel. I was told there were 17 rooms, but only 4 beds in the wellness zone, which were all reserved (but not occupied) when we went down to relax for a bit after skiing. 

The bathroom although clean, warm and functioning was a little dated, and the shower cubicle very small.

Hotel lacked a bit of atmosphere in the evening but i guess everyone was down in the town.

title: Comfortable hotel with great sauna
positive_comment: Very comfortable hotel in a walking distance from ski slope with great & new sauna area downstairs. Parking in front of the hotel, short drive from downtown. Worth returning to.
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Perfektes Versteck mit traumhaftem Frühstück!
positive_comment:
Die Unterkunft war absolut perfekt – blitzsauber, geräumig und mit einem unglaublich freundlichen, hilfsbereiten Personal, das uns bei jeder Frage unterstützt hat. Die Zimmer waren modern eingerichtet, mit bequemen Betten und einer wunderschönen Aussicht, die den Aufenthalt noch entspannter machte. Das Frühstück war eines der besten, die wir je hatten: frische Brezeln, Eier, verschiedene Arten von Salami und Gebäck, Saft, Tee, Kaffee– einfach himmlisch Marmeladen,  – einfach himmlisch!

Die Lage ist ideal und ruhig, perfekt für Erkundungen der Stadt. Wir haben uns sofort wie zu Hause gefühlt und kommen definitiv wieder. Herzlich empfohlen!

Another point was the thin sliding door that separated the bedroom and the bathroom, which we didn't like from the perspective of privacy.

I also really liked the little honesty bar where you could get your own drinks and snacks.
negative_comment: There was not much atmosphere in the hotel. People seem to use it only to sleep, the bar was very quiet and no one was ever in the lounge area. title: Preis-Leistung ist Tip-Top.
positive_comment: Für die Auffahrt zur Tauplitz liegt das Hotel praktischen an der Pole-Position. Das Zimmer sehr geräumig und sauber und das Personal super lieb. Wir mussten um 6 Uhr früh los und sie haben uns Lunch-Pakete mitgegeben und noch Kaffee und Tee gemacht.

title: Great Hotel
positive_comment: The location of the hotel is very convenient, as it is situated right in front of the bus stop for the resort. The rooms are quite spacious and were perfect for our family of four. While the breakfast was mostly cold, they did offer eggs—fried one day and scrambled the next. We also had dinner at the hotel restaurant, which was a good experience.
negative_comment: There isn’t much to do in the immediate vicinity of the hotel, though you can walk to the downtown area in about 15 minutes. Additionally—though this is not the hotel’s fault—the first bus to the resort doesn't leave until 9:00 AM, which is the same time the resort opens. Lastly, we found the beds to be a bit hard.

title: Remek szálláshely, jó helyen, barátságos személyzettel, finom kajával.
positive_comment:
Kiváló, bőséges, választékos reggelink volt. Mindenki megtalálta a kedvencét. A vacsora is isteni volt, alig bírtuk megenni. 
A szauna részleg kellemes élményt nyújtott az egész napos síelés után.
negative_comment: Lehetne korábban kezdeni a reggelit (30 perccel), úgy kényelmessebben elérhető lenne a síbusz.

title: Una noche en Thôrl
positive_comment:
Personal muy amable  y atento. Nos acompañaron dos veces para que viéramos la habitación,cuando llegamos aún no la tenían preparada. La habitacion muy completa y las vistas a la montaña de los Alpes espectaculares. 
Desayuno muy bien  y bastante completo.

title: Very happy that we were there...
positive_comment: Excellent breakfast, beautiful view from balcony, great stuff...
negative_comment: Please provide shower gel!

title: Nice guesthouse in beautiful alpine valley
positive_comment: Friendly hosts, extremely quiet location, restaurant on site, good breakfast options, clean rooms.
negative_comment: Limited parking spaces in front of the guesthouse, which can fill up with restaurant guests.

positive_comment: The kindness of the owners, the food, the size of the room, the location :)
Excellent and helpful staff, very good breakfast, possibility to get dinner, quiet room.
negative_comment: Missing dryer for ski boots, weak Wi-Fi.

title: Perfektes Versteck mit traumhaftem Frühstück!
positive_comment:
Die Unterkunft war absolut perfekt – blitzsauber, geräumig und mit einem unglaublich freundlichen, hilfsbereiten Personal, das uns bei jeder Frage unterstützt hat. Die Zimmer waren modern eingerichtet, mit bequemen Betten und einer wunderschönen Aussicht, die den Aufenthalt noch entspannter machte. Das Frühstück war eines der besten, die wir je hatten: frische Brezeln, Eier, verschiedene Arten von Salami und Gebäck, Saft, Tee, Kaffee– einfach himmlisch Marmeladen,  – einfach himmlisch!

Die Lage ist ideal und ruhig, perfekt für Erkundungen der Stadt. Wir haben uns sofort wie zu Hause gefühlt und kommen definitiv wieder. Herzlich empfohlen!

Preis Leistung auf jedenfall gegeben
negative_comment: Lage ist etwas abseits des Geschehens

positive_comment:
Wir hatten einen wundervollen Aufenthalt in dieser Pension! Das Personal ist unglaublich freundlich, stets bemüht und vermittelt ein richtig familiäres Gefühl. Alles ist sehr sauber, gepflegt und wirkt wie neu. Die Zimmer sind wunderschön eingerichtet, die Betten äußerst bequem – man fühlt sich vom ersten Moment an wohl. Das Frühstück war sehr lecker und bot alles, was man braucht. Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis ist für diesen tollen Service absolut top – jeden Euro wert.

Alle Wünsche werden erfüllt, und man bekommt super Auskunft über die Umgebung. Sollten wir wieder einen Skiurlaub in Schladming planen, würden wir definitiv immer wieder in dieser Pension übernachten.

Klare Empfehlung!

positive_comment:

Frühstück gut - frischgemachtes Rührei oder Spiegeleier. Kaffee vom Automat. Parkplatz vor dem Haus.

title: Für mich ein sehr behaglicher , erholsamer Aufenthalt , wenngleich für eine Einzelperson sehr teuer.
positive_comment: Das Frühstück war vielfältig, Pikantes und Süßes, verschiedene Bio-Säfte, Obst und auch Würstchen und Eierspeise. Sehr schön ist die Wiese mit Liegen direkt am See sowie die Terrasse mit Blick auf Trisslwand. Herrlich ist es auch im Indoorpool zu schwimmen.
negative_comment: Ein kleines Detail was mir aufgefallen: Am Pfingstmontag waren am Holzsteg zwei Fauteuils mit Polsterungen und auch zwei Liegen mit angenehmer roter Polsterung. Ich wartete am Dienstag auf die Polsterung der beiden Liegen, wurden aber nicht aufgelegt. Das hat mich verwundert.

title: Lovely hotel
positive_comment: Hotel is super cosy and modern. Room was nice and very clean (bed even had two pillows, which seems to be rare in Austria). We even had a Nespresso machine in the room which was nice. Breakfast was great and never too busy. You could even use the juicer to make your own juice. Parking was directly outside and free. I also really liked the little honesty bar where you could get your own drinks and snacks.
negative_comment: There was not much atmosphere in the hotel. People seem to use it only to sleep, the bar was very quiet and no one was ever in the lounge area. It was also quite a steep icy walk into town and the bus never turned up (the bus after 6pm is also not included with the ski pass so you have to pay if it did turn up).

title: Comfortable stay in a historic building
positive_comment: Comfortable stay in a unique, historic building (former monastery). Good breakfast with decent variety, though fresh vegetables were missing. Convenient on-site parking with plenty of spaces. Perfect for a transit stop.
Ganz nette Pension und eine überaus freundliche Pensionsleitung. Sehr gerne wieder :)

title: Super Unterkunft und sehr freundliche Gastgeber
positive_comment: Das Zimmer war top, die Betten sehr bequem. Das Frühstück war wirklich super. Es wurde einem jeder Wunsch erfüllt. Und die Gastgeber waren unglaublich freundlich und herzlich.
negative_comment: Die Fliesen im Bad sind schon etwas in die Jahre gekommen (optisch). Das restliche Zimmer war super modern und schön.

positive_comment: Das Frühstück war sehr gut, alles was man brauch war da., außer Obst - muss ich persönlich aber auch nicht zum Frühstück haben - Obst esse ich lieber am Nachmittag.  Die Lage würde ich als sehr ruhig und gut bewerten. Wer es nicht so ruhig mag ist hier falsch. Ich persönlich habe diese Ruhe und das Rauschen der Quelle sehr genossen und geschlafen wie ein Baby.
negative_comment: Wir waren für das Nightrace in Schladming dort. Es sind ca. 22 km bis nach Schladming, die Anreise zum Nightrace sollte verkehrstechnisch gut geplant sein. Verbindungen nach Schladming starten in Stein Enns. Man muss also mit dem Auto von Klein Sölk bis nach Stein Enns fahren (für uns war das aber kein Problem) . Zum Slalom fährt ein Schuttlebus (die Abfahrt in Stein Enns um 16:33 Uhr zum Preis für € 15.-- pro Person ist preislich voll Ok, aber wir sind zu spät angekommen... es waren bereits 8 Läufer im Ziel als wir das Zielgelände betreten haben. Ansonsten hat uns alles sehr gut gefallen, die Besitzer Familie war sehr freundlich und liebenswert.

title: Super!!!
positive_comment: Super Pension, mega Gastfreundlichkeit, sehr gutes Bett (selten so gut in einem „fremden“ Bett geschlafen)

Aussicht vom Balkon war sehr schön. Die Gastgeber waren sehr zuvorkommend und lieb. Sehr familiär. Frühstück war lecker und völlig ausreichend. Es hat an nix gefehlt. Abendessen mit Getränke im Durchschnitt 15 Euro pro Person und reichlich das auch Männer satt werden.
Fantastic staff, very nice people. Amazing breakfast and cozy room.

title: Perfekt für ein langes Wochenende
positive_comment:
Sauberes und schön eingerichtetes Hotel mit tollem Blick ins Ennstal. Der Spa Bereich ist schön gestaltet und modern gehalten. Es gibt zwei Saunen und eine Infrarotkabine. Ein Dampfbad wie in der Hotelbeschreibung gibt es nicht. Das Frühstück ist gut und bietet eine recht gute Auswahl.
Das Personal ist wirklich super freundlich und hilfsbereit.
negative_comment: Im gesamten Hotel ist es recht warm, was ein wenig drückend wirkt.

title: Perfektes Versteck mit traumhaftem Frühstück!
positive_comment:
Die Unterkunft war absolut perfekt – blitzsauber, geräumig und mit einem unglaublich freundlichen, hilfsbereiten Personal, das uns bei jeder Frage unterstützt hat. Die Zimmer waren modern eingerichtet, mit bequemen Betten und einer wunderschönen Aussicht, die den Aufenthalt noch entspannter machte. Das Frühstück war eines der besten, die wir je hatten: frische Brezeln, Eier, verschiedene Arten von Salami und Gebäck, Saft, Tee, Kaffee– einfach himmlisch Marmeladen,  – einfach himmlisch!

Die Lage ist ideal und ruhig, perfekt für Erkundungen der Stadt. Wir haben uns sofort wie zu Hause gefühlt und kommen definitiv wieder. Herzlich empfohlen!

title: kann man auf jedenfall weiter empfehlen
positive_comment:
Frühstück war sehr umfangreiche
Personal war sehr freundlich
Preis Leistung auf jedenfall gegeben
negative_comment: Lage ist etwas abseits des Geschehens

positive_comment:
Wir hatten einen wundervollen Aufenthalt in dieser Pension! Das Personal ist unglaublich freundlich, stets bemüht und vermittelt ein richtig familiäres Gefühl. Alles ist sehr sauber, gepflegt und wirkt wie neu. Die Zimmer sind wunderschön eingerichtet, die Betten äußerst bequem – man fühlt sich vom ersten Moment an wohl. Das Frühstück war sehr lecker und bot alles, was man braucht. Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis ist für diesen tollen Service absolut top – jeden Euro wert.

Alle Wünsche werden erfüllt, und man bekommt super Auskunft über die Umgebung. Sollten wir wieder einen Skiurlaub in Schladming planen, würden wir definitiv immer wieder in dieser Pension übernachten.

Klare Empfehlung!

title: Preis-Leistung ist Tip-Top.
positive_comment: Für die Auffahrt zur Tauplitz liegt das Hotel praktischen an der Pole-Position. Das Zimmer sehr geräumig und sauber und das Personal super lieb. Wir mussten um 6 Uhr früh los und sie haben uns Lunch-Pakete mitgegeben und noch Kaffee und Tee gemacht.

title: Great Hotel
positive_comment: The location of the hotel is very convenient, as it is situated right in front of the bus stop for the resort. The rooms are quite spacious and were perfect for our family of four. While the breakfast was mostly cold, they did offer eggs—fried one day and scrambled the next. We also had dinner at the hotel restaurant, which was a good experience.
negative_comment: There isn’t much to do in the immediate vicinity of the hotel, though you can walk to the downtown area in about 15 minutes. Additionally—though this is not the hotel’s fault—the first bus to the resort doesn't leave until 9:00 AM, which is the same time the resort opens. Lastly, we found the beds to be a bit hard.

title: Remek szálláshely, jó helyen, barátságos személyzettel, finom kajával.
positive_comment:
Kiváló, bőséges, választékos reggelink volt. Mindenki megtalálta a kedvencét. A vacsora is isteni volt, alig bírtuk megenni. 
A szauna részleg kellemes élményt nyújtott az egész napos síelés után.
negative_comment: Lehetne korábban kezdeni a reggelit (30 perccel), úgy kényelmessebben elérhető lenne a síbusz.

positive_comment:

negative_comment: Le seul point négatif : les lits qui grincent énormément.

title: Great relaxed stay with amazing food.
positive_comment: Great place for relaxation in nature - the spa pools are quite small, but quiet with plenty of space around them to relax in; the sauna area is large with lots of different types of sauna. The real stand out bit for me was the food - amazing breakfast with a huge selection and excellent high quality food in the evening - even though a lot of it was self service the food was exceptionally well presented and fresh and tasted amazing. Superb value for money.
negative_comment: I was a bit surprised that the staff at reception had very little knowledge of the local area - I asked for a route for a morning run and they couldn't really advise; the same for a local walk. They just tried to sell us a little brochure with walks in the area many of which required a car - we went to tourist information in the village (1km away) and got a free map with many local walks. So I was a bit surprised. I'd have thought that I'd not be the first person wanting to go for a morning run ...

title: The experience was excelent down to every detail.
positive_comment: The spa facilities were outstanding, with the heated pool, saunas, and an amazing view making the experience remarkable. The breakfast was also delicious, and so was the dinner. We also really like the room and the view.

title: Relaxing is the goal
positive_comment: This is our second time at the establishment, and we have no regrets. We really enjoyed all the services offered by the hotel. And as this is our trip to relax, booking with breakfast and dinner included means we don't have to worry about a thing. The variety and quality of the food, both for breakfast and dinner, is definitely one of the reasons we come back. And a great extra is that the bathroom floor is heated.
negative_comment:
Our trip took place during our birthdays, but one of the birthdays was on the day we checked out.
While the birthday person, who had been at the hotel all day, received a hand-written card, balloons, a special arrangement in the room and a cake at dinner, the other birthday person on the day of check-out received nothing. We understand the difference, but at least a personalised card at check-out would have been nice.

title: I plan to go again for more relaxing days.
positive_comment: The staff were outstanding and always helpful, the atmosphere was truly relaxing, and breakfast and dinners very varied, tasty and filling.
negative_comment: Did not get my TV to work but also did not ask - was not there for that.

negative_comment: I liked everything!

title: Extraordinary play zone for kids
positive_comment: Extraordinary kids' space (for 3-10 years) inside the hotel but a couple of fußball tables would make it even better. Decent breakfast. The bathroom was fine but a little tight because toilette room is separate from shower room. We were permitted to stay in a double bed room with our 5yo son (I wish all the hotels had this option).
negative_comment:
At 4pm on Friday almost all parking slots in "check-in" parking area near the hotel were occupied. It is very frustrating for first-time guests because it's not easy to understand the parking system there. We had an annoying deodorizing smell in the room. One ceiling lamp was blinking irregularly and not enough light in general with grey walls as addition.
Roof view from the windows was rather dull. The room did not have a fridge and a kettle.
The room was somewhat different from the hotel pictures: no sofa with a half wall instead separating bed from the working table area.

title: Comfortable hotel that is an excellent choice if you have young children ages 3-11.
positive_comment: There is a play area in the hotel that my 8 year old and 10 year old really loved. It includes a climbing wall, climbing tower, tunnels to crawl through, balancing bars and many, many more things that the children enjoyed climbing on and running through. The hotel is also located near a swimming pool that we walked to and the price of the hotel includes the entrance passes.
negative_comment: There is no refrigerator in the hotel room. The hotel let us keep our food items in the restaurant refrigerator but then we ended up forgetting them when we left (including our thermos bag.) The toilet and the bathroom are separate rooms and I found this to be annoying. I would prefer the toilet to be in the bathroom with the sink and the shower. There are no insect screens on the windows.

positive_comment: Modern, sporty, nice and very familiar place. There is an easily usable bike hiring system. Steierland is wonderful! Springs, rivers, bike routes artistic and religious monuments surrounded by very neat private houses, gardens and rural areas.
negative_comment: In the standard room there's not a cooler/fridge neither air-conditioning.

title: Great stay
positive_comment: We booked this hotel for the weekend with Redbull Ring Austrian F1. It's located at 110km from circuit and the roads are mainly motorways, so in 1h:15 we reached the circuit. Pleasant and helpfull hotel staff, big, nice and clean room with comfortable beds, hotel is new, parking is free in weekends and during the week is 2E per day.
Lovely clean hotel with comfortable rooms. Food in the evening was great, perhaps more choice of hot food at breakfast would be better. Facilities superb with lovely sauna and bowling alley.

positive_comment: Sehr freundliches Personal.  Sehr angenehme Atmosphäre, schön ruhig und erholsam.

title: Schönes Hotel aber bei Buchung über Booking ist man ein Gast 2. Klasse
positive_comment:
Das Essen war sehr gut. Suppe, Salate und Käse gibt es vom Buffet, Vorspeise, Hauptspeise und Nachspeise werden serviert. Das Servicepersonal war auch sehr freundlich.
Das Frühstücksbuffet ist sehr reichhaltig - alles da was man braucht. Eiergerichte werden nach Wunsch frisch zubereitet
Die Zimmer sind groß, schön und sauber.
negative_comment:
Das Personal war eher unfreundlich. An der Rezeption wurden wir sehr unfreundlich begrüßt, da wir über Booking gebucht haben und nicht bei Hotel direkt. Dadurch konnten wir auch unsere Wellcards nicht einlösen - hätte man auch freundlicher kommunizieren können.
Die Sauberkeit bei Pool ließ ein bisschen zu wünschen übrig - Müll der z.B. in der Nähe des Outdoorpools lag wurde das ganze Wochenende über nicht weggeräumt.

title: Extraordinary play zone for kids
positive_comment: Extraordinary kids' space (for 3-10 years) inside the hotel but a couple of fußball tables would make it even better. Decent breakfast. The bathroom was fine but a little tight because toilette room is separate from shower room. We were permitted to stay in a double bed room with our 5yo son (I wish all the hotels had this option).
negative_comment:
At 4pm on Friday almost all parking slots in "check-in" parking area near the hotel were occupied. It is very frustrating for first-time guests because it's not easy to understand the parking system there. We had an annoying deodorizing smell in the room. One ceiling lamp was blinking irregularly and not enough light in general with grey walls as addition.
Roof view from the windows was rather dull. The room did not have a fridge and a kettle.
The room was somewhat different from the hotel pictures: no sofa with a half wall instead separating bed from the working table area.

title: Comfortable hotel that is an excellent choice if you have young children ages 3-11.
positive_comment: There is a play area in the hotel that my 8 year old and 10 year old really loved. It includes a climbing wall, climbing tower, tunnels to crawl through, balancing bars and many, many more things that the children enjoyed climbing on and running through. The hotel is also located near a swimming pool that we walked to and the price of the hotel includes the entrance passes.
negative_comment: There is no refrigerator in the hotel room. The hotel let us keep our food items in the restaurant refrigerator but then we ended up forgetting them when we left (including our thermos bag.) The toilet and the bathroom are separate rooms and I found this to be annoying. I would prefer the toilet to be in the bathroom with the sink and the shower. There are no insect screens on the windows.

positive_comment: Modern, sporty, nice and very familiar place. There is an easily usable bike hiring system. Steierland is wonderful! Springs, rivers, bike routes artistic and religious monuments surrounded by very neat private houses, gardens and rural areas.
negative_comment: In the standard room there's not a cooler/fridge neither air-conditioning.

title: Un séjour relaxant, un endroit idyllique et un accueil performant pour votre compagnon à 4 pattes
positive_comment: Cet hôtel est un paradis pour les animaux de compagnie. Notre Weimaraner a beaucoup apprécié toutes les attentions qui lui étaient dédiées. Les repas sont excellents et suffisamment variés pour que chacun puisse trouver de quoi satisfaire son appétit. La chambre est spacieuse et bien ordonnée. Le spa permet de se relaxer et les services proposés performants à un prix correct.
negative_comment: Ne changez rien, on approche de la perfection. Les prix des encas du bar sont un peu élevés.

title: Great relaxed stay with amazing food.
positive_comment: Great place for relaxation in nature - the spa pools are quite small, but quiet with plenty of space around them to relax in; the sauna area is large with lots of different types of sauna. The real stand out bit for me was the food - amazing breakfast with a huge selection and excellent high quality food in the evening - even though a lot of it was self service the food was exceptionally well presented and fresh and tasted amazing. Superb value for money.
negative_comment: I was a bit surprised that the staff at reception had very little knowledge of the local area - I asked for a route for a morning run and they couldn't really advise; the same for a local walk. They just tried to sell us a little brochure with walks in the area many of which required a car - we went to tourist information in the village (1km away) and got a free map with many local walks. So I was a bit surprised. I'd have thought that I'd not be the first person wanting to go for a morning run ...

positive_comment: Lage, Preis Leistungs Verhältnis, gute Betten, freundliches Personal.

title: Great stay

Pleasant and helpfull hotel staff, big, nice and clean room with comfortable beds, hotel is new, parking is free in weekends and during the week is 2E per day.
Lovely clean hotel with comfortable rooms. Food in the evening was great, perhaps more choice of hot food at breakfast would be better. Facilities superb with lovely sauna and bowling alley.

title: Perfect for few nights.
positive_comment: We have got a big, clean room and they also took care of our dog (blanket, bowl, reward bites).
negative_comment: The breakfast selection was less than I expected.

title: Lovely smaller modern hotel with everything you need for great skiing trip alone or small group
positive_comment:
Great hotel, even they don't have 24/7 reception, I got check-in instructions by email and did self-checkin after 8pm.
There is a small wellness facility directly at hotel till 8pm and great breakfast.
negative_comment:
Wifi wasn't the best in some places (better wifi in hallway than in the room)
No slice of lemon at breakfast, but on the other hand prosecco was great

title: Small and nice
positive_comment:
Lovely modern bedroom. Comfortable bed. Very clean. Plenty of sockets and a mini-fridge. The room was quiet even though we were almost next to the main road. 

The receptionist was friendly, informative and helpful. We were able to leave the car in the morning.

It is literally ski-in / ski-out, through the back garden. This was one of the high points.

Breakfast was great. Hotel bar opens until 8pm ( i think). The was a nice billard room with darts, and a lobby area.

Ski storage facilities were good and easily accessed.
negative_comment:
Not the fault of the hotel, but the bus did not arrive in the evening (approx 6.30pm)  to take us down into the town. We had to call a taxi which came quickly and was only around €15. It was a 30 minute walk back to the hotel as we were unable to get a return taxi (as early as 10pm).

The Wellness area was quite small for the size of the hotel. I was told there were 17 rooms, but only 4 beds in the wellness zone, which were all reserved (but not occupied) when we went down to relax for a bit after skiing. 

The bathroom although clean, warm and functioning was a little dated, and the shower cubicle very small.

Hotel lacked a bit of atmosphere in the evening but i guess everyone was down in the town.

title: Comfortable hotel with great sauna
positive_comment: Very comfortable hotel in a walking distance from ski slope with great & new sauna area downstairs. Parking in front of the hotel, short drive from downtown. Worth returning to.
negative_comment: Nothing.

negative_comment: Compared how nice and new everything in this hotel is, maybe the bathroom in my room could be better

positive_comment: The hotel has no restaurant, but many options are close by. The breakfast is standard, but good buffet including some great bio cheese selection, juices, granolas, homemade bread and many others. Our room was clean and comfortable. On the first day, we arrived late and the reception was not open anymore, but we could do a self-checkin and the receptionist was very helpful through the phone too.
negative_comment:
Originally, we wanted a room with AC, but somehow we managed to book one without, but this is probably my fault. Be careful with the pictograms when booking though, because it seems not every room at Erzherzog has AC. The nights are cool enough though to make up for it anyway.

Another point was the thin sliding door that separated the bedroom and the bathroom, which we didn't like from the perspective of privacy.

positive_comment:
Beste , everything was super!
Many thanks to all the staff members!
Once the free getaway days are found , definitely will come back again
Nice hotel,  on good location.  Very delicious breakfast.

title: Lovely hotel
positive_comment: Hotel is super cosy and modern. Room was nice and very clean (bed even had two pillows, which seems to be rare in Austria). We even had a Nespresso machine in the room which was nice. Breakfast was great and never too busy. You could even use the juicer to make your own juice. Parking was directly outside and free. I also really liked the little honesty bar where you could get your own drinks and snacks.
negative_comment: There was not much atmosphere in the hotel. People seem to use it only to sleep, the bar was very quiet and no one was ever in the lounge area. It was also quite a steep icy walk into town and the bus never turned up (the bus after 6pm is also not included with the ski pass so you have to pay if it did turn up).

title: Great place for winter sports enthusiasts !
positive_comment: Direct access to ski trail from the hotel. Nice and clean. Comfy saunas. Car park available outside.
negative_comment: Although breakfasts were tasty and fresh they were a bit monotonous and the same products were offered every single day. Hotel rooms/apartments lack electric kettle which would be very welcome by the guests.

title: Great hotel, lovely location, Schladming was great
positive_comment: Location was great, ski in and ski out, going into town was a 15 minute walk or a 5 min cab ride of 15,- euro

positive_comment: The hotel has no restaurant, but many options are close by. The breakfast is standard, but good buffet including some great bio cheese selection, juices, granolas, homemade bread and many others. Our room was clean and comfortable. On the first day, we arrived late and the reception was not open anymore, but we could do a self-checkin and the receptionist was very helpful through the phone too.
negative_comment:
Originally, we wanted a room with AC, but somehow we managed to book one without, but this is probably my fault. Be careful with the pictograms when booking though, because it seems not every room at Erzherzog has AC. The nights are cool enough though to make up for it anyway.

Another point was the thin sliding door that separated the bedroom and the bathroom, which we didn't like from the perspective of privacy.

title: Lovely hotel
positive_comment: Hotel is super cosy and modern. Room was nice and very clean (bed even had two pillows, which seems to be rare in Austria). We even had a Nespresso machine in the room which was nice. Breakfast was great and never too busy. You could even use the juicer to make your own juice. Parking was directly outside and free. I also really liked the little honesty bar where you could get your own drinks and snacks.
negative_comment: There was not much atmosphere in the hotel. People seem to use it only to sleep, the bar was very quiet and no one was ever in the lounge area. It was also quite a steep icy walk into town and the bus never turned up (the bus after 6pm is also not included with the ski pass so you have to pay if it did turn up).

title: Small and nice
positive_comment:
Lovely modern bedroom. Comfortable bed. Very clean. Plenty of sockets and a mini-fridge. The room was quiet even though we were almost next to the main road. 

The receptionist was friendly, informative and helpful. We were able to leave the car in the morning.

It is literally ski-in / ski-out, through the back garden. This was one of the high points.

Breakfast was great. Hotel bar opens until 8pm ( i think). The was a nice billard room with darts, and a lobby area.

Ski storage facilities were good and easily accessed.
negative_comment:
Not the fault of the hotel, but the bus did not arrive in the evening (approx 6.30pm)  to take us down into the town. We had to call a taxi which came quickly and was only around €15. It was a 30 minute walk back to the hotel as we were unable to get a return taxi (as early as 10pm).

The Wellness area was quite small for the size of the hotel. I was told there were 17 rooms, but only 4 beds in the wellness zone, which were all reserved (but not occupied) when we went down to relax for a bit after skiing. 

The bathroom although clean, warm and functioning was a little dated, and the shower cubicle very small.

Hotel lacked a bit of atmosphere in the evening but i guess everyone was down in the town.

positive_comment: Very comfortable hotel in a walking distance from ski slope with great & new sauna area downstairs. Parking in front of the hotel, short drive from downtown. Worth returning to.

title: Perfect value for money. We are regular guests staying at this Juffa hotel for WE skiing at Weineben
positive_comment: The nature around, billiard, nice breakfast, kind staff let us to play billiard a bit after their official hours. Excellent espresso coffee for breakfast, plenty of fruit and vegetables. Wellness is well equipped with different saunas, open area, tea and snacks, very clean. Parking lots always available.
negative_comment: The other users of sauna did not behave well: talking loudly, overheating and cooling the finnish sauna without considering preferences of other users, water was all over the floors after they've used showers, etc. My suggestion is that staff should from time to time come and check the wellness area. Unfortunately the written rules of usage are not enough.

positive_comment: The stuff was friendly, responded quickly and communicated professionally. I was arriving late and they gladly left the key for the room in a special locker at the entrance. The stuff was already there at 6:40, they prefilled the registration form, which allowed quick and early check out. The breakfast was a solid buffet and was already there at 7:00 as promised.
Great stay, big territory, nice staff and great breakfast

Das Zimmer war sehr groß mit Blick auf die Berge. Das Personal war auch sehr freundlich und die Zimmer sehr sauber.

Ich fragte über früheres Einchecken nach einem Krankenhaustermin um 13 Uhr. Dafür sollte ich 25 Euro extra bezahlen. Das finde ich unverhältnismäßig!

title: Ich komme gerne wieder
positive_comment: Alles da, was ich brauche. Ruhiges Zimmer, gute Lage, gutes Frühstück
Sehr schöner und gemütlicher Frühstücksraum und ausgiebiges Buffet.

title: Einfach tipptopp
positive_comment: Hotel mitten im Ort. Altes Kloster - sehr angenehm und erwürdig. Frühstück war sehr gut und alles frisch. Zimmer und Bett nicht mehr ganz neu, aber sehr sauber und schön.
Unkomplizierter Check-In/Out, alles gut beschriftet und direkt im Zentrum. Frühstück toll!
La chambre familiale était top. Personnel super sympa. Beaucoup d’activités dans l’hôtel pour les familles. Cadre agréable.

title: Perfect value for money. We are regular guests staying at this Juffa hotel for WE skiing at Weineben
positive_comment: The nature around, billiard, nice breakfast, kind staff let us to play billiard a bit after their official hours. Excellent espresso coffee for breakfast, plenty of fruit and vegetables. Wellness is well equipped with different saunas, open area, tea and snacks, very clean. Parking lots always available.
negative_comment: The other users of sauna did not behave well: talking loudly, overheating and cooling the finnish sauna without considering preferences of other users, water was all over the floors after they've used showers, etc. My suggestion is that staff should from time to time come and check the wellness area. Unfortunately the written rules of usage are not enough.

positive_comment: The stuff was friendly, responded quickly and communicated professionally. I was arriving late and they gladly left the key for the room in a special locker at the entrance. The stuff was already there at 6:40, they prefilled the registration form, which allowed quick and early check out. The breakfast was a solid buffet and was already there at 7:00 as promised.
Great stay, big territory, nice staff and great breakfast
Nice terrace. Viuld have more tables there. Open restaurant in the evening. Great Hugo drink. Good breakfast.
negative_comment: American pancakes dough should be improved.

title: Great place for families
positive_comment:
Room was cosy and nice. The hotel is very clean. There are many activities for the kids, playground, bowling etc. Breakfast had many options and dinner was good. Staff is great, unfortunately don't know her name but the lady on the reception was amaizing to us. We liked it and will coke back. 

The only negative would be that it was too hot in the room at night, had to open windows to let some fresh air in..
The hotel offers a variety of sports and relaxing entertainment for children and adults. The food is varied and delicious.
It provided additional content for kids, familly and group of friends

negative_comment: Position and breakfast

positive_comment: Klient specialist in Reception was exellent. Room was comfortable and clean. I missed breakfest time, but in Check-out time Receptionist she immediatelly react and finded for me coffe and some tasty bread with cheese. I felt so thankfull! That was very kind from her.
negative_comment: All was fine.

title: Pleasant!
positive_comment: The surrounding area is nice, calm, good freash air! Nice place to relax! The breakfast was good (bread several types, cold vegetables, hot vegetable ragu and cold cuts, fried bacon, sausage, marmelade, scrambled egg, pancake, coffe, tea, orange juice etc) .  The playground for children, the big terrace, view, the beach was wonderfull! Worth to rent e-bike (Therme Nova hotel) and cycle around! And there are also some turist trails, and the little town Maria Lankowitz with Maria churche. (But not worth to walk around the lake).
negative_comment:
Breakfast meal were quite repetitive (every morning exactly the same). Some variation would be nice ! Evening meal: good but could be improved a little bit!  One evening we had nice diner (two types of meat, rice,  poteto, vegetable, salade, dessert, but the following day there were less good meal. Last year we were in an other JUFA hotel, and the meal were better, more variety.
(I would suggest to use some parfume to wash the towels, bc they have strange smell (vineger-desinfection?), however they were absolutely clean.)
