title: Remains a charming place
positive_comment: The EJH is a fascinatingh otels full of history and charm. Unique and unreplacable. I love everything about it. I chose an unexpensive single room that turned out to be a little bit sad, in the back and with a view on the wall of the next building in the alley. I know there are princely rooms.
negative_comment: I am not a fan of moral restrictions on WiFi as the morality of accessible sites can be questioned just as easily and restrictions do not lead to desired outcomes. I also thought that the large towel was on the thin side.

positive_comment:

I slept very well- thank you

title: Great location and lovely hotel, staff super friendly and helpful.
positive_comment: Great location and in walking distance to everywhere. Parking nearby.

title: One of the best places to stay in Graz
positive_comment: The structure, the proximity to city centre and all the important moments. The staff is very cooperative and helpful. Took good care of us.
Excellent location and service, good breakfast. Fantastic bar inside.
negative_comment: A bit pricey given overall quality.

positive_comment: Good location  in a middle of the city centre, near all the sights. Shower was great and the bed was comfortable. Reception staff was very friendly.

title: Id return
positive_comment: It was very comfortable and ideally located! Thirty seconds from the main square

title: Great base to explore this beautiful city from
positive_comment: Spacious room in beautiful old building - very quiet despite city centre location. Great cocktails in the onsite cocktail bar - very skilled mixologists. Very enjoyable stay in beautiful Graz.

title: Un alojamiento con una historia y arquitectura excepcional, con una ubicación inmejorable.
positive_comment: Realmente la situación y arquitectura del alojamiento es lo que me atrapó para reservarlo. La historia del alojamiento dentro de la ciudad antigua de Graz, junto con la excelente ubicación en la misma Hauptplatz (plaza principal) y su arquitectura antigua, la orientación de mi habitación, el patio central con la vegetación y el comedor en planta baja y todos los servicios alrededor del alojamiento han hecho mi estancia muy cómoda, ya que lo tienes todo a dos pasos, y puedes visitar la ciudad caminando o utilizando los tranvías gratuitos del centro.
negative_comment: La habitación individual que reservé es una habitación de techos altos, lo cual es agradable, pero es muy parca en mobiliario, eché de menos un escritorio útil para trabajar, ya que se encontraba la televisión y la kettle; asimismo, el tamaño de la habitación lo encontré muy justo, así como el tamaño de la cama y su ubicación. La iluminación me parecía muy pobre. Para utilizarla como habitación de turismo es suficiente, pero para trabajar unos días es una habitación que no es muy acogedora.

positive_comment: La habitación era gigante, super espaciosa al igual que el baño. Todo muy limpio y ordenado. El personal del front desk amable. Aunque no hay estacionamiento propio, hay un centro comercial a un lado en donde te estacionas sin problema.

title: Localización y encanto
positive_comment: La localización excelente. En pleno centro cerca de todo. El interior precioso. Con un patio y balcones llenos de plantas. El personal de recepción y del desayuno amables.
negative_comment: No hay casi productos de baño.

positive_comment: La ubicación muy buena y el personal estupendo, tanto el chico  de recepción como los camareros del bar Y el personal del desayuno, las   instalaciones perfectas

title: Hotel histórico en todo el centro de Graz
positive_comment: Esta en todo el centro de Graz, sales a la misma plaza de Hautzplatz. Ocupamos una suite que tenia un tamaño enorme, ideal para una familia de cuatro o incluso cinco personas. Techos altísimos, impresionantes, igual que el tamaño del baño. Camas comodisimas. Bien aislado del ruido exterior.
negative_comment: No está renovado recientemente pero tiene un gran encanto. Aunque algo decadente, aún guarda ese sabor de gran hotel de lujo de otras épocas. Nos gustó alojarnos allí.

positive_comment: Es muy cómodo, esta justo en el casco histórico y es muy bonito.
negative_comment: Todo bien

title: Tre meravigliosi giorni a Graz
positive_comment: Ubicato in pieno centro storico, a due passi dalla piazza principale, questo hotel è l’ideale per scoprire la città comodamente a piedi. Ho apprezzato l’eleganza della struttura, l’arredamento della camera (con bollitore e minibar) e soprattutto il letto molto comodo. Il bagno era pulito e funzionale, con una bella doccia spaziosa. Possibilità di lasciare i bagagli dopo il check out, per un ultimo giro prima di partire. Alla reception lo staff è stato molto disponibile a fornire informazioni sulle mete da visitare.
negative_comment: Essendo un palazzo storico, probabilmente i serramenti delle finestre andrebbero rivisti, ma comunque si chiudevano molto bene e in camera c’era una clima adatto alla stagione.

positive_comment: Ottima posizione centrale, disponibilità di garage
negative_comment: Nulla da segnalare

title: Perfetto
positive_comment: L’interno è stupendo, la posizione è centralissima e la soluzione del parcheggio nel garage del centro commerciale è super comoda, praticamente esci dal centro commerciale e la porta accanto e’ l’albergo.

title: HOTEL BELLO E POSIZIONE PERFETTA
positive_comment:
La posizione dell’hotel è perfetta per visitare la città.
Altrettanto comodo il vicino parcheggio
Le stanze sono ampie e il design dell’hotel molto bello
negative_comment: Un hotel così bello merita maggior attenzione nella colazione

title: Vacanza a Graz
positive_comment: Posizione centrale, albergo storico, cortesia e accoglienza dello staff, colazione
negative_comment:
Nulla
Tutto perfetto

title: Ottimo per una visita a Graz
positive_comment:
Posizione centralissima a 30 metri dalla piazza principale. Atrio interno molto scenografico ed arredato con gusto.
Colazione ottima e molto bella la collocazione. Stanza molto ampia e tranquilla.
Parcheggio ampissimo nel silos adiacente, accesso all'Hotel passando dal centro commeciale. Prenotando in anticipo è possibile riservare un posto auto davanti all'Hotel.
negative_comment: Da tenere presente che nei giorni festivi il centro commerciale è chiuso e per accedere al parcheggio  si deve passare dall'ingresso pubblico, a circa 300 metri dall'Hotel.

positive_comment:
Posizione perfetta.
Personale super ( se conosci l inglese)
hall molto scenica.
negative_comment: In generale le rifiniture della stanza non sono granchè

positive_comment: Hotel in pieno centro vicino alla piazza Hauptplatz , la piazza principale....se si arriva in auto il garage dista 5 min a piedi essendo in zona pedonale..struttura ottima, pulita e staff cordiale...non poteva esserci hotel migliore riguardo posizione e rapporto qualità prezzo

title: Sarebbe stato bello avere un altro giorno a disposizione
positive_comment: Posizione strategica per visitare tutte le attrazioni
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Soggiornare in centro a graz
positive_comment:
Posizione fantastica per visitare la
Città, in pieno centro, a due passi dal fiume, dal castello e dalla piazza del municipio. Comodissimo il
Parcheggio sotterraneo convenzionato, a due minuti a piedi. Accettano cani anche nella sala colazione, per noi è stato un plus. Albergo molto bello e curato, consiglio vivamente. Colazione buona con scelta tra dolce, salato, frutta e yogurt.
negative_comment: Le camere sono un pochino datate ma comunque accoglienti

positive_comment:
I visited the Bar after my srrival (about 10pm), Barman = showman was very impressive.
No Breakfast, as i had to meet people…
I slept very well- thank you

Das Hotel liegt im absoluten Zentrum der Altstadt von Graz. Alle Sehenswürdigkeiten sind bequem zu Fuß zu erreichen. Sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal. Man parkt in einer öffentlichen Tiefgarage direkt neben dem Hotel. Vor dem Hoteleingang befindet sich eine Kurzparkzone zum Be- und Entladen. Restaurants in der Nähe vorhanden.
negative_comment:
Das Zimmer war recht dunkel. Ganz allgemein mögen wir die schiefen und knarzenden Böden von alten Häusern nicht so gerne. Die Minibar im Zimmer könnte wenigstens ein Mineralwasser enthalten und nicht bloß die Funktion eines leeren Kühlschranks haben.
Der Zimmersafe ist auf dem Boden des Schrankes angebracht. Man muss sich auf den Fußboden legen um ihn bedienen zu können.

title: Super Annehmlichkeiten, traumhafte Gegend
positive_comment: Schöne Lage in einem ruhigen, malerischen Ort. Sehr gutes Essen. Freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal. Wellnessbereich gut ausgestattet mit finnischer Sauna, Biosauna, Dampfbad, Pool, Kneippbecken, mehreren Ruheräumen. Die Sauna ist “nur” von 14-19h in Betrieb, Energie ist schließlich ein teures Gut. Insgesamt sehr sauber. Wir hatten ein schönes und hochwertig renoviertes Zimmer. Die Betten sind ausgesprochen bequem. E-Auto konnte für 25c/kWh geladen werden. Mehrere, vielfältige Wander-, Spazier- und Radrouten haben den Ausgangspunkt direkt beim Hotel und die Umgebung ist herrlich mit sanften Hügeln und weitläufigen Wäldern. Preis/Leistung sowie Erholungswert top!

positive_comment: Das „Mein Hotel Fast“ in Wenigzell überzeugt durch seine ruhige Lage im Herzen der steirischen Natur und bot für uns ideale Bedingungen als Erholungssuchende. Mit modernen, komfortabel ausgestatteten Zimmern, regionaler Küche und einem freundlichen Service schafft das Hotel eine angenehme Wohlfühlatmosphäre. Besonders hervorzuheben ist der sehr zuvorkommende Service, sei es im Restaurant, am Empfang/Rezeption oder dem Roomcleaningpersonal. Auf individuelle Wünsche wird eingegangen und auch wie in unserem Fall bei einer verkehrsbedingten späteren Anreise auf das Wohlergehen (kostenloses Zimmerupgrade & Essen auf dem Zimmer) der Gäste eingegangen. Der Aufenthalt wird mit einem wirklich schönen Wellnessbereich abgerundet. Damit eignet sich das Hotel sowohl für entspannte Kurzurlaube als auch für längere Aufenthalte.
Sehr nettes Personal, ganz tolle Küche. Schöner Wellnessbereich. Haben uns wieder mal rundum wohl gefühlt.

Al suo interno ha un piccolo shop, davvero molto comodo per bevande fresche e gelati.
La colazione a Buffet non é esagerata, ma ha tutto ciò che serve, anche proposte senza Lattosio.
Le camere molto pulite e ordinate e il servizio di pulizia della camera é eccellente.
Molto buona anche la scelta al ristorante (con opzioni anche vegane e vegetariane!!) e il personale molto simpatico!
Alla reception, se chiesto, é possibile avere uno sconto per le Terme di Fohnsdorf.

positive_comment: La camera era pulita e spaziosa e anche silenziosa. L'albergo è vicinissimo all'uscita dell'autostrada e al circuito di F1. Il personale è stato molto gentile. Un ringraziamento particolare allo staff che, di notte, ha consentito l'ingresso in camera per il pernottamento di nostro figlio, pur non essendo incluso nella prenotazione. Unico piccolo neo la colazione, da rivedere. Ma questi sono gusti personali

This hotel is in a super location for the Red Bull Ring and has plenty of parking and is located next to a petrol and service station for convenience
The hotel is clean and tidy and the rooms are spacious and have all the facilities you would need
Breakfast is self service with a continental selection of food available, as well as teas coffees and also juices, toaster for bread as well as fresh bread and pastries, boiled eggs and cheeses as well as cereals etc    
For evening meals the hotel has a restaurant with a selection of food, traditional Austrian as well as Burgers and Pastas
Everything perfect!!! Alles tip top! Ich empfehle gerne!

If you're visiting Red Bull Ring location is perfect - 2-3mins by car and you're there.
Clean and spacious rooms.
Pleasant and helpful staff.
Tasty and big portions of the menu meals.
Gas station in the hotel area where price is probably the best across all Austria.
Huge parking lot, possibility to park bus, cars with trailers and etc.
negative_comment: Breakfast assortment is quite poor

title: Nice “pit stop” in Spielberg 😀
positive_comment:
Interesting place with the specific motorcycle theme which our kids loved.
The room was very spacious and clean.
The breakfast offer was good.
Bedroom overlooking the Dachstein Mountain fantastic. Hotel was very quiet so use of the rooftop pool was great. Food was delicious.

title: einfach wunderschön, besonders für Menschen die Schlösser lieben
positive_comment: Ambiente, Personal super besonders Jasmina sorgte sich um uns, Lage zum Ort, Restaurant super
An excellent location, central, very good and rich breakfast, clean rooms and a motoring atmosphere. We will return to the same location every time we come to Red Bull Ring

positive_comment: Wir haben ein Hotel in Nähe des RedBull-Ringes gesucht und das Hotel Ringrast gefunden - ein super cooles Hotel mit einer mega genialen Ausstattung und Deko! Das gesamte Personal war so freundlich und nett - wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt!!

title: Egal wo, äußerst freundliches Personal, alles sauber, sehr nahe zum Ring.
positive_comment: Ausgezeichnetes Frühstück mit sehr freundlichem und bemühtem Personal.
negative_comment: Die Ablagemöglichkeiten beim Waschbecken fehlen/könnten größer sein.

title: Sehr, sehr cool!
positive_comment:
Tolles Restaurant, das durch die freundliche Bedienung, ausgezeichnetem Essen und extravaganten Interieur sehr beeindruckt! 
Gratulation! 👌🏻
Sehr nettes zuvorkommendes Personal, Fühstück ausgezeichnet...ideale Lage nähe des Redbullrings...
Gutes Frühstück, jedes Zimmer hat eine andere Rennstrecke als Thema
Das Hotel war sehr sauber und schön. Alles war bestens, und das Personal war ausgesprochen nett und aufmerksam. Es ist wirklich mindestens ein 5-Sterne-Hotel und absolut empfehlenswert. :)

Ich war mit meinem Vater eine Nacht da und wir haben uns sehr wohl und aufgehoben gefühlt.

Das Personal war super freundlich, von der Dame an der Rezeption bis zu dem Personal im Restaurant und das Zimmer war sehr sauber und gepflegt. Wir hatten auch einen Balkon, der sehr groß und schön war.

title: Immer wieder eine Reise für einen Kurztrip empfehlenswert. Preis- Leistung stimmt.
positive_comment: Zentral gelegen und viele Parkplätze vor dem Haus. Das kulinarische Angebot war hervorragend und das Personal stehts freundlich und aufgestellt.
negative_comment: Kann nichts bemängeln. Der angebotene Standard hat den Erwartungen entsprochen.

title: Beim nächsten Mal, buchen wir wieder hier.
positive_comment: Lage optimal, fast neben dem Red Bull Ring, Abendessen und Frühstück sehr gut, Personal sehr freundlich.

title: Für Übernachtungen bei der Durchreise Top 👍🏻. Für längere Aufenthalte würde ich es nicht buchen, da neben der Autobahn g
positive_comment:
Die Zimmer sind geräumig und komfortabel. 
Die Kellner im Restaurant standen sofort für Rückfragen bereit und waren sehr höflich und freundlich! Da haben wir uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
negative_comment: Der Check In Automat hat die Ankunft ein wenig getrübt. Vor allem da „die Rezeption von 7 bis 19 Uhr besetzt“ ist laut Info. Die Tankstelle direkt vor dem Eingang war auch ein wenig ernüchternd.

positive_comment: Spacious and modern room. Check-in was done digitally on a machine at the hotel entrance with minor difficulties which were easily resolved the next morning by more than helpful reception staff.
negative_comment: Breakfast buffet is somewhat small but adequate.

title: Good for a short stay. Near highway.
positive_comment: Hotel is near Red Bull ring. Great for a short stay.

title: Thematic design and close to RedBull Ring
positive_comment: The rooms are clean, modern and spacious, I loved the thematic style of the hotel, the breakfast had a good selection including vegan options, and it’s very close to the Red Bull Ring.
negative_comment: Would be great if the buffet offered more vegan options, like soy or coconut yogurt, peanut butter, vegan cheese or hummus.

title: One night stay
positive_comment:
Convenient location if you are visiting the Red Bull Ring and the Military Aviation Museum. But there are no other attractions nearby (only a children's playroom nearby). There is a Bar down stairs. Self check-in was a nice surprise.
The breakfast selection was not extensive, especially for the children. But we didn't leave hungry.
negative_comment: The air conditioner did not work properly, the air in the room did not cool down to a comfortable temperature throughout the night. In the evening, when you open the window, you can hear the noise of cars from the highway, also you can feel the "country" smell, if you know what I mean :) But the room has good sound insulation, when closed, you can't hear the street noise.

positive_comment: Top location if you are visiting the Red Bull Ring. Clean and comfortable. The restaurant and bar are great.
An excellent location, central, very good and rich breakfast, clean rooms and a motoring atmosphere. We will return to the same location every time we come to Red Bull Ring

title: Sehr empfehlenswert!
positive_comment: Das  Hotel bietet ein rundum Sorglospaket, das keine Wünsche offen lässt! Es wird täglich frisch und regional gekocht. Das Personal geht auf die Wünsche der Gäste ein und dies in einer freundlichen, familiären Art. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
negative_comment: Auch nach längerem Nachdenken, fällt uns nichts ein.

title: A comfortable stay for those wanting to eat and sleep well and stay close to the ski track!
positive_comment: We stayed in the area wanting to be close to the Jogllandloipe cross country skiing track, and we needed a place that offered dinner (we also got the midday lunch-snack which was extra great!). The hotel was comfortable, staff very pleasant and it was important to us that there's a place where we can make tea any hour of the day/ night. (A kettle in the room and some mugs would be even better but the selection of fruit and nuts and hot water in the living room worked great too). Everyone was so nice to our dog and the little town is very pleasant to walk around. We even had to get our car fixed which worked without any problem! :)
Great location if you like hiking and having a rest, too.

title: Best value for money possible in Styria
positive_comment:
Everything was wonderful, especially the people at the hotel and the amazing food (full pension even though only half pension booked).
Dog was no problem and relatively cheap with 10€ per night extra.
Massage extremely nice and also possible on a Saturday.
Wellness area perfect if you are into saunas, not so much for swimming as only a tiny little indoor pool available .
We took some hikes in the area - really easy as all routes are conveniently marked.
negative_comment: Saunas only active after 2pm, that’s why only 9/10.

title: We came down from Northern Ireland and had an excellent and absolutely extraordinary time.
positive_comment: The food / wines and service was just extraordinary. Charming, very thoughtful and absolutely brilliant staff. The entire hotel feels like home from the first moment. We enjoyed the lovely SPA and sauna area. Loved the atmosphere and the location in the center of the beautiful village. Lots of stunning scenery and walks/hikes just outside of the hotel. Family Fast and the entire staff offered an excellent experience.

title: Excellent, very cozy and relaxing place with many hiking and biking opportunities in the area!
positive_comment:
Dream place for active people with a nice storage room for bikes, the wellnes area is small but enough and the pool outside has an amazing design.The water is cold but perfect for cooling after sauna or swimming.

The food was good, we had half boarding but was actually full boarding because the “midday snack” is actually warm (soup, one dish and salad)

title: A weekend getaway for two
positive_comment: Delicious and perfectly prepared dinner, good selection for breakfast, clean and newly renovated room, helpful and kind staff, good wellness area with different saunas and steam bath.
negative_comment: The pool within the hotel is very small compared to how it looks on the pictures. Nevertheless, there is a bigger swimming pool with more whirlpools just 200 metres up the road and the entry for hotel guests is free.

title: Cozy hotel in a pleasant enviroment
positive_comment: The cosy hotel is located in a charming village. The room was spacious and confortable. Our half-board was upgraded full board. There were various and healthy foods, nice staff in the restaurant. Although the pool in the spa was small, there was pleanty of space in the rest areas, the hotel did not seem crowded.

Sehr schöner Wellnessbereich. 
Alles perfekt....ich komme wieder

title: Es war eine perfekte Woche für uns im Pehab !
positive_comment: Die Lage im Ort, der Service im Haus und das hervorragende Essen haben eine glatte 10 von 10 verdient!

title: Erholsame Auszeit
positive_comment: Sehr freundliches Personal, sehr sauber, schön eingerichtete, helle Zimmer, traumhaftes Spa mit Blick auf die Berge.
Super Lage, tolles Spa, sehr gutes Essen, sehr freundliche Mitarbeiter
negative_comment: Alles bestens 😊

positive_comment: Besondere Küche,gute Lage für vielfältigen Wintersport

Es war wirklich alles sehr schön. Der Swimmingpool im Dach mit Blick auf die Berge ist sensationell und die ganze Wellness Etage ist sehr schön gestaltet.
Abendessen ist einfach phantastisch. Exquisite Und abwechslungsreiche Küche.
negative_comment: Die Kopfkissen hätten weicher sein können, die Bettdecken waren zu warm.

title: a surprise gem
positive_comment: We were very pleasantly surprised - it was an almost last minute booking, so we did not have high expectations but wow! In the very heart of a picturesque village, a family-run-style hotel that proves that old school hospitality (more than a couple of centuries of experience belt if I remember correctly!) can still keep up & get constant comfy modern add-ons & updates. The restaurant offered a good playground to a chef who seemed to have fun in going beyond the tried & tested; good selection of wines (and yes, Austria is getting better & better at this). Oh, and everything gets even better with the spa, and massages…not to miss. So good that we would really hope to come back for longer.
Friendly helpful staff, spacious bedroom and delicious food.
negative_comment: The only children’s playground was out of order

positive_comment: Nice family hotel with clean and spacious room, very stylish. Helpfull staff, delicious breakfast with variety foods. Very close to "Die Bergretter" TV series station. Small but cosy wellness.
negative_comment: We would like to spend more time there :-)

positive_comment: A wonderful hotel in the beautiful village of Ramsau, in a quiet place with a great view to the mountains, a spacious room, rich breakfast, a great restaurant, nice staff. Everything was perfect, there is nothing to complain about.

title: Great winter as well as summer place to stay in Ramsau and nature and mountains.
positive_comment: The hotel is perfectly located in the middle of Ramsau, just a few steps from the stadium where all the cross-country tracks do start. The hotel offers free parking and upon entering, you are welcomed by more than attentive staff. The breakfast is absolutely fabulous and more than rich. We also dined at the hotel and all the meals were greatly cooked and meticulously designed and prepared. The wellness is great and offers plenty of possibilities to relax.
negative_comment: Nothing really, out stay was a great experience overall.

title: Would stay again and recommend to others.
positive_comment: Restaurant food and service for both breakfast and dinner was of a very high standard.  Rooms very spacious.  Central village location excellent.
negative_comment: Hotel was short staffed and Stubl not available.

positive_comment: the staff are friendly. The Apartment is nice and fully equipped especially the kitchen. Breakfast is good and we liked the availability of freshly pressed juices.Location is also very central.

positive_comment: The place is extremely beautiful, very quiet and familiar, ideal for quality time with the family.  I loved the location, it was close to places of interest, the room was very comfortable, the staff was very friendly and helpful, they were very special to my daughter.  Very delicious breakfast and dinner alike, they have a very varied menu.  I recommend the place.

title: Truly wonderful, and friendly, kind and accommodating staff!
positive_comment: The staff were so lovely, which was highly appreciated. We were delayed with our travel arrangements but the staff were so kind and helpful and prepared a beautiful late dinner/cold platter to us which was delivered to our room. The breakfast was amazing with so many options. The view was sensational. Location perfect for our conference in the Events Centre. Slept super well in the comfy beds. Lovely modern room and facilities. Just wish we could have stayed there longer!
negative_comment: Little bit expensive for our budget but was probably worth it! Bathroom could be modernized? But honestly minor!

Unsere Schäferhündin durfte mit in das Restaurant. Personal sehr freundlich. Wir kommen wieder.

L'espace spa est très bien.
La propreté est impeccable. 
Le personnel est très serviable et souriant. 

Établissement familial mais géré très professionnellement.  Nous avons pris la demi pension.  Est également incluse une possibilité de repas salade, ou gâteaux   goûters entre 13h00 et 16h00. C'est un véritable PLUS au retour des pistes en attendant le dîner.
negative_comment: La décoration des chambres est assez classique mais tout est de très bonne qualité et très bien entretenu .

title: A comfortable stay for those wanting to eat and sleep well and stay close to the ski track!
positive_comment: We stayed in the area wanting to be close to the Jogllandloipe cross country skiing track, and we needed a place that offered dinner (we also got the midday lunch-snack which was extra great!). The hotel was comfortable, staff very pleasant and it was important to us that there's a place where we can make tea any hour of the day/ night. (A kettle in the room and some mugs would be even better but the selection of fruit and nuts and hot water in the living room worked great too). Everyone was so nice to our dog and the little town is very pleasant to walk around. We even had to get our car fixed which worked without any problem! :)
Great location if you like hiking and having a rest, too.

title: Best value for money possible in Styria
positive_comment:
Everything was wonderful, especially the people at the hotel and the amazing food (full pension even though only half pension booked).
Dog was no problem and relatively cheap with 10€ per night extra.
Massage extremely nice and also possible on a Saturday.
Wellness area perfect if you are into saunas, not so much for swimming as only a tiny little indoor pool available .
We took some hikes in the area - really easy as all routes are conveniently marked.
negative_comment: Saunas only active after 2pm, that’s why only 9/10.

title: a surprise gem
positive_comment: We were very pleasantly surprised - it was an almost last minute booking, so we did not have high expectations but wow! In the very heart of a picturesque village, a family-run-style hotel that proves that old school hospitality (more than a couple of centuries of experience belt if I remember correctly!) can still keep up & get constant comfy modern add-ons & updates. The restaurant offered a good playground to a chef who seemed to have fun in going beyond the tried & tested; good selection of wines (and yes, Austria is getting better & better at this). Oh, and everything gets even better with the spa, and massages…not to miss. So good that we would really hope to come back for longer.
Friendly helpful staff, spacious bedroom and delicious food.
negative_comment: The only children’s playground was out of order

title: Einfach traumhaft
positive_comment: Das Hotel ist modern, sehr gepflegt, nicht ganz so groß - was den Aufenthalt sehr angenehm macht. Der Wellness-Bereich ist sehr schön. Die Mitarbeiter waren alle sehr freundlich und immer gut gelaunt. Das alles in dieser ländlichen Idylle… Einfach traumhaft. Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt.
Sehr schöne Lage, sehr freundliches Personal und Leitung, unkompliziert in Bezug auf Nahrungsunverträglichkeiten. Nachmittags Kuchen! Hundefreundlich.
negative_comment: Gibt nichts zu bemängeln. Entspricht den Erwartungen eines Hotels dieser Kategorie in dieser Region.

title: Ein traumhafter Urlaub in einem außergewöhnlichen Hotel
positive_comment: Das Personal war sehr nett und hilfsbereit, sogar der Hotelchef hat sich persönlich um die Gäste gekümmert. Ein großes Lob der Küche, sowohl das Frühstücksbuffet als auch das 5-Gänge-Menü am Abend waren hervorragend. Auch die Flexibilität im Umgang mit Vegetarier war lobenswert. Die Lage des Hotels ist ideal zum Fahrradfahren, in der absperrbaren Fahrradgarage war das Fahrrad gut aufgehoben. Der Poolbereich ist neu, groß und sehr einladend zum Relaxen nach den Fahrradtouren. Alles in Allem ein traumhafter Urlaub, wir kommen sicher wieder.

title: Super Unterkunft mit lecker Essen.
positive_comment: Wir hatten mit den Enkelkindern einen wunderbaren Aufenthalt. Die Gastgeber waren super nett und erfüllten uns jeden Wunsch. Auch mal in den Außenpool bei Regen! An Frühstück und Unterkunft gab es nichts zu meckern. Das Abendessen war super lecker und wurde mit viel Liebe und Spaß serviert. Danke
negative_comment: Auf das Wetter hat man keinen Einfluss.

positive_comment:

Top Aufenthalt

title: Kurztrip
positive_comment: Check-in war einfach. Wir konnten das Zimmer schon ab 13h beziehen. Es war eher klein, aber sauber!
negative_comment: Wir schlafen gerne bei geöffnetem Fenster. Leider war es nicht möglich, da unser Zimmer straßenseitig lag.

title: War ok
positive_comment: Check in lief unkompliziert. Zimmer 115 (mit Balkon zum Hof) ist gut gewesen.
negative_comment:
Die Betten sind sehr hart und telefonisch war kein Personal erreichbar. Jedoch war sofort jemand via Booking Chat erreichbar. 

Ich musste zwei mal das Personal kontaktieren. 
1. Keine freien Parkflächen im Aussenbereich. Liegt auch daran dass 5 (!) Fahrzeuge von Facility Management dort abgestellt sind und auch während meinem Aufenthalt nicht bewegt wurden (Freitag bis Sonntag). Mein Auto konnte ich auch nicht vor Ort aufladen, da das Facility Management Auto die ganze Zeit die Ladestation blockiert hat 🤦🏼‍♀️

Jedoch kann man sich nebenan am Schotterparkplatz parken. Das wusste ich nicht, da es nicht ausgeschildert war. 

2. Ich wurde von einem anderen Gast zugeparkt. Das war etwas mühsam.

title: Alles bestens
positive_comment: Alles bestens, gute Zufahrt. Bett war genau passend. Alles sauber und unkompliziert
Gratis Parken, Großes Zimmer mit Küchenzeile und Balkon, Modern eingerichtet, guter Preis.
negative_comment: Lage am Stadtrand

title: Für günstige Übernachtung sehr gut.
positive_comment: Nettes Zimmer, gutes Frühstück. Sehr bemühtes Personal. Weiter so.

👉 Gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis, saubere Bettwäsche und eine gut ausgestattete Miniküche.
Kontaktloses Einchecken.
Vielen Dank auch für den Kaffee und die Schokolade!Ser nett🤗
negative_comment: Enttäuschend war, dass wir nicht das Zimmer bekommen haben, das wir bei der Buchung ausgewählt hatten. Wir hatten ein großes Zimmer mit Doppelbett und Sofa ohne Balkon gebucht. Stattdessen bekamen wir ein sehr kleines Zimmer, in das nur ein Bett passte, ohne Sofa, dafür aber mit einem Balkon, den wir nicht brauchten (wir rauchen nicht). Das war der einzige Punkt, der uns wirklich sehr enttäuscht hat.

title: Sehr schönes und freundliches Hotel
positive_comment: Bei Problemen worde einem sofort geholfen. Das Personal ist total freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Zimmer waren sauber und gemütlich, war alles vorhanden was man braucht.
negative_comment: Man musste sich an die Lautstärke der vielen Autos, die auf der Hauptstraße fahre gewöhnen, da wir auf der Seite unsere Zimmer hatten.

title: War alles in Ordnung
positive_comment: Zimmer sauber und das Frühstück war in Ordnung. Parkplätze vorhanden.
negative_comment: Ich empfand die Tische und Stühle im Frühstücksraum als eher klein.

positive_comment: Gut gelegenes Hotel (von der Autobahn 5 Minuten). Sehr gut mit großer Garage die viel Platz hat. Einfaches Self-Check-In. Die Zimmer zweckmäßig und gut eingerichtet. Badezimmer mit Dusche (sehr angenehm). Für einen Kurzaufenthalt in Graz mit eigenem Auto ideal.
negative_comment: Wenn man ein Zimmer auf die Straße hat, leider auch in der Nacht sehr laut (Triester-Strasse ist eine richtige Durchzugstrasse).

positive_comment: Einfacher self Check in und out. Tiefgarage mit Fahrstuhl auf die Etage. Gutes Frühstück.  Tee und Kaffee und Wasser auf dem Zimmer.
negative_comment: Trotz  geschlossener Fenster ist der Straßenlärm deutlich hörbar.

positive_comment: Nous avons tous apprécié pour une soirée à l'hôtel sauf que déjà à l'heure où nous sommes arrivés il y avait aucun membre du personnel car tout est automatisé et le lendemain matin pareil !
Le personnel a été très arrangeant avec notre grand groupe. Les chambres disposent de la climatisation. La terrasse et son bar étaient un chouette endroit pour se retrouver.

title: Une étape facile :)
positive_comment:

La chambre était propre et confortable.
negative_comment:
On entend énormément entre les chambres (nous entendions la télévision de la chambre voisine) et nous entendons également beaucoup la grande route juste devant. 
L’acoustique est à revoir.

positive_comment:

Pas très loin, le tram.
negative_comment: Pas de la faute de l'établissement mais un bâtiment se monte juste à côté et les ouvriers commencent tôt.

positive_comment: Amazing breakfast for this price. Very clean. Very kind.

title: Good location

negative_comment: Room was near street and little bit load

we stayed for one night during our transit. Everything was good, what was great, such a big underground parking, really convenient

negative_comment: The toilet had an unpleasant smell, which made the stay less comfortable. Cleanliness could be improved.

title: Recommended
positive_comment: The reception staff was extremely kind and helpful, the room was much bigger than expected, clean and comfortable. We had a good night's sleep, and breakfast was absolutely amazing

Great location near the train station — not far from the old town.
The breakfasts are tasty. 
Many thanks to the reception staff member, who was always helpful and in a great mood.
negative_comment:

positive_comment: Nice clean well located hotel near to train stations and bus etc
negative_comment: Nothing really good value hotel

title: City trip
positive_comment:

Friendly helpful staff
Good size comfy room with kettle/tea/coffee/cream in the room
Good WIFI
negative_comment:

Furniture a bit tired

title: Clean hotel, friendly staff, brilliant breakfast. We really enjoyed our stay.
positive_comment: Breakfast was delicious and plenty of it. The bar in Reception was well stocked and reasonably priced. The bar area was comfortable and inviting. Rooms were clean and we had everything we needed.
negative_comment: Only thing that could make it better would be if evening meals were available

title: Overall, everything was great and I really enjoyed my one night stay at the hotel.
positive_comment: Breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of fresh and tasty options. The staff were very supportive, attentive, and genuinely engaged, which made the stay even more pleasant.
negative_comment: The only minor downside was that the mattress was a bit too soft for my personal preference, but this did not significantly affect the overall positive experience.

title: great quality price ratio hotel close to the main train station. A cozy place.
positive_comment: I liked the cosy little hotel bar. The service was excellent and I liked the company of the easily relatable compéres.
The staff were great location and for the price an absolute bargain.

There was a smell of sewage in one room, the staff provided us with a replacement without any problems. We could not occupy 1 room due to illness, the hotel promised to refund us 50% of the cancellation fee. We really appreciate it.

title: Rapporto qualita' prezzo eccezionale
positive_comment: Check-in automatico molto comodo, stanza confortevole, possibilita' di parcheggio gratuito sia all'esterno (solo 4 posti) e sotterraneo , rapporto qualita' prezzo insuperabile !
negative_comment: Non abbiamo trovato posto nel parcheggio esterno per cui abbiamo parcheggiato in quello sotterraneo, ma riuscire ad percorrere la curva della discesa prima della saracinesca e' stato un vero delirio, veramente troppo stretta !   La nostra camera dava sulla strada principale che era molto trafficata e , nonostante la finestra (con tripli vetri) chiusa , si sentiva lo stesso rumore

title: Meglio dell'aspettativa
positive_comment: La semplicità del check-in sebbene in autonomia,( forse potrebbero chiedere e pre registrare i documenti del clienti così da non doverli immettere al momento) parcheggio sotterraneo strepitoso, possibilità di ricarica auto elettriche, PULIZIA ASSOLUTA OVUNQUE.  Più che soddisfacente la colazione, non manca niente. Dista 6 km dal centro di Graz, per chi ha mezzi propri è top.
negative_comment: Forse un po' troppo calda la camera e avendo la finestra che dava sulla strada principale non possibile tenere aperta per il rumore. Mentre l'insonorizzazione è super.

positive_comment: Ottima colazione, molto comodi e "user friendly" sia il self check in e il parcheggio coperto gratuito.

title: Davvero una piacevole sorpresa
positive_comment: Parcheggio sotterraneo gratuito ,la camera ,la pulizia ,il riscaldamento, il letto
negative_comment: I cuscini erano troppo morbidi

positive_comment:
Dotato di tutto il necessario per una notte. Parcheggio gratuito anche coperto.
Buon rapporto qualità prezzo.

Un posto molto accogliente, posizione perfetta. Eravamo di passaggio ci siamo fermati solo x una notte. Non abbiamo fatto la colazione.
Consiglio
La pulizia la semplicità check-in stanza bellissima e spazi enormi
Un po' tutto, letto comodo, colazione ottima. La Signora nella struttura è stata gentilissima nel dare indicazioni.
negative_comment: Niente da segnalare.

title: CARIBOU EN GRAZ,  "GRAZIAS"

title: Totalmente recomendable.
positive_comment:
Es una pensión decorada con mucho gusto. Es muy acogedora y con mucha luz natural. Está muy limpia. La habitación era espaciosa. Sencilla pero con esos toques q le hacen sentir a uno como en casa.
El personal es muy eficiente, siempre sonriendo y amable. Y los desayunos muy buenos y variados.
A 15min andando de la estación y a 7 minutos del centro..

title: Buen hotel, buena ubicación. Muy recomendable.
positive_comment: Es un hotel básico pero muy cómodo (aunque no tienen ascensor). La habitación ya estaba hecha al volver de desayunar. No se pasa nada de frío, más bien al contrario. Recomiendo contratar el desayuno con la habitación, saldrá más barato y hay bastante variedad.
negative_comment:
No había frigo en la habitación. 
El wifi se desconectaba continuamente.

title: Habitación cómoda en una excelente ubicación
positive_comment: Habitación grande y cómoda en una excelente ubicación. Buen desayuno.
negative_comment: Falta de aire acondicionado en verano.

title: LUGAR CON UN ENCANTO PARTICULAR
positive_comment: El lugar tiene su encanto porque tiene una decoración muy original. Está céntrico, cercano al Kuntsmuseum y a Mariahilfer.
negative_comment: El suelo sonaba demasiado al andar. No tenía aire acondicionado, ni nevera, probablemente en consecuencia a sus políticas de respeto al medio ambiente. Por lo demás todo muy bien.

title: Habitación cómoda y espaciosa en una genial ubicación. Recomendable!
positive_comment: He estado en este alojamiento varias veces. Habitación limpia, espaciosa, y en una ubicación excelente. El restaurante sirve comida típica austríaca de buena calidad. Repetiré.
negative_comment: En verano hace calor en las habitaciones y no hay aire acondicionado.

title: Hogareño.
positive_comment: La chica que trabaja en recepción fue muy amable y preocupada, ese día llegué con una reacción alérgica muy fuerte e hizo todo lo posible por ayudarme. El hotel estaba en una excelente ubicación, muy cerca de todo caminando. La habitación era enorme y muy linda! Si vuelvo a la ciudad, definitivamente quiero volver a hospedarme allí. El desayuno estaba muy bien, era bastante variado.
negative_comment: Por decir algo, quizás el horario de recepción podría ser hasta más tarde, a las 19:30 hrs es aún un poco temprano por si algún huésped llega a necesitar algo. Si bien hay un mensaje que dice que hay que comunicarse con el personal del restaurante, al tocar la puerta interior nadie acudió a atender.

positive_comment: Bien ubicado. Habitación espaciosa . Con restaurante con buena comida y a precios razonables.
negative_comment: Escaleras para llegar a habitación. Pocos enchufes al lado de la cama. Falta alargue.o trifásico. No tiene ventilador.

positive_comment: Desayuno completísimo. Ubicación ideal. Restaurante exquisito.

The location, the room, the restaurant, the breakfast, the staff are amazing. Close to the city center, the train station. I recommend it to everyone, next time I go to Graz, I will definitely stay there again. I also loved the ladder shelves. Thank you for everything! 🙏

La atención del personal de 10. Junto a la estación de tren y a unos 15/20 minutos andando del centro. También  está a unos dos minutos de coger un tranvía que te deja en el centro. Aunque se ve que es un hotel antiguo tenía aparato de calefacción nuevo y moderno que te permite regular tu mismo la temperatura.
negative_comment: Nada reseñable.

Buena relación de precio/calidad.

positive_comment: tutto personale accogliente, gentile e premuroso con il mio bimbo di 3 anni. Consiglio vivamente
Struttura famigliare accoglienza super posizione perfetta

Stanza comoda e rinnovata, ho molto apprezzato la gentilezza del personale (sia del BB che del ristorante sottostante). Ottimi anche i pasti, inoltre ho molto apprezzato la posizione tranquilla ma centrale della struttura nel centro storico di Graz. Consigliatissimo.

Caratteristica pensione in posizione ottima, si raggiunge facilmente, si può parcheggiare l'auto in strada, si trova in un quartiere carino pieno di piccoli negozi e locali, e con una passeggiata di dieci minuti, attraversando il fiume, si è in pieno centro città. Sotto gli alloggi c'è un ristorante molto frequentato dove si mangia bene a prezzi interessanti. Direi tutto ottimo.

positive_comment: L'appartamento è molto carino e coccolo. E pulizie ottime.  Tornerei🤩

Personale accogliente 
Appartamento molto bello curato e pulito

title: Ottima pensione familiare ed accogliente in posizione strategica.
positive_comment: Siamo già stati qualche anno fa in questa struttura, trovandoci già allora molto bene, e siamo tornati molto volentieri. Ambiente familiare ed accogliente. Gentilissimo e collaborativo lo staff. Ampia e pulita la camera, nella zona più nuova della pensione. Ottimo letto, ottima doccia. - Colazione adeguata. - Al piano terra un ottimo e comodissimo ristorantino, con possibilità di mangiare alla carta od optare per la mezza o intera pensione, dove abbiamo mangiato sempre molto bene. - La posizione è assolutamente strategica, e le zone salienti del centro sono tutte rapidamente raggiungibili a piedi. - Nelle vicinanze c'è un garage convenzionato, che viene offerto gratuitamente. - Ottima l'organizzazione per il carico/scarico dei bagagli in un'area immediatamente adiacente usufruibile con apposito permesso. - Ottimo rapporto qualità/prezzo. Abbiamo già prenotato nuovamente per un altro prossimo soggiorno.
negative_comment: L'unico problema rilevato è stato il segnale del WiFi che purtroppo nella posizione della nostra stanza, pur essendoci campo anche pieno, non riusciva ad agganciare Internet, ed al quale abbiamo dovuto alfine rinunciare.

positive_comment: Abbiamo passato tre giorni bellissimi a Graz, complice il periodo dell'Avvento con i mercatini, l'Hotel proprio come desideravamo, centrale, a 10 minuti dall'Hauptplaz e dall'Uhrturm. Un'atmosfera e un ottima cucina che rispetta la tradizione stiriana. Il personale gentilissimo. Ci torneremo🤗

Posizione non centrale ma facilmente raggiungibile il centro storico a piedi.
Colazione variegata e di buona qualità, in particolare il salato.
Abbiamo cenato presso la struttura e abbiamo mangiato molto bene i piatti locali, con cortesia e disponibilità del personale  al top.
negative_comment: La struttura purtroppo non dispone di ascensore.

Buona e abbondante colazione (tra l'altro è stato applicato un robusto sconto alla colazione considerando mio figlio 17enne come "bambino"). Ottima posizione per arrivare in centro a piedi in pochi minuti.

ausgezeichnetes Frühstück !  Top Lage ! Sehr freundliches Personal !

positive_comment:

Auf den Zimmer gibt es Seife sowie Duschgel im Spender , Handtücher sind sauber und Flecken frei !
